Zh: 这孩子的手部动作就像篮球运动员控球一样迅速。

En: Fast -- this kid has got street smarts.
Zh: 反应很快——这孩子很有街头智慧。

En: Cuno dies, you're gonna pick one out of his brain like that too? Cuno's gonna go out in a hail of bullets. Gonna look like a fucking porcupine.
Zh: “坤诺死了，你也会那样从他的脑子里挑东西出来吗？坤诺也会走进枪林弹雨中，像头豪猪一样死去。”

En: I'll be there for you, Cuno.
Zh: “我会与你同在的，坤诺。”

En: Yeah... There's a dreamy look in his eyes.
Zh: “好啊…….”他的眼神里充满了梦幻。

En: You know what's a good line of work for getting shot?
Zh: “你知道什么工作最容易中枪吗？”

En: Pigs... He nods. There's a silence. It carries.
Zh: “猪……”他点点头，陷入了沉默之中。

En: Porta Rosa, a side alley of the Boogie Street spearhead. A young man in his early twenties approaches Patrol Officer Émile Mollins and asks for a cigarette. As Officer Mollins reaches in his coat pocket for the pack of 'Astra' he just purchased this morning...
Zh: 玻尔塔·罗萨，布吉街前的一条侧巷。一个二十出头的年轻人接近了巡警埃米尔·莫林并问他要了一根烟。正当莫林警官从大衣口袋里掏出他今早刚买的“阿斯特拉”时……

En: Don't be silly, you're a kid. Answer me some questions instead.
Zh: “别傻了，你还是小孩子呢。不如来回答我几个问题吧。”

En: You're such a bummer, pig.
Zh: “你可真是扫兴，猪猡。”

En: Shit, pig... You see respect in his eyes. "You got torn up bad there. Bled like a... like a fucking pig."
Zh: “该死的，猪猡……”你看到了他眼睛里的尊敬。“你在那儿伤得很重。像头被放血的……该死的猪猡。”

En: Cuno hopes you learned your lesson and Cuno doesn't have to send his guys after you again. He nods seriously. "Now, what do you want from Cuno?"
Zh: “坤诺希望你已经得到了教训，这样坤诺就不用再派手下过来追杀你了。”他严肃地点点头。“现在，你想从坤诺这里得到什么呢？”

En: Watch out, pig. It's a dangerous world out there. But Cuno's got his eyes on you.
Zh: “小心点，猪猡。外面的世界很危险，但坤诺会罩着你的。”

En: What's that supposed to mean?
Zh: “那是什么意思？”

En: Cuno starts doing the *I got my eye on you* gesture repeatedly. "Who knows?!"
Zh: 坤诺开始重复地做着*有我罩着你*的手势。“谁知道呢？！”

En: Oh yeah, kids! (Nod in approval.) "But don't you mean *desert kipt*?"
Zh: “噢耶，小孩！”（赞许地点头。）“但你不是说是*沙漠吉皮特*？”

En: Total *retards* use language like that. Congratulations, Cuno, you just made yourself a retard.
Zh: “只有*智障*才会这么说话。恭喜你啊，坤诺，你完全是在自取其辱。”

En: Wish I could have been here to see it... Now, I have some questions.
Zh: “真希望我能亲眼看到……现在，我有几个问题想问你。”

En: Uh...
Watch out, Cuno! He's trying to crawl up your ass!
Zh: “小心点，坤诺！他在拍你的马屁呢！”

En: Stop choking, Cuno! The *fägäri's* got you in a chokehold!
Zh: “别再哽咽了，坤诺！那个*基佬*掐住你的脖子了！”

En: Cuno knows which kipt Cuno meant. Cuno knows *all* the kipts. Cuno's dad's a kipt-expert, says kipt every day! A hundred times a day!!
Zh: “坤诺知道自己指的是哪个吉皮特。坤诺知道*所有*吉皮特。坤诺的父亲就是个吉皮特专家，每天都会说吉皮特！每天说一百次！！”

En: You wouldn't happen to know anything about any missing locusts?
Zh: “你不会碰巧知道有关失踪的蝗虫的消息吧？”

En: I got more speed. Let's do this again.
Zh: “我这有一包思必得，我们再来一次吧。”

En: I took care of the drug situation.
Zh: “我把毒品的问题解决了。”

En: Let's discuss these illegal narcotics again.
Zh: “我们再来谈谈这些非法毒品的问题吧。”

En: What was that about running you an errand and *illegal narcotics*, Cuno?
Zh: “给你跑腿还有那些*非法毒品*是怎么回事，坤诺？”

En: Hey Cuno... got any speed?
Zh: “嘿，坤诺……还有思必得吗？”

En: Cuno's cruising his bitch on the town and the bitch comes back griefin' to the Cuno? What is up with that?
Zh: “坤诺正带着自己的姑娘寻欢作乐，现在那贱人反过来可怜坤诺了？这算什么事啊？”

En: Get the fuck out of here, fatass! Those pants are too small for you!
Zh: “快他妈滚吧，肥猪！那些裤子你根本穿不下！”

En: The pants are totally okay, don't listen to her, she's trying to give you body image problems.
Zh: 裤子完全穿得下，别搭理她，她是想对你进行肉体羞辱呢。

En: Pig... Cuno slaps his forehead. "Do you have any idea how fucking stupid that sounds."
Zh: “猪猡……”坤诺拍了拍自己的脑门。“你知道这听上去有多蠢吗？”

En: I talked to the gardener. She said not to listen to you.
Zh: “我去找过园丁了，她说不要听你的。”

En: It's totally okay for a man your age to wear pants like that. And you're not fat.
Zh: 像你这个年龄段的男人穿那样的裤子完全没问题，而且你一点也不胖。

En: Cuno gives you hot fucking leads... snitch-bitch style -- and you come back griefin' the Cuno? The fuck out of here!
Zh: “坤诺给你提供了线索……像个告密鬼似的——你反而倒可怜起坤诺来了？快他妈的滚！”

En: Try once more to figure him out, find a way to connect with him.
Zh: 再试着看清他的真面目，找到与他共情的方法。

En: Hero with a gun.
Zh: 持枪英雄。

En: Cuno talks to you.
Zh: 坤诺在跟你说话。

En: Hero with a bullet.
Zh: 子弹英雄。

En: Cunoesse calculating supremacy.
Zh: 坤妮斯谨慎至上。

En: Knows Cuno’s violent dad.
Zh: 知道坤诺有个暴力的爸爸。

En: Backed down from Cuno.
Zh: 向坤诺让步。

En: Cuno dominated you.
Zh: 坤诺压制住了你。

En: Tried to shoot Cunoesse.
Zh: 试着朝坤妮斯开枪。

En: Cuno the Snitch.
Zh: 告密者坤诺。

En: Talked about the Kingdom.
Zh: 谈谈王国。

En: Irregular speech patterns... overconfidence... Could this kid be on drugs? This warrants further investigation into this... *Cuno*.
Zh: 不规律的语言模式……过度自信……莫非这孩子嗑药了？值得深入调查……这个*坤诺*。

En: The boy is sweating profusely, his eyes are like two black holes and his jaw is twitching as if trying to break free from the empire of his body.
Zh: 男孩大汗淋漓，眼睛像两个黑洞。他的下巴抽搐着，像是想要从身体的统治中挣脱出来。

En: Hold on, what does that mean?
Zh: 等一下，那是什么意思？

En: The kid is obviously high.
Zh: 这孩子明显是嗑药了。

En: Here, pig. We FALN now. Performance buddies. Cuno unzips his jacket again and pulls the pants out of the plastic wrapping.
Zh: 坤诺再次拉开夹克拉链，把裤子从塑料包装里拿了出来。“拿去，猪猡。现在我们都是FALN，是伙伴啦。”

En: Cuno can already see you soaring through the air like a fucking eagle. He looks at you with pride. "Pig's in Cuno's debt now. Money-debt."
Zh: “坤诺已经可以预见你像只老鹰一样翱翔在空中了。”他骄傲地看着你。“猪猡现在可是欠了坤诺一笔，钱债。”

En: I want to buy the FALN pants after all.
Zh: “我也想买FALN的裤子。”

En: Money-debt doesn't mean anything. He's just saying words. You're not in his debt.
Zh: 金钱债务根本没有意义，他只是随口说说罢了。你根本不欠他任何东西。

En: I talked to Mañana about the armour.
Zh: “我跟马列拉说了盔甲的事。”

En: So?! He raises his eyebrows, projecting aggressive indifference.
Zh: “所以呢？！”他挑起眉毛，摆出一副咄咄逼人的冷漠样子。

En: He told me you promised to 'sic the pigs' on him.
Zh: “他告诉我你跟他保证会'宰了那群猪'的。”

En: He said to thank you. Wasn't too keen on chasing down that armour anyway.
Zh: “他说要谢谢你。反正他也不是非得拿到那副盔甲。”

En: Nothing. The tip really paid off. Good job, Cuno.
Zh: “没什么，这个情报很有价值。干得漂亮，坤诺。”

En: Yeah, so? He doesn't understand. "Cuno *did* sic the pigs on him. Cuno's a man of his word."
Zh: “是吗，然后呢？”他还没明白过来。“坤诺*的确*宰了那群猪，坤诺一直说到做到。”

En: You should thank him.
Zh: 你应该谢谢他。

En: He said you're now the king of the entire *Jamrock*?!
Zh: “他说你现在是整个*加姆洛克*的王？！”

En: Uh... fuck... okay. Cuno's a giver like that, yes. He looks slightly confused.
Zh: “呃……该死……好吧。坤诺就是这么乐于奉献，没错。”他看起来有点困惑。

En: Uh... North Jamrock, he corrects you. "Cuno meant everything north of 8/81. The rooster fucked Cuno's words up. Cuno doesn't do South. Doesn't fuck with the Madre."
Zh: “呃……只有加姆洛克北边。”他纠正了你。“坤诺指的是8/81北边的一切。那只大公鸡把坤诺的话理解的一塌糊涂。坤诺不管南边的事，也不会去招惹马德雷。”

En: Uh what? He quickly looks around. "Don't be playin' Cuno off as a snitch-bitch. The oldest trick in the book, people!"
Zh: “说什么呢？”他迅速四处打量了一番。“别把坤诺说的像个告密鬼似的。这把戏已经老掉牙了，伙计们！”

En: Are you snitching, Cuno?!
Zh: “你在告密吗，坤诺？！”

En: This is some ancient bullshit, people! He addresses the surrounding windows. "Cuno would rather take ten than snitch! Pig's full of shit! Get the fuck out of here!"
Zh: “这都是老掉牙的流言了，伙计们！”他对着周围的窗户喊道。“坤诺即使死掉也不会告密的！这猪猡完全是在胡言乱语！快他妈的滚出去！”

En: You found a real nice button to push. Turned the tables on him.
Zh: 你发现他身上一个很有趣的*按钮*，现在形势对他很不利了。

En: You're a little bit closer now to understanding this kid.
Zh: 你开始有点了解这个孩子了。

En: Cuno sent your fat ass running around like jello!
Zh: “坤诺让你的肥屁股像果冻一样跑起来了。”

En: Look, pig... He's suddenly all business. "Cuno sent you to rough some people up. Cuno played you. That happened. Now you and Cuno should move on."
Zh: “听着，猪猡……”他突然正经了起来。“坤诺让你去找那些人的麻烦，把你玩弄于股掌之间。就是这样。现在你跟坤诺都得向前看了。”

En: Good idea.
Zh: 好主意。

En: Yes. Let's move on.
Zh: “好吧，向前看。”

En: I will remember this, Cuno.
Zh: “我会记住这一天的，坤诺。”

En: Whatever, kid...
Zh: “随便吧，小孩……”

En: Yeah, that's what Cuno said. Don't be saying what Cuno said back to Cuno. He throws his hands in the air. "Get the fuck out of here, parroting Cuno..."
Zh: “没错，确实是坤诺说的。不用跟我重复我说过的话。”他把手举起来。“快他妈滚出去，竟敢模仿坤诺……”

En: You got fucked. He repeats. "You got fucked, pig. Fucked *bad*. Of course you're gonna remember this. Now get the fuck out of here, griefin' the Cuno..."
Zh: “你被耍了。”他重复着。“你被耍了，猪猡。被*狠狠地*耍了一次。你当然会记得这一天。现在给我滚出去，竟敢同情坤诺……”

En: What is this -- tryin'a be cool with your new asshole? Cuno was just being nice to you. He waves you off. "You got fucked bad. Now limp the fuck out of here."
Zh: “这算什么——在新朋友面前装模作样？坤诺都是为了你好呀。”他挥手让你离开。“你被耍了，快给我滚出去。”

En: After this shit you better have something *real* interesting to say if you wanna stay in Cuno's face.
Zh: “在此之后，如果你还想出现在坤诺面前的话，最好说一些*真正*有趣的东西。”

En: Yeah! *Real* interesting.
Zh: “没错！*真正*有意思的东西。”

En: Cuno appreciates you recognizing him as the sovereign of Jamrock, though... North Jamrock, that is.
Zh: 坤诺很高兴你认为他是加姆洛克的统治者，尽管……只是加姆洛克北边。

En: Just don't think coz you got half your dick shot off -- and you're an invalid now -- Cuno's gonna treat you different.
Zh: “别以为就因为你下面被射掉了一半——现在算是个残废了——坤诺就会对你区别对待。”

En: Cuno doesn't reward weakness, he says looking at your pathetic limp. "It's business as usual with Cuno. Cuno's cold like that."
Zh: “坤诺绝不会善待弱小，”他看着你可怜的跛行姿态说道。“对坤诺来说永远只有生意，就是这么冷酷。”

En: Feels good for some reason.
Zh: 莫名地感觉良好。

En: It's not art, it's fucking brutal. Nothing pussy about it! The fuck out of here!
Zh: “这不是艺术，这他妈叫残忍。别大惊小怪的了！快给我滚出去！”

En: Even the pigs think it's garbage!
Zh: “连猪都觉得那是垃圾！”

En: Look bitches, Cuno's gonna wrap it up for you. He pushes his chin out. "Talk business or fuck off. Enough 'bout this art shit."
Zh: “听着，小婊子们，坤诺会帮你们搞定的。”他扬起下巴。“要么谈正事，要么快滚蛋。别再跟我唧唧歪歪什么艺术了。”

En: It's still piss-weak garbage! you hear a subsonic squeak from behind the fence. "No one likes your fucking art, you should bang with your life. Murder was the case..."
Zh: ‘还是一堆垃圾！'你听到围栏后面传来一阵高声的尖叫。‘不会有人喜欢你的艺术的，醒醒吧！谋杀就是这样……'

En: The man shoots him point blank in his chest. Breathless, the patrol officer collapses in the gutter. His right hand is grabbing the armour on his chest. The bullet didn't pierce it, but he can't breathe. On the pavement, the patter of the perpetrator's feet growing distant.
Zh: 那人瞄准他的胸口开了一枪，巡警应声倒在了排水沟里，右手还抓着胸前的盔甲。子弹虽然没有穿透盔甲，他仍旧失去了呼吸。人行道上，犯罪者的脚步声渐行渐远。

En: Bleed, pig! someone opens a window and says, but Émile can't see who. His sight grows dim with pain...
Zh: “流血吧，猪猡！”有人打开窗户说，但埃米尔看不清那人的模样。他的视线因为疼痛变得模糊起来……

En: Sire, it just *went off*!
Zh: 大人，它就这么*走火*了！

En: Cuno, I wasn't trying to shoot her. It just went off. Sometimes it just goes off...
Zh: “坤诺，我并不想朝她开枪的。枪就这么走火了，有时候就会这样……”

En: Cuno wants to like reckless shit... He looks at one hand, then the other. "But then you almost kill Cuno's girl. Cuno's conflicted and shit."
Zh: “坤诺很想欣赏一个鲁莽的混蛋……”他看着一只手，又看了看另一只。“但你差点杀了坤诺的姑娘，这让坤诺很矛盾。”

En: Stop bending Cuno's mind and stop waving your gun around kids. What the fuck is wrong with you?
Zh: “别再扰乱坤诺的思绪，也别再拿枪指着孩子们了！你他妈到底有什么毛病？”

En: The lieutenant nods.
Zh: 警督点点头。

En: Whatcha fuckin' noddin' at there, 'clard?! Cuno sees that shit. He makes a discarding motion. "Let's just talk shit, Cuno needs to calm down."
Zh: “你他妈点什么头啊，四眼？！坤诺看出来了。”他做了个丢弃的动作。“直接说正事吧，坤诺得冷静一会儿。”

En: He means it. He really does want to calm down.
Zh: 确实如此，他是真的很想冷静下来。

En: Cuno knows where you sleep -- the pig who fucked his window up. I'm gonna climb in through that balcony, put the fucking knife in you... yeah, he mouths: "I've been in your room."
Zh: “坤诺知道你睡在哪里——把窗户打开的猪猡。我会从阳台爬进去，把刀子插进你身体里……没错，”他装腔作势地说，“我去过你的房间。”

En: The kid raises his voice: "But you and Cuno are good for now. Pals. Shoot that shit at Cuno, let's have a jolly time."
Zh: 这孩子提高了嗓门：“但你跟坤诺现在相安无事，朋友。敢朝坤诺开枪，那你就等着吧。”

En: Sire, the boy has *not* really been in thine room. 'Tis but a falsification.
Zh: 大人，这个男孩*没有*真的进过您的房间。这是在弄虚作假。

En: But he could get in there.
Zh: 但他完全可以进去。

En: It's not impossible for a boy his size to climb in...
Zh: 像他这种体型的男孩爬进去也不是不可能……

En: The determination in his voice leaves little room for doubt in his sincerity. He means every word. *Needs* to be taken seriously.
Zh: 他声音中的决绝让他的诚意不容置疑，他说的每一个字都是认真的。你*需要*认真对待。

En: Okay.
Zh: “好吧。”

En: Okay. The fuck do you want from Cuno?
Zh: “很好。你找坤诺究竟有什么事？”

En: Nod.
Zh: 点头。

En: You don't threaten me.
Zh: “别想威胁我。”

En: Okay, let's.
Zh: “好啊，就这样。”

En: One word out of you, pigshit, and you're locked out of the Cuno experience *forever* -- you hear me?
Zh: “再敢多说一个字，猪猡，就*永远*别想从坤诺这里得到任何东西——听见了吗？”

En: You hear the Cuno?
Zh: “听到坤诺的话了吗？”

En: Nod. (You hear him.)
Zh: 点头。（听到了。）

En: Try me, you little... (Seriously risk your relationship with the Cuno.)
Zh: “有种试试啊，你这个……”（严重危及你与坤诺的关系。）

En: You and Cuno are fucking done. Get the fuck out of Cuno's sight.
Zh: “你跟坤诺算是玩完了，快他妈的滚蛋。”

En: Let's go, officer. I've had enough of this.
Zh: “我们走吧，警官。我已经受够了。”

En: Aaaaaand you're back in business with the Cuno. Now what is it?
Zh: “啊，你回来跟坤诺谈正事了。现在怎么了？”

En: Cuno is a merciful king. Kind to his wayward subjects.
Zh: 坤诺是一位仁慈的国王，善待他任性的臣民。

En: Stop using *the k-word!* It belongs in the past.
Zh: “别再提*吉什么的*了！它属于过去。”

En: If you want to shut it down, you need to act decisively. It's Cuno. Use Cuno-words.
Zh: 如果你想让它闭嘴，就得果断一点。那可是坤诺，用坤言坤语才对。

En: Can't tell Cuno what words to use. Fucking *kipt*. He imbues the last syllable with a special kind of joy.
Zh: “不用你告诉坤诺该怎么说话。该死的*吉皮特*。”他给最后一个音节注入了一种特殊的喜悦。

En: Hmmm... looks like it does have a place in the future after all.
Zh: “嗯……看来未来它还是有一席之地的。”

En: What is this, a word museum? You wanna belong to a museum, Cuno? With the old people?
Zh: “这算什么，语言博物馆？你想被放在博物馆吗，坤诺？跟群老头子一起？”

En: Fuck you, Cuno says *kipt* if he wants to. Cuno's dad says *kipt* all the time. *Kipt's* a cool word.
Zh: “去死吧，坤诺想说*吉皮特*就说。坤诺的爸爸就一直说*吉皮特*。*吉皮特*可酷了。”

En: Kipt, kipt, kiptidy kipty kipt... The little one sputters, "kiptidy kipt kipt kipt kipt..."
Zh: “吉皮特，吉皮特，吉皮迪，吉皮提，吉皮特……”她喷出了口水，“吉皮迪，吉皮特，吉皮特，吉皮特，吉皮特……”

En: It's like a little engine has come alive on the other side of the fence. An engine that only says *kipt*.
Zh: 就像个小引擎在围栏的另一侧活了似的，一个只会说*吉皮特*的引擎。

En: ... kipt kipt kipt. He comes to an abrupt stop. "Alright, shut it down, C, the Cunn has business to do." He turns to you, victorious.
Zh: “……吉皮特，吉皮特，吉皮特。”他突然停了下来。“好了，停下吧，坤妮，坤大人还要说正事呢。”他带着胜利的得意，转向了你。

En: Yeah, kipt's a cool word. Cool men say kipt. Cuno's dad says it all the time, they say kipt on the radio. Cops say kipt. Even kipts say kipt. Cuno's cool. Cuno's a kipt.
Zh: “没错，吉皮特酷极了，潮人都会说吉皮特。坤诺的爸爸一直说，无线电里的人也在说吉皮特。条子们说吉皮特。就连吉皮特自己都说吉皮特。坤诺酷极了，坤诺就是吉皮特。”

En: Kipt-Cuno!
Zh: “吉皮特-坤诺！”

En: Now lay that shit at Cuno. He snaps his fingers. "You got your fuck bag down from the tree, fuck more do you want?"
Zh: “跟坤诺说正事吧。”他掰了掰手指。“你他妈已经把那玩意从树上弄下来了，又他妈想干什么？”

En: Kh...ff... Cuno's not fucking choking. He grabs his throat like he's choking.
Zh: “咳……咳……坤诺他妈的才没有窒息。”他抓着自己的喉咙，仿佛被扼住了似的。

En: Choked you out there. Serves you right for using reactionary shit.
Zh: “掐死你活该，反动份子。”

En: Alright alright, simmer down. I think we all learned our lesson.
Zh: “好了好了，冷静一点。我想我们都得到教训了。”

En: Cuno's back to full power now, he doesn't give a shit about kipts and retards. He lets go of his throat. "Let's talk normal shit."
Zh: “现在坤诺已经完全恢复了，他根本不在乎那些吉皮特和傻逼。”他松开了自己的喉咙。“谈点正事吧。”

En: Fuck did you want anyway, you got your fuckbag down?
Zh: “你到底想干什么，把那玩意放下来了？”

En: Oh, now you want a normal conversation, huh?
Zh: “哦，现在你又想好好说话了，是吧？”

En: Yeah, let's have normal conversation.
Zh: “好啊，那就谈点正事吧。”

En: Yes, yes, Cuno wants a normal conversation! He even sounds a little plaintive now. "Ask normal shit please."
Zh: “没错，没错，坤诺想要谈些正事。”他听上去甚至有点伤感了。“问点正经的问题吧。”

En: Like fuck you did... He lets go of his throat. "Cuno's gonna keep saying kipt forever now. Kipt, kipt, kih.. *cough*." He only gets two kipts out before he coughs.
Zh: “他妈的，就像你之前那样……”他松开了自己的喉咙。“现在开始坤诺要一直说吉皮特了。吉皮特，吉皮特，吉..*咳*。”在他被呛到之前，只说了两个吉皮特。

En: Shit... He stops. "The fuck did you want anyway? You got your fuckbag down, now let's talk normal shit."
Zh: “该死的……”他停了下来。“你到底想干什么，你已经把那玩意放下来了，现在来谈点正事吧。”

En: You really fucked him.
Zh: 你真的惹到他了。

En: He boasts: "Cuno's dad doesn't give a shit about *anything*."
Zh: 他夸口到：“坤诺的爸爸*什么*都不在乎。”

En: Except kipts.
Zh: 除了吉皮特。

En: Try to crawl out of Cuno's ass now!
Zh: “从坤诺屁股下面爬出来吧！”

En: Yeah, the fuck did you want anyway? You got your fuckbag down.
Zh: “是啊，你到底想干什么？那玩意已经被放下来了。”

En: This all so superficial, kids. The race mystery runs deeper than you could ever understand.
Zh: “这全都太肤浅了，孩子们。种族之谜深奥到超乎你们的想象。”

En: What is this shit? He shrugs. "Talk normal to Cuno. You got your fuckbag down."
Zh: “这是什么狗屁？”他耸耸肩。“好好跟坤诺说话，你已经把那个狗屁玩意放下来了。”

En: The huge kipt made him his bottom kipt, Cuno! Stay away from him!
Zh: “那个巨人吉皮特收他做小弟了，吉皮特，坤诺！离他远点儿！”

En: I want to discuss the body with you again, Cuno.
Zh: “我想再跟你谈谈那具尸体的事，坤诺。”

En: I have more questions about the crime scene.
Zh: “我还有一些关于犯罪现场的问题。”

En: Cuno, let's talk about your shack again.
Zh: “坤诺，我们再来谈谈你的棚屋吧。”

En: Cuno, I found your shack. (Point to the shack.)
Zh: “坤诺，我找到你的棚屋了。”（指向棚屋。）

En: I want to buy the FALN pants.
Zh: “我想买FALN的裤子。”

En: Cuno's got this.
Zh: “交给坤诺吧。”

En: Fucker shit himself.
Zh: “该死的混蛋。”

En: Cuno knows how to fucking throw!
Zh: “坤诺他妈的知道怎么扔！”

En: Over here, baconator! Time for launch.
Zh: “看招，终结者！着陆时间到了。”

ConvTitle: YARD / CUNO barks lost to cunoesse
En: Cuno's got nothing to say to you.
Zh: “坤诺跟你没什么好说的了。”

ConvTitle: YARD / CUNO barks lost to cunoesse
En: You're dead to Cuno.
Zh: “你对坤诺来说就是个死人了。”

ConvTitle: YARD / CUNO barks lost to cunoesse
En: Just fuck off, alright?
Zh: “滚开，行吗？”

ConvTitle: YARD / CUNO barks lost to cunoesse
En: Shouldn't have antagonized the Cuno.
Zh: “不应该跟坤诺作对的。”

ConvTitle: YARD / CUNO barks lost to cunoesse
En: Get lost, loser!
Zh: “滚开，臭屌丝。”

En: Some things are too awful to dwell on. The *näkkies* and *runkkaris*... might be some kind of defence mechanism.
Zh: 有些事太可怕，不能细想。*女水妖*还有*卑鄙小人*……可能是某种防御机制。

En: Like the private radio stations Noid mentioned?
Zh: 就像诺伊德提过的私人电台吗？

En: He doesn't want to think about it. It isn't just another boast.
Zh: 他不愿意去想这个问题。这不仅仅又是在吹牛。

En: [Leave.]
Zh: [离开。]

En: You were too pushy last time. Think this through, try to really *understand* the psychological bond Cuno has with Cunoesse.
Zh: 上次你过于咄咄逼人了。仔细想想，试着真正*理解*坤诺和坤妮斯之间的精神联结。

En: Okay. So what's the deal with Cunoesse?
Zh: 好的。那坤妮斯是怎么回事？

En: Just look -- while Cuno has no problem being near you, she always hides behind the fence, afraid for her life, like she's *done* something. Something very bad.
Zh: 看吧——坤诺在你身边并没什么不自在，而她总是躲在围栏后面，一直在担心自己的生命安全，就好像她*做*了什么事。非常糟糕的事。

En: It's not Cuno. It's Cunoesse.
Zh: 不是坤诺，是坤妮斯。

En: He's on your crime scene, bossing you around. And he's been here for some time, too -- this is where he *hangs out*. You have to get more out of him. He could be useful.
Zh: 他在你的犯罪现场，对你呼来喝去。而且他已经在这里呆了一段时间了——他常来这里*鬼混*。你必须从他身上挖掘更多信息，他很可能会派上大用场。

En: Hey Cuno -- think you can turn *the Cuno* down for a moment? Let's talk like normal people.
Zh: “嘿坤诺——能不能让*坤诺大人*休息一会儿呢？我们可以像正常人一样交流。”

En: Cuno, listen. I know this *boundary-pushing* thing is new to you, but it's old news for us grown-ups.
Zh: “坤诺，听着。我知道在你看来*突破界限*这种事情还很新鲜，但对我们这些成年人来说已经是老生常谈了。”

En: Cuno, you must have seen all kinds of things throwing stones here. Wanna help the RCM bust a murderer?
Zh: “坤诺，你在这里扔石头的时候肯定看到了各种各样的事情吧。想不想帮RCM找到凶手呢？”

En: Tryin'a fuck at the Cuno! Tryin'a fuck at me! Tryin'a fuck! He spits fast. "Cuno only gets HIGHER! It's faster-faster-faster! Can't take the Cuno -- stay out of the reactor!"
Zh: “想找坤诺大人的麻烦吗！想找我的麻烦吗！想找麻烦吗！”他的唾沫横飞。“坤诺只会扔得更高！更加-更加-更加快！不要阻拦坤诺大人——远离反应堆！”

En: Get your snout out of Cuno's ass! He waves you off. "Cuno knows how hard Cuno pushes it. Cuno pushes it hard-level..."
Zh: “你少他妈管坤诺的闲事！”他把你赶到一边。”坤诺知道坤诺突破得有多用力，坤诺拼命突破……”

En: You hear that, C? Porko wants to talk about how he can't hack this shit. Porko wants to move in with Cuno!
Zh: “你听到了吗，坤妮？猪猡想说自己没法解决这件事，猪猡想跟坤诺一起住！”

En: You should give up, popo. Or the Cunn will keep fucking it out of you.
Zh: “放弃吧，条子。否则坤大人不会善罢甘休的。”

En: Cuno gonna FUCK YOU UP! She pumps her bony fists in the air. "UP! UP! UP!"
Zh: “坤诺会整死你的！”她举起自己瘦骨嶙峋的拳头。“整！死！你！”

En: Take the pain, fucko! Take the bad! The child is not grinning -- it looks more like a wolf bearing its teeth.
Zh: “痛苦吧，混蛋！疼死你！”这孩子没有一丝笑意——反倒像一头龇牙咧嘴的狼。

En: Don't let him move in with us, Cuno.
Zh: “别让他搬来跟我们住一起，坤诺。”

En: (Act on it, try and separate them.) "Cuno! Psst..."
Zh: （行动起来，试着把他们分开。）“坤诺！喂！……”

En: What do you mean, she smoked someone?
Zh: “什么意思，她对谁放火了？”

En: You think she has anything to do with the dead man?
Zh: “你觉得她和那个死人有关系吗？”

En: You said she's... insane?
Zh: “你是说她……疯了？”

En: What's that language she uses -- *napakymppi*, *fägäri*?
Zh: “她说的是哪国话——*正中靶心*，*基佬*？”

En: Is she your sister?
Zh: “她是你的姐妹吗？”

En: What's going on? He's an ungovernable youth on your crime scene, throwing around incendiary language, trying to push your buttons.
Zh: 怎么了？他是个难以管教的年轻人，在你的犯罪现场打转，到处散布煽动性的言论，试图激怒你。

En: Cuno -- 'City of Rage'? 'Night City'? What's going on there? I'm intrigued.
Zh: “坤诺——‘怒之城’？‘夜之城’？发生什么了？我很感兴趣。”

En: Nooooo... The evil shit behind the fence hacks like she's coughing up a furball.
Zh: “不……”围栏后面的小东西就像在吐毛球似的。

En: I don't know what to do anymore... I'm just a busted old piece of meat. This case is all I have -- and you're not helping.
Zh: “我不知该如何是好了……我不过是一滩行尸走肉罢了。我只有这个案子了——你还帮不上忙。”

En: Like you don't have enough on your plate! You feel a sudden surge of self-pity coming on...
Zh: 就好像你快要吃不饱饭了！你突然感到一股自怜情绪涌上心间……

En: You told him about it and now he knows you're lame!
Zh: “你告诉他，现在他就知道你很土鳖了！”

En: The prospect of the Cuno turning lame is physically painful for her.
Zh: 坤诺即将变土鳖的前景对她来说仿佛切肤之痛。

En: The city's not fucking lame, *you* are lame! Cuno's tired of defending Rage City from... He waves his hands in the air. "Just fuck off, alright."
Zh: “那座城一点都不土鳖，*你*才土鳖！坤怒已经厌倦为怒之城辩护了……”他在空中挥动双手。“他妈的赶紧滚开好吗！”

En: And fuck you too, he adds, turning to you. "Putting Cuno on the spot like that. Cuno doesn't need to fucking *explain* his shit, Cuno's KING, he rules here -- fuck did you want?"
Zh: “你也去死吧，”他转向你补充到。“让坤诺陷入这等境地。坤诺他妈的不需要*解释*这种破事，坤诺是国王，他是这里的统治者——你他妈想要什么？”

En: Explain himself? As if... explaining some kind of *work*? Some kind of avant-garde work way ahead of its time?
Zh: 解释？就好像……解释某种*作品*吗？某种超前于时代的前卫作品？

En: I'm intrigued.
Zh: 我很感兴趣。

En: No. I'm not interested. I don't wanna *art*.
Zh: 不，我没兴趣，我不想要什么*艺术*。

En: You *must* get to the bottom of this, one of these days. Sadly, it's unlikely to happen today.
Zh: 你必须在这段时间里查明真相，遗憾的是今天是不太可能了。

En: Stop denying it. You want art all over you. You want to smear yourself in art, been dying to ever since you got up...
Zh: 别否认了。你想接受艺术的洗礼，完全沉浸在艺术中，从出生起就如此渴望着……

En: Fuck no! He bursts out loud. Laughing. "What are you, fucking... mentally handicapped?"
Zh: “当然不！”他突然爆笑。“怎么回事，你他妈……智障吗？”

En: Cuno, they've almost made you a snitch now...
Zh: “坤诺，他们快要让你变成告密者了……”

En: Ease off, C. Cuno always takes the bullet over the hammer. He nods, big-boy style, incredibly proud of himself.
Zh: “放轻松，坤妮。比起铁锤坤诺更喜欢子弹。”他点着头，一副大孩子的模样，感到非常骄傲。

En: He'd rather die than work with the justice system.
Zh: 他宁死也不愿配合司法系统工作。

En: Are you okay, Cuno? She looks worried. The *Cunn* has her confused.
Zh: “你还好吗，坤诺？”她看起来忧心忡忡的，那个*坤大人*把她弄糊涂了。

En: That went wrong. He took it as a compliment. Then he had a minor seizure.
Zh: 不对，他觉得这是一种恭维。随后他小小的痉挛了一下。

En: Normal is not what we got here. You've got to work with what you have for now.
Zh: 正常可不是我们能奢望的，你只能运用现有的一切了。

En: Smelling weakness. She loves it.
Zh: 觉察弱点，她的最爱。

En: You have no idea what to say now. You're just going to have to try to change the subject...
Zh: 你不知道现在该说些什么，只能试着转换话题……

En: Interesting. How?
Zh: 有点意思。怎么回事？

En: All in all, Cuno respects madness. You cannot hope to outdo her on that front. You must win yourself a few minutes with him alone.
Zh: 总而言之，坤诺喜欢疯言疯语。而在这方面你不能指望自己胜过她，所以必须争取和他独处几分钟。

En: Cunoesse is by far the worst of the two. Cuno has no problem being near you, but the other hides behind the fence, afraid for her life, like she's *done* something. Something very bad.
Zh: 坤妮斯才是两人中更糟心的那个。坤诺在你身边并没什么不自在，但躲在围栏后面的那个，一直在担心她的生命安全，就好像她*做*了什么非常糟糕的事一样。

En: Also, Cuno hasn't stopped talking to you. Even enjoys it from time to time. When you talk to the other one it's like talking to a cornered animal. She only hisses and says *murder* was the case that they gave her.
Zh: 此外，坤诺从未停止和你交流，甚至时不时地还有些享受。当你试图和另一个孩子说话时，就像在面对一头走投无路的野兽，她只会发出嘶嘶声，以及他们给她的任务就是*杀人*。

En: Also, Cuno hasn't stopped talking to you. Even enjoys it from time to time. When you talk to the other one it's like talking to a cornered animal. She only hisses and says something about *necks*.
Zh: 此外，坤诺从未停止和你交流，甚至时不时地还有些享受。当你试图和另一个孩子说话时，就像在面对一头走投无路的野兽，她只会发出嘶嘶声，以及一些关于*脖子*的话。

En: Also, Cuno hasn't stopped talking to you. Even enjoys it from time to time. When you talk to the other one it's like talking to a cornered animal. She only hisses.
Zh: 此外，坤诺从未停止和你交流，甚至时不时地还有些享受。当你试图和另一个孩子说话时，就像在面对一头走投无路的野兽，她只会发出嘶嘶声。

En: And then there's the fact that she's a girl. And appears to be a little younger, certainly smaller. And yet Cuno is afraid of her. What's up with *that*, Cuno?
Zh: 还有一点，她是个女孩。而且看起来很年幼，年纪肯定更小。然而坤诺却很怕她，这是*怎么*回事儿，坤诺？

En: She came up with that psychopathic scheme of screaming for help before. Cuno just wanted to talk to you about his name. Cunoesse was the one who wound him up and directed him.
Zh: 之前她就想出了那个变态的求救计划，而坤诺只是想跟你谈谈他的名字。坤妮斯才是那个给他下达指令的操纵者。

En: Fuck you whispering about? he whispers back.
Zh: “你他妈嘟囔什么呢？”他也低声回复道。

En: If Cuno wants to whisper, he's gonna fucking whisper, okay?! He turns back to you and hunkers down: "Let's *whisper*, pig!"
Zh: “如果坤诺想小声说话，他就会小声说话，明白吗？！”他转向你，蹲下来：“我们来说*悄悄话*吧，猪猡！”

En: He's whispering too. He's going with it. But watch what happens...
Zh: 他也像你一样，开始说悄悄话了。看看接下来会发生什么吧……

En: Fuck you *f****ts* whispering about?!
Zh: “*混蛋*你们他妈的在嘟囔什么？！”

En: She puts extra stress onto that word. Expecting it will make you uncomfortable.
Zh: 她重重地读出了那个词。希望这样会让你很不舒服。

En: This is it, you've got him. But be careful -- you can still fuck this up. Don't make Cuno look bad in this.
Zh: 就这样，你的机会来了。但是要小心——你还是有可能搞砸的。不要让坤诺难堪。

En: Cuno, listen to me -- she's trying to *control* you. We gotta get you outta here.
Zh: “坤诺，听我说——她想要*控制*你，我们得把你带出去。”

En: What's up with her? She's terrifying... Crazy scary.
Zh: “她是怎么回事？真是可怕……疯狂吓人。”

En: Phew, am I glad she's out of our hair. She's fucked up.
Zh: “唷，我真高兴她不能再烦我们了。她真是个麻烦鬼。”

En: Crazy? he whispers tensely. "You don't know the half of it. She's not crazy, she's insane. Dangerous. She smoked a man. She's done people in, probably even pigs..."
Zh: “疯狂？”他紧张地低语。“你真的什么都不懂。她不是疯狂，而是疯癫，危险。她点燃过一个男人，杀过人，甚至可能还杀过猪……”

En: She's not fucked up! He raises his voice, but then lowers it again. "Everyone's fucked up. Stop judging shit."
Zh: “她才不是麻烦鬼！”他提高了声调，很快又低下来。“每个人都是麻烦鬼，少对别人指指点点了。”

En: Stop talking to him! Cuno, I'm fucking warning you! You're gonna get us into shit!
Zh: “别跟他说话了！坤诺，我他妈警告你！你会让我们惹上一堆破事的！”

En: She understands what you're trying to do.
Zh: 她很明白你想做什么。

En: It's okay! He straightens his back and turns to Cunoesse. "The pig's trying to pit us against each other. Not gonna let him do that."
Zh: “没事的！”他挺直后背，面向坤妮斯。“这头猪想挑拨我们，我不会让他得逞的。”

En: Yo, C? He pops his head up. "Did Cuno not *tell* you?! Cuno told you -- CUNO TALKS TO WHOEVER HE WANTS."
Zh: “唷，坤妮。”他抬起头来。“坤诺没跟你说过吗？！坤诺说了——坤诺想跟谁说话，就跟谁说话。”

En: Talk, pig. Cuno's got it under control. He hunches down again.
Zh: 他又弯下腰。“说吧，猪猡。坤诺能掌控局势。”

En: You did it. They're separated. He's even turned his back to her so she can't read his lips.
Zh: 你成功了，他们分开了。他甚至背对着她，这样她就读不了唇语了。

En: Fuck, she can read lips? You should cup your mouth.
Zh: 该死，她会读唇语？你最好闭上嘴巴。

En: Wrong move. But he's whispering still. You haven't lost him, just don't mess up again, or you will. There are no guarantees here.
Zh: 失策了。但他仍在小声说话，你还没有失去他。但别再搞砸了，否则你将彻底失去他。谁也不能保证。

En: That's it. You let him off the line, that was a *bad*, manipulative thing to say. You should understand: I got you this far, I couldn't get you all the way.
Zh: 你应该明白：我已经带你走了这么远，但不会一直陪你走下去。

En: Idiot! You bungled it up.
Zh: 蠢货！你搞砸了！

En: Tried to fuck my Cuno! A giggle, malicious and gleeful. She pulls herself up higher on the fence. "Tried to fuck my Cuno away! Me and Cuno are tight. We ride for life!"
Zh: “想骗我的坤诺！”一阵咯咯的笑声，恶意又欢快。站在围栏后的她又往上窜了窜。“想把我的坤诺骗走！我和坤诺的关系可好了，我们是雌雄双煞！”

En: A chill comes over you. The wind from the Boulevard South, lashing you -- for trying to separate them. For trying to take the street out of Cuno.
Zh: 一阵寒意涌来，风从南部大道吹过，猛烈地抽打着你——怪你想把他们分开，想毁掉坤诺的街道。

En: Fuck knows -- she says it's the *song of her people* or some shit.
Zh: “鬼才知道——她说这是*她们族人的歌*什么的。”

En: Crazy people? The fucking *näkkies*? I don't know...
Zh: “一群疯子？该死的*女水妖*？我不知道……”

En: What people?
Zh: “什么族人？”

En: It's Suruese. The Suru are an indigenous ethnic minority in the social democratic powerhouse Vaasa, on the tundra and taiga covered isola of Katla. Far, far away from here -- as far as possible, really.
Zh: 苏鲁人。苏鲁人是社会民主主义大国瓦萨的原住民，聚集在被苔原和针叶林覆盖的卡特拉洲上。距离这里非常，非常——极其遥远。

En: Sounds *boreal*, like something from the tundra- and taiga- covered Katla isola. Far, far away from here -- as far as possible, really.
Zh: 听上去像*北边*，像是被苔原和针叶林覆盖的卡特拉洲。距离这里非常，非常——极其遥远。

En: Do they have red-haired people there?
Zh: 那里有红头发的人吗？

En: Cuno, could she be Suruese?
Zh: “坤诺，她会是苏鲁人吗？”

En: This isn't important right now.
Zh: 现在这个不重要。

En: You mean evil little red-haired people like her? Yes, they do -- the Suruese have that ginger gene.
Zh: 你是指像她这样的邪恶红毛小鬼？是的，当然——苏鲁人的确有姜黄色的基因。

En: Sure, interesting things aren't important. Only your cop thing is.
Zh: 当然，奇闻趣事并不重要，只有你的警察事务最重要。

En: Revachol does have a small Suruese community. Or she climbed into a yakberry crate and was shipped over accidentally.
Zh: 瑞瓦肖确实有个小小的苏鲁人社区，不然就是她爬进了一个醋栗集装箱，被意外地运了过来。

En: Suruese, like that Man-From-Hjelmdall shit? The kid lights up. "She could be... She could be that Hjelmdall shit."
Zh: “苏鲁人，像来自赫姆达尔的男人一样？”这孩子雀跃起来。“有可能哦……她有可能就像赫姆达尔那样。”

En: What's up with the näkkies? The *fisher-people*? That stuff?
Zh: “女水妖怎么了？*渔民*？那种东西？”

En: Yeah, I saw you get the *näkk* treatment... Dark shit, huh?
Zh: “是啊，我看到你去做*女水妖*治疗了……很黑暗吧，哈？”

En: The näkk-treatment?
Zh: “女水妖治疗？”

En: Back when you waved your gun and it went off -- she does the fisher-people-näkk thing when she's *way* in the red. On overdrive.
Zh: “之前你挥枪的时候，它爆炸了——当她*倒在*血泊里的时候。她做了那种渔民水妖之类的事。超速了。”

En: She used to say it all the time: näkk this, fisher-people that. Now she only says it when she's on the lightning. Or when guns go off.
Zh: “她总是在说：女水妖这个，渔民那个。现在她只会在嗑了闪电丸的时候说。或者是枪响的时候。”

En: What the hell is a *näkk*?
Zh: “*女水妖*是什么东西？”

En: Her people? She's one of them? Then she hates them. Then everyone's a *näkk* and she's trapped? Look...
Zh: “她们族人？她也是其中之一？然而她又很讨厌他们。那人人都是*女水妖*，她被困住了？看……”

En: It's none of our business. That's what a *näkk* is. Cuno keeps his nose to himself -- doesn't go poking around in *näkk* shit. Cuno's wise that way.
Zh: “这跟我们无关。那就是*女水妖*。坤诺才不会多管闲事——不会四处打探*女水妖*的闲事。坤诺可聪明了。”

En: She regresses and pretends she's a mythological creature when she's under too much stress.
Zh: 当她承受着太多压力时，就会退居幕后，假装自己是个神秘生物。

En: Cuno means she killed someone. That's right, C's a killer. He stares at you intently. "Like, actually a killer."
Zh: “坤诺的意思是她杀了人。没错，坤妮是个杀手。”他目不转睛地盯着你。“真正的，杀手。”

En: Cuno... do you think it's possible that she's killed other children?
Zh: “坤诺……你觉得她有没有可能杀了其他的孩子？”

En:
Really? Isn't she too small to overpower someone?	“真的吗？她想制服别人未免太小了一点。
0x01000082000069A9	Dialogue Text	YARD / CUNO BEFRIEND WC	You	You serious about this killing business?"
Zh: “杀人的事，你是认真的吗？”

En: What if she has, Cuno? That would explain things...
Zh: “万一她真的杀过呢，坤诺？那样就能说得通了……”

En: He's meant everything he said before; but right now he not only means it -- he is sincere.
Zh: 他之前说的一切都是真心话；但是现在他不仅仅是认真的——他还很真诚。

En: His little green eyes are fixed on yours.
Zh: 他那双绿眼睛紧盯着你。

En: Are you getting this? You think I'm fucking telling you a joke here? How hard do you think it is to kill a fat-ass? He pokes you in the gut. "Sweet talk 'em, then knife 'em."
Zh: “你听明白了吗？我他妈是在跟你开玩笑吗？你觉得要杀一个肥猪能有多难？”他戳着你的肚皮。“蜜语甜言，一刀致命。”

En: She's probably killed a pig too. I mean, I'm pretty sure she has.
Zh: “她可能还杀过一头猪呢。我是说，我很确定她杀过。”

En: Killing is serious shit. Cuno's always serious about the four-eighty-eight.
Zh: “杀人可是很严肃的事情，坤诺对于488这类事总是很严肃。”

En: Four-eighty-eight? The criminal code doesn't go higher than 190.
Zh: 488？刑法并没有超过190条。

En: Fuckin' yeah. Cuno knows you don't want to face this right now. This dark shit. Cuno faces this shit every day -- makes Cuno's skin crawl.
Zh: “当然啦！坤诺知道你现在不想面对这个。这种阴暗的破事。坤诺每天都要面对这种破事——让坤诺起鸡皮疙瘩了。”

En: C'mon. She hasn't killed police officers.
Zh: “拜托，她可没杀过警察。”

En: Okay. How many cops has she killed then?
Zh: “好吧，她杀过多少警察？”

En: A cop would be too large for her to overpower. But a determined child of her size can still kill the vulnerable. The elderly. The homeless. Or other... other children.
Zh: 警察的体格对她来说太大了，无法制服。但像她这么大的孩子仍然可以杀死弱者、老人、流浪汉、或者其他……其他孩子。

En: The creature peers at you both from over the fence. There is something searching in her eyes.
Zh: 那个生物从围栏背后看着你们。她的眼睛仿佛在搜索什么。

En: Fear.
Zh: 害怕。

En: Fear of the truth.
Zh: 害怕真相。

En: I knew you pigs were too naive for this shit. Good thing Cuno's got her under control. Cuno keeps her calm. He feels eyes on the back of his head -- and stops.
Zh: “我就知道你们这群猪猡太过天真，好在坤诺把她控制住了。坤诺会让她冷静的。”他感受到后脑勺上的视线——-然后停了下来。

En: There's something cold in the air. Like water lapping against cold stones. Or dripping. In a hallway nearby. Three years ago. There were shoes in the corner...
Zh: 空气中飘来一丝寒意，仿佛水在拍打着冰冷的石头，或是滴落下来。在附近的走廊，三年以前，角落里有双鞋子……

En: Forget Cuno said that. Cuno was just shitting. Cuno was just running his mouth. Cuno's stupid like that. He feels eyes on the back of his head -- and stops.
Zh: “忘了坤诺说的话吧，坤诺就是在吹牛。坤诺又在胡言乱语了，坤诺就是这么愚蠢。”他感受到后脑勺上的视线——-然后停了下来。

En: Though her friend spoke too low for her to hear, Cunoesse is not smiling anymore.
Zh: 尽管她朋友的声音小到她都听不见的程度，坤妮斯已经失去了笑容。

En: Cuno falls silent. He does not look at you when he replies...
Zh: 坤诺安静下来，回答的时候也避开了你的眼睛……

En: He usually looks you straight in the eye. A little something just crumbled there.
Zh: 他通常都会直视你的眼睛的，刚刚有样东西破裂了。

En: Cuno, uh... that's.... that's what Cuno is starting to think. Yeah.
Zh: “坤诺，呃……那个……坤诺也开始这么认为了，没错。”

En: Don't move your head. Just from the corner of your eye -- look at her.
Zh: 脑袋别动，就用你的余光——看着她。

En: Look at her.
Zh: 看着她。

En: Look at Cuno.
Zh: 看着坤诺。

En: The kid is just that now -- a kid.
Zh: 这孩子现在还是那样——毕竟只是个小孩。

En: Yeah, she would've liked to fuck him up. But she didn't. Cuno wasn't around. And C was with Cuno.
Zh: “是啊，她确实很想搞死他。但她没有。坤诺不在附近。而且坤妮是跟坤诺一起的。”

En: Look, Cuno's gonna put you at ease. We didn't do it.
Zh: “听着，坤诺可以让你安心。不是我们干的。”

En: Cuno wasn't around. And C was with Cuno. Told you this already.
Zh: “坤诺不在附近，而坤妮又跟坤诺在一起。已经告诉过你了。”

En: Where were you?
Zh: “你在哪儿？”

En: He speaks the truth, my liege.
Zh: 他说的是实话，大人。

En: Fuck no, she's not my sister. She's just a stray who got in. Like a mad dog or some shit.
Zh: “当然不是了，她不是我妹妹。她就是个混进来的流浪儿，像条疯狗似的。”

En: Yeah, she's psycho. He leans in even closer. "None of that kiddy-psycho, cat-burning shit -- she does the real deal."
Zh: “没错，她是个疯子。”他凑得更近了。“不是那种小儿科的疯狂，而是放火烧猫之类的——她是玩真的。”

En: What's the real deal?
Zh: “玩什么真的？”

En: Snuff radio shit... Believe me, pig, you don't wanna know.
Zh: “鼻烟电台什么的……相信我，猪猡，你不会想知道的。”

En: Let's leave it at that.
Zh: “就先这样吧。”

En: Whoa...
Yeah. He watches it sink in.
Zh: “是啊。”他看着你慢慢消化这一信息。

En: Yeah -- let's.
Zh: “是啊——就这样。”

En: And he doesn't want to even think about it. This isn't just another boast.
Zh: 而他甚至不愿意考虑一下。这绝对不是又一句大话。

En: Stray?
Zh: “流浪儿？”

En: Yeah, she was just there. He points at the apartment building behind the fence.
Zh: “没错，她就在那儿。”他指着围栏后面的公寓大楼。

En: She was in the hallway, dripping wet. Cuno flinches, then lowers his voice even more. "By the fucking shoe rack. In the dark."
Zh: 坤诺畏缩了一下，然后把声音放得更低了。“她当时就在走廊上，浑身都湿透了。站在该死的鞋架旁边，躲在黑暗中。”

En: What was that, Cuno? The little one twists her neck, looking at the building.
Zh: “你说什么坤诺？”小女孩歪着脖子，盯着那栋大楼。

En: Cuno's got no fucking idea. Her hair was all wet. I think she pissed on the floor too. She was there for three days -- in the corner. Every time Cuno went out.
Zh: “坤诺他妈的也不知道。她的头发全湿了，说不定还尿在了地板上。她在那里待了三天——就待在角落里。每次坤诺出去的时候都在。”

En: Why was she dripping wet?
Zh: “为什么她全身都湿透了？”

En: A shoe cupboard just off to the right? Have you been to this place?
Zh: 右边的鞋柜？你去过那里吗？

En: That hallway there, with the janitor's closet? (Point.)
Zh: “就在那个走廊上，看门人的壁橱旁边。”（指向。）

En: I don't know... someone left the door open. Cuno comes home and she's sleeping under the desk, under a pile of clothes. Like a dog.
Zh: “不知道……有人忘记关门了。坤诺回家就看到她睡在桌子底下，埋在一堆衣服下面。像条狗似的。”

En: You said she got in? How?
Zh: “你说她混进来了？怎么回事？”

En: What about your parents?
Zh: “你的父母呢？”

En: Someone left the door open? It was him. By accident or...
Zh: 有人忘记关门了？那个人就是他。是意外还是……

En: ...on purpose.
Zh: ……故意的。

En: Cuno's dad doesn't give a shit. Doesn't even see her there. Or thinks it's fucking Cuno... He points at himself. "Shit's all on Cuno."
Zh: “坤诺的爸爸才不在意呢。根本没注意到她的存在，不然就是把她当成坤诺了……”他指着自己。“总之都是坤诺的错。”

En: Cuno? Cunoesse? Two of a kind.
Zh: 坤诺？坤妮斯？两个都一样。

En: Why's she called Cunoesse then?
Zh: “那她为什么叫坤妮斯呢？”

En: Cos' she fucking looks like Cuno.
Zh: “因为她长得真他妈像坤诺。”

En: You don't know her name?
Zh: “你不知道她叫什么吗？”

En: No one knows her name, Cuno told you this shit was psychokiller.
Zh: “没人知道她的名字，坤诺告诉过你她是个疯子杀手了吧。”

En: No one knows her name. Cuno calls her C.
Zh: “没人知道她的名字，坤诺就喊她坤妮。”

En: Yeah that's the place. She was just balled up near the closet. Psycho-style.
Zh: “没错，就是那里。她就缩在壁橱旁边，疯子一样。”

En: You know this. The body goes into a kind of revulsion shock. Murder hangover. That's what it could've been.
Zh: 你很清楚。身体进入了一种排斥休克状态，谋杀后的宿醉效应，很可能是这种情况。

En: Murder hangover? From when she...
Zh: 谋杀后的宿醉效应？她从什么时候开始……

En: I don't want to know this.
Zh: 我不想知道这个。

En: ...killed a kid, yes. Makes them look for a quiet, dark place and just hibernate there. Usually goes on for a few days up to a week.
Zh: ……杀害孩童，是的。驱使他们寻找一个安静、黑暗的地方，在那里冬眠。通常会持续几天到一周时间。

En: Must have been her first one. You only get it on the first one.
Zh: 这一定是她第一次下手，只有第一次的时候才会这样。

En: I know you don't. But the thought still comes -- she was hibernating after doing it. Takes a moment to shake it out of your head...
Zh: 我知道你不想，但这种想法仍然出现了——她下手之后就去冬眠了。要从脑子里甩掉这种感觉，是需要花上一点时间的……

En: (Return to the conversation.) "You said she got in? How?"
Zh: （回到谈话中。）“你说她混进来了？怎么回事？”

En: I don't know... He looks at you suspiciously as you come out of your thoughts. "Someone left the door open. Cuno comes home, she's sleeping under the desk, under a pile of clothes. Like a dog."
Zh: “不知道……”当你从沉思中回过神，他怀疑地看着你。“有人忘记关门了。坤诺回家就看到她睡在桌子底下，埋在一堆衣服下面。像条狗似的。”

En: How are you dealing with all of this? (Conclude.)
Zh: “你是怎么处理这一切的？”（总结。）

En: How's Cuno *dealing* with this? Cuno's dealing with it just fine -- he doesn't need you fucking with this, waving your gun, mad dog shit... Cuno remembers what you did there.
Zh: “坤诺*做了*什么？坤诺做得很好——他根本不用你帮忙，挥着枪，一条疯狗……坤诺可还记得你都做了什么呢。”

En: How's Cuno *dealing*? Cuno's dealing just fine -- he doesn't need you fucking with any of it. C doesn't either.
Zh: “坤诺*做了*什么？坤诺做得很好——他根本不用你帮忙，坤妮也不用。”

En: Cuno's got this shit under control. He spits through the gap in his front teeth.
Zh: “都在坤诺掌握之中。”他从门牙缝中唾了一口。

En: She needs professional help. You can't do this alone.
Zh: “她需要专业帮助。你一个人做不了的。”

En: Okay, kid.
Zh: “好吧，孩子。”

En: Listen! Listen! He points to his eyes, then yours. "C is Cuno's go to; Cuno's protecting her. You fuck with C, you fuck with Cuno. You threaten her, you wave your gun around her *one more time*. Try to take her away..."
Zh: “听着！听着！”他指了指自己的眼睛，又指向你。“坤妮是坤诺的手下，坤诺会保护她。你招惹坤妮，就是招惹了坤诺。你再敢威胁她，*再*对她挥一次枪，要带走她…….”

En: Listen! Listen! He points to his eyes, then yours. "C is Cuno's go-to, Cuno's protecting her. You fuck with C, you fuck with Cuno. You threaten her, you threaten to take her away..."
Zh: “听着！听着！”他指了指自己的眼睛，又指向你。“坤妮是坤诺的手下，坤诺会保护她。你招惹坤妮，就是招惹了坤诺。你再敢威胁她，威胁要把她带走……”

En: Who are you kidding, kid? You can't take down a man several times your size. You'll end up dead yourself.
Zh: “你开什么玩笑，孩子？你是不可能打倒一个比你大好几倍的男人。你自己的小命都会赔进去的。”

En: Understood, Cuno.
Zh: “明白了，坤诺。”

En: Alright. He wipes the sweat off his brow. "Now we can do *business*."
Zh: “很好。”他擦去额头上的汗水。”现在我们可以谈*生意*了。”

En: Listen! Listen! He points to his eyes, then yours. "C is Cuno's go to; Cuno's protecting her. You fuck with C, you fuck with Cuno. You threaten her, you wave your gun around her *one more time*. Try to take her away..."
Zh: “听着！听着！”他指了指自己的眼睛，又指向你。“坤妮是坤诺的手下，坤诺会保护她。你招惹坤妮，就是招惹了坤诺。你再敢威胁她，*再*对她挥一次枪，要带走她…….”

En: No it's not okay. He points to his eyes, then yours. "C is Cuno's go-to, Cuno's protecting her. You fuck with C, you fuck with Cuno. You threaten her, you threaten to take her away..."
Zh: “不，这不好。”他指了指自己的眼睛，又指向你。“坤妮是坤诺的手下，坤诺会保护她。你招惹坤妮，就是招惹了坤诺。你再敢威胁她，威胁要把她带走……”

En: I am going to *kill* you. I'll run when you put the cuffs on her, sneak up on you later and fuck you up. You understand? The boy looks you in the eye, black pupils trying to focus…
Zh: 男孩看着你的眼睛，黑色的瞳孔努力想要聚焦……“我会*杀了*你的。等你给她戴上手铐的瞬间我就跑，然后再找机会接近你，干掉你。听明白了吗？”

En: This is what it all comes down to -- he needs you to take him seriously now.
Zh: 这一切归根究底——现在他需要你认真对待他。

En: He may not be able to do it, but he will try. Right now he believes he will.
Zh: 也许他做不到，但他一定会尝试。现在的他如此坚信着。

En: You made a big fucking mistake there. He steps back, breathing heavily. "A *huge* mistake. Say goodbye to all the *shit* Cuno would've hooked you up with. You and Cuno are done."
Zh: “你真是大错特错了。”他往后退了几步，喘着粗气。“一个*巨大*的错误。向坤诺帮你牵上的那些线索道别吧，坤诺跟你没什么好说的了。”

En: Professionally.
Zh: “专业的。”

En: Told you, you shouldn't *deal* with that f****t. The little one behind the fence sounds relieved. Light as air suddenly. "He's fucking nothing."
Zh: “告诉过你吧，你不应该和那个混蛋*打交道*的。”围栏后面的小孩听上去松了一口气，语调变得像空气一般轻盈。“他根本不是个东西。”

En: She won.
Zh: 她赢了。

En: I can respect that.
Zh: “我会尊重一点的。”

En: He's breathing heavily. That took something out of him.
Zh: 他喘着粗气，似乎也吐出了一些焦虑。

En: Business?
Zh: “生意？”

En: Yeah, what do you want? Cuno can hook you up with -- he starts, no longer whispering.
Zh: “没错，你想要什么？坤诺可以帮你牵线——”他开口道，不再低声细语了。

En: Don't hook him up with shit, Cuno!
Zh: “别给他牵什么线，坤诺！”

En: C, relax, he respects the Cuno. Cuno made him respect the Cuno. You respect the Cuno... He turns back to you. "You get all kinds of shit!"
Zh: “坤妮，放松点，他很尊重坤诺。坤诺让他对坤诺尊重一点，你也要尊重坤诺……”他面向你。“随便你开口。”

En: Remember when you tried to get Cuno to hook you up? We can get *on* that now, if you run a little errand for the Cuno. Me and you. Cuno's gonna hook you up with *illegal narcotics*.
Zh: “还记得你想让坤诺帮你牵线搭桥吗？如果你能帮坤诺大人办点小事，现在我们就可以*详谈*了。我和你，坤诺会帮你搞定*非法毒品*的。”

En: Cuno's gonna get you hooked on illegal narcotics, if you run a little errand for the Cuno -- get you *hooked*, pig. Get his hook in you. Then Cuno gonna get you hookin' for more. Cash in big-style. Pig hooker.
Zh: “坤诺会帮你搞定非法毒品的，只要你替坤诺大人办点小事——就帮你搞定，猪猡。等你拿到货，坤诺还会给你搞来更多。出手很阔绰哦，猪皮条儿。”

En: See, it's tension and release with Cuno. Now we releasin'. He pulls on his tracksuit trousers. "The pant buying shit. That's on now too. Ninety-percent discount for Cuno's pig. Cuno can flex."
Zh: “你看，坤诺就是这样有张有弛。现在我们可以放轻松。”他扯了扯自己的运动裤。“还有买裤子的事，现在也可以了。坤诺可以给他的猪仔打九折。坤诺能屈能伸。”

En: Cuno flexes for hobos. Cuno sees you're in need. He spreads his hands like a baker presenting the goods. A smile spreads across his flushed face.
Zh: “坤诺对流浪汉一向很好说话，坤诺知道你有需要。”他像展示货品的面包师一样摊开双手，涨红的脸上绽开了笑容。

En: And, shit, you can even fuck back in Cuno's kingdom! That fuckin' pile of eternite, he points to the back of the yard, "it's a secret door, okay?! Just pull it off and you can fuck into Cuno's shack." He concludes the invitation with a benevolent nod.
Zh: “而且，该死的，你甚至可以进入坤诺的王国了！那堆亘石，”他指向后院，“那是扇暗门，知道吗？把它拉开，你就能进去坤诺的棚屋。”他以善意的点头结束了邀请。

En: And, shit, you can even fuck back in Cuno's kingdom! Cuno saw you sniffin' around that fuckin' pile of eternite. It's a secret door, okay?! Just pull it off -- and fuck back in there. He concludes the invitation with a benevolent nod.
Zh: “而且，该死的，你甚至可以进入坤诺的王国了！坤诺看到你在那堆亘石周围翻来翻去了。那是扇暗门，知道吗？！把它拉开——就在门口面。”他以善意的点头结束了邀请。

En: He means the shack to the right of the greenhouse, with snow melting on the roof.
Zh: 他指的是温室右边的棚屋，屋顶上还有正在融化的积雪。

En: That's right. Cuno's a candy store for pigs now. Get ready to be rewarded, he concludes, spreading his hands like a baker presenting a selection of freshly baked pastries.
Zh: “没错，坤诺的大门向你敞开了，准备好接受奖励吧，”最后，他摊开双手，像个面包师在展示自己精心挑选的新鲜出炉的糕点。

En: About that shooting... I didn't mean to... It was only a warning shot.
Zh: “关于那次枪击……我不是那个意思……只是警告鸣枪而已。”

En: You need backup. I'm here for you.
Zh: “你需要支援，我是来帮你的。”

En: Do you remember how he looked?! Fucking growth hormone shit. He's a giant. The armour's too big for *any man*.
Zh: “你还记得他长什么样子吗？该死的生长激素，他就是个巨无霸。那副盔甲对*任何男人*来说都太大了。”

En: He drills his temples with his fingers in some strange, aggressive gesture. "Cuno doesn't give a shit about that freak armour. Cuno threw that shit away."
Zh: 他用手指在太阳穴处做出一种怪异的，咄咄逼人的姿势。“坤诺才不在乎那副奇怪的盔甲呢。坤诺把那破玩意扔了。”

En: You have no idea what the *usual* is. Just ask whatever comes to mind.
Zh: 你根本不知道*老一套*指的是什么，随便问问吧。

En: End of conversation. Very strong. You should be this stoic.
Zh: 谈话结束，非常强硬，你就应该这么坦然。

En: Yes. This troubadour has it. You can *feel* it.
Zh: 是的，就在这个游吟诗人手上，你能*感觉*到。

En: Remember Night City, pig fuck? Cuno was in fucking Night City getting shit *done*.
Zh: “还记得夜之城吗，猪猡？坤诺他妈的在夜之城*办事*呢。”

En: What the fuck, Cuno! Stop being so fucking lame!
Zh: “什么狗屁，坤诺！别他妈瞎逼逼赖赖的！”

En: Shitload, pig, what's your question?
Zh: “很多，猪猡，你有什么问题？”

En: You're testing Cuno's patience here.
Zh: “你这是在测试坤诺的耐心。”

En: Get lost, f****t!
Zh: “滚开，傻逼！”

En: More on this later. Right now let's talk about something else.
Zh: “稍后再详谈，现在我们来说点别的吧。”

En: Don't tell the pig shit, Cuno!
Zh: “什么都别告诉这头猪，坤诺！”

En: This is where you *quickly* ask him questions. Real cop-questions. Like a cop.
Zh: 你现在可以*迅速地*问他问题了。真正的警察问题。像个警察一样。

En: Fucking idiot *mulkkupää* doesn't know any questions.
Zh: “该死的白痴*混球*没问题了。”

En: I don't have questions.
Zh: “我没有问题了。”

En: (Whisper.)  "Kim, help me out here. What do we want to know?"
Zh: （耳语。）“金，帮个忙。我们想知道什么？”

En: If I were to want to waste my time -- which I do not -- I would ask them who he is, how he got there, and the *usual*.
Zh: “如果我打算浪费我的时间——虽然我并无此意--我会问他们是谁，怎么过来的，*老一套*。”

En: Pig's choking, he's totally choking!
Zh: “猪猡噎住了，他绝对噎住了！”

En: Uh...
Just a lone pig trying to sugar-talk some kids. That seems pretty fucking suspicious to Cuno.
Zh: “只有一头想要花言巧语套路小孩的猪，在坤诺看来就挺可疑的。”

En: Do you know how it got up there?
Zh: “你知道他是怎么上去的吗？”

En: Probably climbed? Cuno was busy *down the road* when that shit went down.
Zh: “大概是爬上去的？这玩意倒下的时候，坤诺正在忙*未来*的事呢。”

En: Told you, pig bacon. Cuno doesn't do regional. Cuno's been to places you wouldn't dream of.
Zh: “早就告诉你了，猪五花。坤诺不在这个地区，坤诺去了你做梦都想不到的地方。”

En: You didn't really leave the city. Where were you?
Zh: “你并没有真正离开这座城市，你在哪里？”

En: You heard Cuno -- Cuno wasn't even in Martinaise. Cuno wasn't in Revachol. He puffs himself up. "Cuno wasn't *regional*."
Zh: “你听到坤诺说的了——坤诺甚至都不在马丁内斯，也不在瑞瓦肖。”坤诺夸张地说。“坤诺不在这个*地区*。”

En: So you didn't see it happening?
Zh: “所以你没有目击这起案件？”

En: Where's the rest of his armour? Besides his cuirass. I got that.
Zh: “他剩下的盔甲哪去了？除了他的胸甲在我手上。”

En: Where's the rest of his armour?
Zh: “他剩下的盔甲哪去了？”

En: Have you seen anyone suspicious around?
Zh: “你在附近看到什么可疑的人了吗？”

En: Just a couple of pigs sniffing around in the dirt. That seems pretty fucking suspicious to Cuno.
Zh: “只有两头猪在泥地里嗅来嗅去的，在坤诺看来就挺可疑的。”

En: Yeah, you tell the *fägäri*, Cuno!
Zh: “没错，跟他们说*基佬*，坤诺！”

En: Oh, did Cuno make your shit-sniffing harder? Obstruction of shit-sniffing? He lets go of his head, suddenly feeling better. "This is Cuno's Kingdom. Cuno fucking rules here."
Zh: “哦，坤诺有没有让你办案更困难了？妨碍你办事了？”他放开了脑袋，突然感觉轻快了。“这里是坤诺的王国，坤诺他妈的统治这里。”

En: The lieutenant is sitting on the edge of his bed, twenty kilometres from here, and cleaning his boots. An archetypal policeman like him would *definitely* come up with some questions to ask right now. Unlike you, standing here alone, unable to gather your thoughts.
Zh: 警督正坐在距离这里二十公里远的床边擦拭他的靴子，像他那样专业的警察肯定能马上提出一些质疑。不像你，独自站在这里，头脑一片混乱。

En: Do you know who he was?
Zh: “你知道他是谁吗？”

En: Oh, okay. Where did you go then?
Zh: “哦，好吧。那你去了哪里？”

En: Cuno's fuck-gimp. He picks up a rock. "Cuno uses the fuck-gimp for target practice."
Zh: “坤诺的瘸子。”他捡起一块石头。“坤诺用那该死的瘸子练习准头。”

En: He's trying to hide the fact that he doesn't know.
Zh: 他试图掩盖他不知道的事实。

En: So you don't know anything.
Zh: “所以你什么都不知道。”

En: I meant who he *was*. Before he died?
Zh: “我指的是他是*谁*，在他死之前？”

En: Cuno knows all kinds of shit. Cuno's not a snitch, that's all. He shakes his head, clearly offended. "Tryin'a make the Cuno sing into the popophone..."
Zh: “坤诺什么都知道。但坤诺不是泄密鬼，仅此而已。”他摇了摇头，显然是生气了。“想让坤诺跟条子泄密……”

En: Cuno knows what you meant. Cuno's not a snitch, that's all. He shakes his head, clearly offended. "Tryin'a make Cuno sing into the popophone..."
Zh: “坤诺明白你是什么意思。但坤诺不是泄密鬼，仅此而已。”他摇了摇头，显然是生气了。“想让坤诺跟条子泄密……”

En: He could've just said he doesn't know.
Zh: 他本可以直接说自己不知道的。

En: Cuno *knows* shit. Cuno's not a snitch, that's all. He shakes his head, clearly offended. "Tryin'a make Cuno sing into the popophone..."
Zh: “坤诺当然*知道*。但坤诺不是泄密鬼，仅此而已。”他摇了摇头，显然是生气了。“想让坤诺跟条子泄密……”

En: You could've just said you don't know.
Zh: “直接说你不知道就行了。”

En: Okay.
Zh: “好吧。”

En: Yeah it's fucking okay! He throws the rock. It misses. "Gotta have a gimp for rock practice..."
Zh: “他妈的当然好了！”他扔了一块石头，但没打中。“必须得有个东西来练习扔石头……”

En: Don't ask the pigs for permission, Cuno. Don't ask the pigs for shit!
Zh: “不要向猪猡们征求许可，坤诺。别向猪猡们要任何东西！”

En: Okay. About the dead body...
Zh: “好吧，那具尸体……”

En: Yeah? Cuno didn't smoke him, if that's what you mean. He draws snot up his nose.
Zh: “什么？坤诺可没有烧他，如果你想问这个的话。”他把鼻涕吸了回去。

En: Thanks, Cuno. That's one name you can now cross off the list.
Zh: 谢了，坤诺。这个名字可以从名单上排除了。

En: Let's back up. This isn't going anywhere.
Zh: “我们回去吧，这样是行不通的。”

En: The buck-toothed gremlin lets go of his head. Looks like the attack has passed.
Zh: 长着龅牙的小地精松开了他的脑袋，看来疼痛已经过去了。

En: The pain of the word recedes, he's feeling better now. Further away from *education*.
Zh: 咬文嚼字的痛苦消散了，现在他感觉好多了。与*教育*相行见远。

En: Fucking Mesque, or I don't know. Some other place... Night City! Cuno was in fucking Night City.
Zh: “该死的梅斯克，或者我也不知道，其他地方……夜之城！他妈的坤诺在夜之城。”

En: The usual being "have you seen anything out of the ordinary" or "have you seen anything suspicious"?
Zh: 通常都是“你看到什么不寻常的事了吗？”或者“你看到什么可疑的东西了吗”？

En: Stop choking or everyone will see you're a fake! All this *thespianism* isn't doing you any good!
Zh: 别支支吾吾了，不然大家都会发现你是个冒牌货！这些*把戏*对你来说没有任何好处！

En: The kids are overwhelming you. Regain control of yourself and the situation.
Zh: 孩子们要把你击垮了，重新夺回你对自己以及这个局面的控制权。

En: I don't know, some fucking... He looks around, trying to come up with something.
Zh: “我不知道，该死的……”他环顾四周，想说出点什么来。

En: Mesque, or... or I don't know. Some other place... Night City! Cuno was in fucking Night City.
Zh: “梅斯克，或者……或者我也不知道，其他地方……夜之城！他妈的坤诺在夜之城。”

En: There is no Night City anywhere. That sounds like the name of a city in some pulp science fiction novel.
Zh: 根本没有什么夜之城，听起来就像是某本低俗科幻小说里的城市名字。

En: That's a fictional city name. Night City doesn't exist.
Zh: “那是小说里的城市名，夜之城并不存在。”

En: Where is Night City?
Zh: “夜之城在哪儿？”

En: Why you gotta be riding Cuno's ass? You haven't been where Cuno's been. You haven't been in Cuno's head.
Zh: “你为什么非得揪着坤诺不放？你又没去过坤诺去过的地方，你也看不到坤诺的大脑。”

En: The city's too large for him to have left. But he wasn't *here* either... So where was he?
Zh: 这座城市广阔到他不可能离开，但他也不在*这里*……那他能去哪儿呢？

En: You wanna know where Cuno was? You wanna know what Cuno's been fucking *up* to?
Zh: “你想知道坤诺去哪儿了？想知道坤诺他妈的打算*做*什么？”

En: Don't tell him that Cuno, it's lame!
Zh: “别告诉他坤诺，那太逊了！”

En: It's not fucking lame! Cuno's building Cuno's city -- Night City, Rage City, the City of Rage. That's it. And it's not lame!
Zh: “他妈的一点都不逊！坤诺在造自己的城——夜之城，怒之城，狂怒之城。就是这样，而且一点都不逊！”

En: What the hell *is* it about then? A city of toys? No, with this kid, it's probably made of cigarette butts. Or maybe sand and melting snow?
Zh: 那跟*什么*有关呢？一座玩具城？不，如果是这个孩子，很可能是烟头做的，或者是沙子和融化的雪？

En: This is a minor discovery. Don't let this Night City business clog up your mind. Proceed with your investigation. If it's really important, it will come up later.
Zh: 也算是个小发现，别让这座夜之城干扰了你的思绪。继续调查吧，如果这真的很重要，之后必定还会出现。

En: That's the name of Cuno's city, bitch! Get the fuck off Cuno's back. This shit ain't about that.
Zh: “那是坤诺的城市的名字，傻逼！从坤诺跟前滚开。这破事跟那个无关。”

En: Looks like you're a *fägäri* now, whatever that means. The *suspicious* question doesn't really work in antagonistic situations.
Zh: 看来你现在变成*基佬*，不管它是什么意思。这个*可疑*的问题在敌对的情况下根本问不出结果。

En: There are contusions all over his body. Did you do that?
Zh: “他全身都是挫伤，是你干的吗？”

En: Fuck are you talking about? What is this *con-tush-on* shit? He grabs his head like it's suddenly hurting.
Zh: “你他妈在说什么？*搓尚*是什么东西？”他抓着自己的脑袋，好像它突然痛了起来。

En: He says you're *stupid*, Cuno! They want to make you stupid again!
Zh: “他在骂你*笨蛋*呢，坤诺！他们想让你再次变成笨蛋！”

En: A contusion is a bruise. I'm talking about the marks your stones left on the corpse.
Zh: “挫伤就是一种淤伤，我是指你的石头在尸体上留下的痕迹。”

En: I hate words too.
Zh: “我也很讨厌咬文嚼字。”

En: He's thinking the kid has amassed quite the vocabulary of law-enforcement terms. But he's not going to stick his nose into this.
Zh: 他认为这个孩子已经积累了相当多的执法词汇，但他并不想深究。

En: Hmmm... you hear the lieutenant hum.
Zh: “哼……”你听到警督哼了一声。

En: Me and my partner are wondering, where did you pick up so many police terms?
Zh: “我和我的搭档都很好奇，你从哪儿学来的这么多刑侦术语？”

En: Proceed with the questioning.
Zh: 继续提问。

En: Me and *my* partner are wondering... The demonic hiss behind the fence gets louder. "Do you guys puff Peter?"
Zh: “我和*我的*搭档都很好奇……”围栏后面恶魔般的嘘声越来越响。“你们是基佬吗？”

En: Cuno erupts into laughter, pointing his finger at you, then Kim, then back at you...
Zh: 坤诺突然大笑起来，用手指着你，然后是金，然后又指向你……

En: An unfortunate choice of words, the lieutenant from Precinct 57 thinks. He looks downwind at the rotting corpse. He could use a cigarette right about now.
Zh: 用词不当，57分局的警督这么想着。他看着下风处那具腐烂的尸体，或许他现在得来一支香烟了。

En: An unfortunate choice of words, the lieutenant from Precinct 57 thinks. He looks at the harbour walls looming overhead. He could use a cigarette right about now.
Zh: 用词不当，57分局的警督这么想着。他望着头顶上若隐若现的港墙，或许他现在得来一支香烟了。

En: Good. That's what the lieutenant from Precinct 57 would have done as well.
Zh: 很好，57分局的警督也会这么做的。

En: Words are fucking shit, make you stupid! He spits on the ground. "Cuno's got his own words now -- Cuno-words."
Zh: “咬文嚼字什么东西，让你变得傻逼！”他往地上唾了一口。“坤诺现在有自己的语言了——坤言坤语。”

En: Has Cuno been to some kind of school? Probably a school for children with behavioural difficulties.
Zh: 坤诺有去过学校吗？可能是那种为行为有障碍的儿童开设的学校吧。

En: Cuno, shouldn't you be at school or something?
Zh: “坤诺，你不是应该在学校吗？”

En: I have behavioural difficulties too.
Zh: “我也有行为障碍。”

En: Better not to mention it.
Zh: 还是不提为妙。

En: Watch out, Cuno, he's trying to relate to you!
Zh: “小心点，坤诺，他想跟你拉关系呢。”

En: That's the past, pig. Cuno's not *there* anymore. Cuno did his time. He nods solemnly. "Now ask about that pig corpse shit and don't go sniffing into Cuno's past!"
Zh: “那是过去的事了，猪猡。坤诺早就不去*那里*，坤诺服过刑了。”他郑重地点点头。“快点问那具肥猪尸体的事，而不是打探坤诺的过去！”

En: Pigs come to take you back, Cuno! the hat-wearing fiend shrieks. "Tryin'a dig up dirt on you!"
Zh: “猪猡要把你接回去了，坤诺！”戴着帽子的恶魔尖叫起来。“想挖出你的丑事！”

En: Cuno doesn't give a shit about your handicap. Get a wheelchair or something. Cuno doesn't care.
Zh: “坤诺根本不关心你的残疾，自己去找架轮椅吧，坤诺不在乎。”

En: It's tough to tell, but he actually does... a little. He tilts his head to the right, reassessing you in the light of your bad ass learning disability.
Zh: 很难说，不过他确实有……一点。他把头歪到右边，依照你传说中的学习障碍重新评估着你。

En: How is that better? At least get back to the corpse then.
Zh: 这样有更好吗？至少先扯会到尸体身上。

En: Cuno gives this info out on a need-to-know basis. And *you* don't need to know. He draws snot up his nose. "Cuno didn't smoke the gimp, if that's what you meant."
Zh: “坤诺只会提供需要知道的信息，而*你*并不需要知道这个。”他把鼻涕吸了回去。“坤诺可没烧那个瘸子，如果你想问这个的话。”

En: Lame!
Zh: “土鳖！”

En: It's impossible to deduce what it *is* about, at least for the moment. If it's important, it'll come up later. Focus on the case.
Zh: 根本无法推断出它与*什么*有关，至少现在不行。如果这真的很重要，之后必定还会出现，还是关注眼前的案件吧。

En: Yes, that's what I'm saying. You're stupid.
Zh: “是啊，我就是这个意思，你也太蠢了。”

En: Cuno lets go of his head. "Get the fuck out of here, calling Cuno stupid? Pigs come to Cuno for guidance, then say he's stupid? The fuck is up with that?"
Zh: 坤诺松开了他的脑袋。“给我滚出去，说坤诺蠢？猪猡过来寻求坤诺的指导，现在倒是说坤诺很蠢了？这他妈的算怎么回事？”

En: They're lost without you, Cuno! They need you. You're in control of this!
Zh: “没有你他们就完蛋了，坤诺！他们需要你，一切都在你的掌控之中！”

En: Why don't you figure your shit out yourself -- before you come to *Detective Cuno* for help?
Zh: “不如你自己去想办法吧——在你向*坤诺警探*寻求帮助之前。”

En: Hmmm... maybe we should. The lieutenant raises an eyebrow.
Zh: “嗯……或许我们确实需要这么做。”警督挑起了眉毛。

En: Got told by a twelve-year old. Here's a tip for the future: If you wanna win an argument, wait for my sign. Don't just go barging in.
Zh: 被一个12岁的孩子说教了。给你一个未来的小贴士吧：如果之后你想赢得辩论，一切听我指示，不要如此莽撞。

En: That fuck-gimp had one thing majorly wrong with him -- he's a fucking mutant.
Zh: “那该死的瘸子最大的毛病就是——他是个该死的异端。”

En: Cuno's fuck-gimp's got one big thing wrong with him. He's a fucking mutant.
Zh: “坤诺那该死的瘸子有个大毛病，他是个该死的变种人。”

En: Shoot that shit at Cuno.
Zh: “有什么破事，跟坤诺讲。”

En: How come?
Zh: “怎么会？”

En: Okay, another question then.
Zh: “好吧，换个问题。”

En: Cuno doesn't give a shit about the armour.
Zh: “坤诺根本不关心什么盔甲。”

En: A mutant?
Zh: “一个变种人？”

En: Look at him! He points to the body. "Fucking growth hormone shit. He's a giant. The armour's too big for *any man*."
Zh: “你看他啊！”他指着尸体。“该死的生长激素，他就是个巨无霸。那副盔甲对*任何男人*来说都太大了。”

En: Oh, come on. He's just pretending that he doesn't care because he's too small for the armour.
Zh: 哦，得了吧。他不过是假装不关心那副盔甲罢了，因为他太小了，穿不了。

En: He drills his temples with his fingers in some strange, aggressive gesture. "Cuno doesn't give a shit about that freak armour. Cuno threw that shit away."
Zh: 他用手指在太阳穴处做出一种怪异的，咄咄逼人的姿势。“坤诺才不在乎那副奇怪的盔甲呢。坤诺把那破玩意扔了。”

En: You're just too small for the armour.
Zh: “是你太小了，穿不了盔甲吧。”

En: What do you mean you *threw it away*?
Zh: “什么叫你*把它扔了*？”

En: You threw it in the sea?
Zh: “你把它扔进海里了？”

En: Who do you mean, troubadour?
Zh: “游吟诗人，指的是谁？”

En: Get the fuck out of here, tryin'a fuck on me with that midget shit? Cuno's twelve! He's huge! He squints at you.
Zh: “你他妈给我滚出去，想说侏儒什么的挑衅我吗？坤诺已经十二岁了！非常高大！”他眯着眼睛看你。

En: What are you... fucking eighty? When Cuno's eighty, Cuno can fit four of you in Cuno! Fuck outta here!
Zh: “你他妈……八十岁了吗？等坤诺八十岁的时候，坤诺就会有四个你这么大！他妈的快滚！”

En: Trying to fuck on Cuno? Fuck outta here!
Zh: “你他妈想挑衅坤诺吗？快他妈的滚！”

En: Cuno tried to get the helmet on. It was too big. He performs a kick-off on the imaginary helmet.
Zh: “坤诺试穿了一下头盔，它太大了。”他对着想象中的头盔踢了一脚。

En: Cuno kicked that shit in the sea. Rugby style. That shit means *nothing* to Cuno.
Zh: “坤诺把那玩意踢到海里去了，就像打橄榄球一样。那玩意对坤诺来说*没有任何价值*。”

En: Yeah, that shit means *nothing* to Cuno, he repeats. "Cuno doesn't give a shit about material shit. Cuno's a fucking monk!"
Zh: “没错，那玩意对坤诺来说*没有任何价值*，”他重复着。“坤诺根本不追求物质的东西，坤诺他妈的是个和尚！”

En: You wanna fuck on someone 'bout that armour? Go fuck the moustached Union fuck -- the jolly troubadour shit at the gates.
Zh: “你想找跟这副盔甲有关的人的茬吗？就去小胡子工会呗——大门口有个快活的游吟诗人呢。”

En: Yeah, Cock-in-Boots. You know that jolly Union cow fucker? Came around talking about cows or some shit. Came around pretendin' like he cares about cows.
Zh: “是啊，穿靴子的鸡。你知道快活工会有个奶牛傻瓜吗？到处说着奶牛什么的蠢话，总是装模作样很关心奶牛的样子。”

En: Yes, you met him at the gates. The one with the boots and the jolly smile.
Zh: 没错，你在门口见过他。穿着靴子，面带愉快的笑容的那个。

En: He means Mañana, the laid-back striker at the gates.
Zh: 他在说马列拉，大门口那个懒散的罢工者。

En: So yeah, he's the one you wanna talk to. He's fucking crazy about that armour shit. Coming here, pretending like he likes cows, tryin'a catch a peep at Cuno's armour... Go to the gates -- ask him yourself.
Zh: “那就是了，他就是你要找的人，对那该死的盔甲完全着了魔。他过来这里装出一副喜欢牛的样子，想偷看一眼坤诺的盔甲……去大门那里——自己去问他吧。”

En: You mean Mañana?
Zh: “你是指马列拉？”

En: Yeah, he's the one you wanna talk to. He's fucking crazy about that armour shit. Coming here, pretending like he likes cows, tryin'a catch a peep at Cuno's armour.
Zh: “没错，他就是你要找的人，对那该死的盔甲完全着了魔。他过来这里装出一副喜欢奶牛的样子，想偷看坤诺的盔甲。”

En: Curious, my liege. Why did Cuno feed you this information?
Zh: 真是怪了，大人。坤诺为什么把这个消息告诉您呢？

En: And you're just telling me this out of the kindness of your heart, Cuno?
Zh: “你是出于好心才告诉我这个消息的吗，坤诺？”

En: Let it be.
Zh: 随他吧。

En: Yeah, Cuno's doing charity today. Cuno Day. Cuno feels *sorry* for you two loser-pigs. Cuno's doing pity now.
Zh: “没错，坤诺今天大发慈悲了，今天是坤诺慈善日。坤诺很为你们俩失败者难过，坤诺觉得你们好可怜。”

En: Yes, pray pardon, sire! Better to let it be. I did not mean to make you paranoid.
Zh: 是的，请您原谅，大人！就随他去吧，我并非有意想让您生疑的。

En: Still, seems suspicious... He may have it in for that guy. Or you may be paranoid. That is also a possibility, sire.
Zh: 不过，还是很可疑……他或许是对那家伙心怀恶意。或者您太多虑了，这也是有可能的，大人。

En: Yeah, Cuno's doing charity today. Cuno Day. Cuno feels *sorry* for you, loser-pig. Cuno's doing pity now.
Zh: “没错，坤诺今天大发慈悲了，今天是坤诺慈善日。坤诺很为你这个失败者*难过*，坤诺觉得你们好可怜。”

En: The fuck about it?
Zh: “妈的什么事？”

En: You mean Plaisance from the bookstore?
Zh: “你是说书店里的普莱桑斯？”

En: See? It wasn't that hard, pissmidget!
Zh: “看到了？没有那么难的，臭小鬼！”

En: He means the bookstore -- we have to ask... He checks his notes. "*Plaisance* is the mother of the little girl peddling books on the plaza. We have to ask Plaisance, in the store."
Zh: “他指的是那间书店——我们需要……”他看了一眼记录。“*普莱桑斯*是那个在广场上卖书的小女孩的母亲，我们需要去书店，问问普莱桑斯。”

En: Yeah, I already tried that. It's not that easy.
Zh: “是啊，我已经试过了。没那么简单。”

En: Then try again! Cuno's not your brain slave, think for yourself, pig!
Zh: “那就再试一次！坤诺又不是你的军师，自己动脑子想想吧，猪猡！”

En: Yes, he means the Doomed Commercial Area.
Zh: 是的，他指的正事那片即将消失的商业区。

En: How do I get *in* the building again?
Zh: “你再说一遍怎么*进入*那座大楼？”

En: Through the book-store. You gotta beg the book-bitch. Used to be you could get in there through the doorbell, jam that shit. Bookbitch changed that. Cuno doesn't beg -- so Cuno doesn't go there anymore.
Zh: “通过书店，你得去求求那个书呆子。在此之前你本可以按门铃进去，再堵住门，但书呆子动了手脚。坤诺是绝对不求人的——所以坤诺再没去过那里了。”

En: Beg the book-bitch?
Zh: “求书呆子？”

En: Yeah. Book-bitch. Beg her. You stupid or something?
Zh: “是啊，书呆子，去求她，你是蠢还是怎么的？”

En: He means the bookstore -- we have to ask the proprietor of the bookstore.
Zh: “他指的是那间书店——我们需要书店老板的帮助。”

En: See? The 'clard gets it, he says with a nod. "Listen to your four-eyed friend."
Zh: “看到了吗？四眼仔都明白了，”他点着头说道。“听你四眼朋友的话吧。”

En: Why don't we go pester some other kids now? he says impatiently.
Zh: “为什么我们不去纠缠其他的孩子呢？”他不耐烦地说。

En: Maybe you should ask these things from other, more well mannered kids the next time. Hmm...
Zh: 也许下次应该去找其他更有礼貌的孩子问问题。嗯……

En: Hmm... That's actually not such a bad idea. Kids do see stuff.
Zh: 嗯……这的确是个不错的主意，孩子们能看到很多事情。

En: Don't fuck it up, you *need* a fridge.
Zh: 别搞砸了，你*急需*一台冰箱。

En: A cold comes over you as you glance behind him -- at the crumbling colossus there, casting a shadow on you.
Zh: 你向他身后一瞥，便有一股寒意袭来——在摇摇欲坠的巨像面前，投下了你的阴影。

En: A white bear? A polar bear?
Zh: 一头白色的熊？一头冰熊？

En: Impressive note-keeping, lieutenant.
Zh: 非常令人惊艳的记录，警督。

En: That doesn't mean anything.
Zh: “那没有任何意义。”

En: Just trust me. He'll sympathize if he realizes you could actually lose your job over this.
Zh: 相信我就行了。如果他知道你会因此丢掉工作，一定会同情你的。

En: By killing in his territory, someone has *openly challenged* Cuno. It's in his best interest to put them in their place.
Zh: 在他的地盘上杀人，是有人在*公然挑衅*坤诺。把他们绳之以法也是对他很有利的事情。

En: Yes, I see it. The big tall one behind you.
Zh: “是的，我看到了。你后面那个大高个。”

En: You mean the Doomed Commercial Area?
Zh: “你是指那片即将消失的商业区吗？”

En: Fine, Cuno... *Don't* help me then. (Back off.)
Zh: “行吧，坤诺……*不用*你帮忙了。”（退后。）

En: You gotta get in that shit. He points again. "In there *deep*."
Zh: “你得进去那鬼地方。”他又指了一次。“*深入*进去。”

En: Whatever, don't fuck back at the Cuno. He makes a sudden discarding motion. "You gotta get *in* that shit. In there deep."
Zh: “随便你，别再来骚扰坤诺了。”他做了一个突然的丢弃动作。“你得进去那鬼地方，深入进去。”

En: I was in there already.
Zh: “我已经进去了。”

En: Ah, I didn't check the basement when I was there...
Zh: “啊，我进去的时候忘记查看地下室了……”

En: And you didn't notice the fucking *ice bear* fridge? The kid scoffs. "Pig, you need a new pair of eyes. This is fucking embarrassing."
Zh: “你也没注意到那该死的*冰熊*冰箱？”这孩子嘲讽着。“猪猡，重新换一对眼睛吧，可太他妈丢人了。”

En: You didn't hear it from Cuno, pig. He looks at you seriously. "But don't forget where you heard it from."
Zh: “你不是从坤诺这儿听到的，猪猡。”他严肃地看着你。“但你自己别忘了。”

En: Cuno knows all kinds of shit. Cuno gets *around*.
Zh: “坤诺什么都知道，坤诺*无所不知*。”

En: I've lost almost everything, Cuno. My memory, my money, even my name... I *can't* lose my job too! Please, PLEASE help me...
Zh: “我几乎失去了一切，坤诺。我的记忆，我的财产，甚至我的名字……我*不能*再失去这份工作了！求你了，帮帮我坤诺……”

En: Listen to Cuno -- *always* check the basement. He nods solemnly and crosses his arms. "Cuno always checks basements. Deep style."
Zh: “听坤诺的——*永远*都要记得检查地下室。”他双臂交叉，郑重地点头。“坤诺总是检查地下室，深入检查。”

En: There's a giant fridge down there. Fuck-gimp will fit, no problem. He nods confidently. "It looks like a white bear or some shit. Try not to piss yourself when you see it."
Zh: “下面有一个巨大的冰箱，放下这个该死的瘸子，完全没问题。”他自信地点头。“看上去像只冰熊之类的东西，看到它的时候可别尿裤子了。”

En: Don't pay attention to him. Just keep telling your sad story.
Zh: 别理他，继续诉说你的悲惨遭遇吧。

En: All right. Cuno hears you. See that shit house over there? He points to the collapsed building with the bookstore.
Zh: “好吧，坤诺知道了。看到那边那个破房子了吗？”他指向书店旁边坍塌的建筑。

En: The fuck are you doing right now? He looks at you suspiciously. "The fuck is this shit?!"
Zh: “你他妈在干什么呢？”他疑惑地瞪着你。“这是什么鬼？！”

En: Cuno's clock's not doing shit. He looks at his wrist. "Cuno's got a fuckload of time."
Zh: “坤诺的表坏了。”他看着手腕。“坤诺有一大堆时间呢。”

En: For the fuck-gimp? Good thing you asked The Cunmeister. He nods, trying to look older. "Cuno knows a fridge, perfect for freezing f****ts."
Zh: “装那个死瘸子？幸好你问了坤大统领。”他点点头，试图让自己看起来老成一点。“坤诺知道一个冰箱，最适合用来冷冻混蛋了。”

En: Thanks, Cuno. (Conclude.)
Zh: “谢了，坤诺。”（总结。）

En: Kid, this is *serious*. My job is on the line. If I don't get this sorted, I might actually get fired...
Zh: “孩子，这很*严重*。我的工作已经岌岌可危了，如果我不解决这个问题，很可能会被解雇的……”

En: Cuno's a poor kid from a poor neighbourhood. Say your job is on the line. He'll sympathize.
Zh: 坤诺是个来自贫民区的穷孩子。不如说你的工作快要不保了，他会同情你的。

En: I thought you would! Where is it?
Zh: “我就知道你可以！在哪儿呢？”

En: Really? I don't believe it.
Zh: “真的假的？我不信。”

En: Where can I find this perfect fridge, then?
Zh: “那么哪里才能找到这个完美的冰箱呢？”

En: Uhm... The lieutenant's eyes flash behind his glasses. "It's not *that* dramatic. We can just send the body to Processing..."
Zh: “呃……”警督的眼睛在镜片后一闪而过。“不至于*如此*戏剧性，我们可以直接把尸体送去分析部门……”

En: Baconman's in a rush. But what's in it for the Cuno? He crosses his arms. "What's the return on Cuno's investment?"
Zh: “猪五花很着急，但坤诺能有什么好处呢？”他交叉着双臂。“坤诺的投资回报是什么？”

En: Some arrogant shit thinks he can kill in the Cuno's kingdom, without asking the Cuno first? That sounds like lawlessness to me.
Zh: “某个傲慢的白痴以为他们可以未经坤诺大人允许，就在坤诺王国随意杀人？依我看来这根本是无法无天。”

En: Cuno's got everything Cuno needs. All civics and shit.
Zh: “坤诺已经拥有他需要的一切了，公民什么的。”

En: A dark flame smoulders in Cuno's eyes as he ponders your argument -- wordless. Like kings do.
Zh: 当坤诺考量着你的辩解时，一团黑暗的火焰在他眼中熊熊燃烧着——无言地沉默，如同国王一样。

En: Convince *the Cuno* to spill the beans.
Zh: 说服*坤诺大人*透露消息。

En: Buds with Cuno.
Zh: 跟坤诺称兄道弟。

En: Humbled yourself.
Zh: 降低姿态。

En: *Civic pride*, Cuno.
Zh: “*公民尊严*，坤诺。”

En: Kind sir, I'll repay you for this information one day. Right now the clock is ticking.
Zh: “好心的先生，总有一天我会报答你的。现在时间不等人啊。”

En: A corpse-free yard. Don't you have civic pride?
Zh: “一个没有尸体的院子，你难道没有公民尊严吗？”

En: Wasn't going to. He waves you off. "Cuno's not into bacon-charity."
Zh: “坤诺也没这个打算。”他挥手让你走开。“坤诺对猪肉慈善事业没兴趣。”

En: What do you mean *in there deep*?
Zh: “*深入进去*是什么意思？”

En: Check the fucking basement, pig. Don't you know anything? The kid rolls his eyes. "Always check the fucking basement. Recon style."
Zh: “你他妈的去看地下室啊，猪猡！你什么都不懂吗？”那孩子翻了个白眼。“永远记得要检查地下室，有点侦查的样子。”

En: Don't believe him, Cuno! He just wants to use your fridge!
Zh: “不要相信他，坤诺！他只想用你的冰箱！”

En: You can't turn Cuno into your little popo-man! Cuno's his *own* man!
Zh: “你不能把坤诺变成你的警界小帮工！坤诺是个*独立*的人！”

En: You can't buy Cuno, pig! Cuno's already got everything!
Zh: “你是收买不了坤诺的，猪猡！坤诺什么都有了！”

En: He doesn't know what that means. Talking about *civics and shit* didn't make this any easier.
Zh: 他不知道那是什么意思。跟他说*公民什么的*并不会让事情变得轻松。

En: There's nothing on his wrist.
Zh: 他的手腕上空无一物。

En: This outlaw's fate is in your hands. Let's make an example of him. Help me *locate* him using fridge-body technology.
Zh: “这个亡命之徒的命运就掌握在你的手中，我们来杀鸡儆猴吧。运用冰箱尸体冷冻技术帮我*定位*到他。”

En: Cuno owns you now, pig! You're Cuno's property!
Zh: “现在你属于坤诺了，猪猡！你是坤诺的所有物！”

En: Cuno's never seen anything so lame... he says mostly to himself. "Listen, pig... If you were Cuno, the fuck would you care?"
Zh: “坤诺从来没见过如此土鳖的东西……”他多半是自言自语。“听着，猪猡……如果你是坤诺，你会在乎吗？”

En: You're right, Cuno -- if I were Cuno, I probably wouldn't care...
Zh: “你说得对，坤诺——如果我是坤诺，可能也不会在乎吧……”

En: This isn't about me, Cuno, it's about the people I'm trying to help. It's too late for me anyway...
Zh: “这不是关于我，坤诺，是关于我想帮助的人。反正对我来说已经太迟了……”

En: Stop shitting yourself in front of the Cuno. Cuno thought you were some kind of big shit, what is this...
Zh: “少他妈在坤诺面前胡言乱语了！坤诺就知道你是个大混蛋，什么鬼……”

En: See, Sadshit... He turns curiously patient and explains: "Cuno doesn't fucking care about this sad shit. *Your* sad shit."
Zh: “看到没，可怜虫？……”他突然奇异地耐心解释道：“坤诺一点也不关心这个可怜虫，*你的*可怜虫。”

En: Now how about you at least try to entertain the Cuno -- or get the fuck off his crime scene?
Zh: “你至少要试着来取悦坤诺吧——不然就从他的犯罪现场滚开？”

En: Now is the time to be humble. Say the *sir* thing.
Zh: 是时候恭敬一点了，用上*先生*之类的吧。

En: So not sure about this. Asking for *class solidarity* seems naive in this case.
Zh: 我对此不太确定。在这种情况下要求*阶级团结*似乎过于天真了。

En: Can't you see his hair is red -- the colour of social democracy?
Zh: 没看到他红色的头发吗——社会民主的代表色啊？

En: Aren't social democrats traitors?
Zh: 社会民主党不都是叛徒吗？

En: Not all of them. Social democrats have their hearts in the right place. Some of them can be valuable *allies* if you turn them.
Zh: 不完全是。社会民主党人的内心是正义的。如果你能改变他们，他们中的一些人就会成为你重要的*盟友*。

En: Am I sure about this? Sounds sort of weak...
Zh: 确定吗？听上去好弱……

En: No, it's not weak. It's sincere. Do not confuse sincerity with weakness. Say it. Trust me.
Zh: 不，一点都不弱，而是真诚。别把真诚和软弱混为一谈，说出来，相信我。

En: If you don't tell me, I'll have to go ask other people, and that will take too long... The body is decomposing...
Zh: “如果你不告诉我，我就得去问别人，那要花很长时间……尸体已经开始腐烂了……”

En: But you see, he says slowly, savouring every word, "Cuno *wants* for it to decompose. Cuno digs that cadaver shit."
Zh: “但你要知道，”他慢吞吞地说着，仔细斟酌每一个字眼，“坤诺*想*让他腐烂，坤诺很喜欢尸体之类的哦。”

En: Go fuck off and ask someone else! Cuno's not gonna snitch, he likes corpses!
Zh: “滚去问别人吧！坤诺是不会告密的，他喜欢尸体！”

En: This isn't working at all, you lied to me, Golden Mouth Man.
Zh: 这根本没用，你骗了我，金口男。

En: You just haven't done it long enough. You need to do it even longer.
Zh: 只是因为你做得还不够久，你得继续。

En: The Golden Mouth Man is a liar. He can't be trusted, sire. He only wants to humiliate you.
Zh: 金牙男就是个骗子，不值得您信任的，大人，他想要羞辱您。

En: Paranoid whisperings. He is not trying to humiliate you. He just doesn't know better.
Zh: 妄想的私语。他并不是想要羞辱你，他只是没有更好的办法了。

En: See, I'm not trying to humiliate you. I just don't know any better. Say it!
Zh: 看到没，我并不想羞辱你。只是没有更好的办法了，说出来。

En: No, it's the Face Blob who's trying to humiliate you. Why does he speak like that? Why can't he speak like a normal person?
Zh: 不，大花脸才想羞辱你的人。为什么他会那样说话？为什么他不能像正常人一样说话？

En: Oh... that's right, Cuno is a killer entrepreneur and a visionary. He doesn't like this begaroo *shit*.
Zh: 哦……这就对了。坤诺是个杀手贩子，一个有远见的人。他才不喜欢这种该死的*玩意*。

En: He just has *no* heart and *no* sympathy for the cause. It's not your fault.
Zh: 他既*没有*同理心也*没有*同情心，这不是你的错。

En: So he knows locusts are bugs.
Zh: 所以他知道蝗虫是一种昆虫。

En: There's a suspicious shack in the eastern corner of the yard...
Zh: 院子东角有一个可疑的小棚屋……

En: So that's what this is about.
Zh: 原来是这么回事。

En:
I was really hoping it would be the reed-phasmid that ate the locusts. Not you, Cuno.“	“我真心希望是芦苇竹节虫把蝗虫吃掉了。而不是你，坤诺。”
0x010000060001EF99	Dialogue Text	YARD / CUNO LOCUSTS	Cuno	Yeah, well... Cuno's all you got, bitch."
Zh: “是啊，呃……你只有坤诺了，婊子。”

En: So it wasn't the phasmid... a wave of disappointment washes over you.
Zh: 所以不是竹节虫……失望的情绪朝你泼了一头冷水。

En: You should listen to your friend, Cuno. Art's lame as hell.
Zh: “你应该听你朋友的话，坤诺。艺术真的土爆了。”

En: ARRRRGH, CUNO! It's so lame even the *pig* knows it's lame. Please, stop!
Zh: “嗷，坤诺！真的是土鳖到*猪*都知道它土爆了，快停下吧！”

En: Yeah, whatever.
Zh: “随便吧。”

En: There's definitely something going on here. Maybe he's got them stashed somewhere nearby, in some hidden place?
Zh: 这里面肯定有蹊跷。也许他把它们藏在这附近某处隐蔽的地方了？

En: There's definitely something going on here. Maybe he's got them stashed somewhere nearby, in some hidden place?
Zh: 这里面肯定有蹊跷。也许他把它们藏在这附近某处隐蔽的地方了？

En: I am who I am, C, fuck you!
Zh: “我就是我，坤妮，去你的吧！”

En: Cuno's not gonna say anything without his lawyer present.
Zh: “没有律师在场的话，坤诺什么都不会说的。”

En: Yeah, he says slowly, meeting your gaze with sullen defiance. "Cuno took the bugs. So what?"
Zh: “是啊，”他慢吞吞地说着，用阴沉的、蔑视的目光打量着你。“坤诺拿走了虫子，怎样？”

En: You say you don't *give a fuck about bugs*, then you go and build a whole bug town.
Zh: “你明明说过*根本不关心虫子*，转头又建造了一座虫子城。”

En: Why steal locusts? Couldn't you find some other pets?
Zh: “为什么要偷蝗虫？你不能找一些别的宠物吗？”

En: It's not Bug Town, it's the *City of Locusts*, he says, enunciating every syllable. "Locusts aren't just bug-shit. They come out of the sky like a fucking shadow. Shit *descends*."
Zh: “不是虫子城，是*蝗城*，”他一字一顿地说道。“蝗虫可不是一般的虫子，它们好像暗影一样从天而降。*降临*到这里。”

En: Stoooooop! she wails from behind the fence, then buries her face in her hands.
Zh: “闭嘴！”她在围栏后面哀嚎起来，然后用手捂着脸。

En: Locusts coming down like a shadow... This must be the *Night City* he mentioned when you asked him where he's been.
Zh: 蝗虫像暗影一样从天而降……这一定是你问他去了哪里时，他提到的*夜之城*。

En: (Point at the shack.) "So that, in there, is Night City?"
Zh: （指向棚屋。）“所以，那个里面，就是夜之城？”

En: So this is the city you kept talking about.
Zh: “所以这就是你一直在说的城市咯。”

En: You stop! It's like they're fucking *night*. Locust City, Night City. City of Rage...
Zh: “你才闭嘴！他们就是该死的*夜晚*。蝗城，夜之城，怒之城……”

En: Yeah. Locust City -- City of Rage, City of Lights...
Zh: “没错，蝗城——怒之城，夜之城..“

En: They're not pets. Sounds like you've offended him. "Don't you know what locusts *are*, when they come out of the fucking sky? Fuckin' *descend* and shit."
Zh: “它们可不是宠物。”听起来你冒犯到他了。“你不知道蝗城是*什么*吗，当它们从天空中冒出来？他妈的*降临*到这里。”

En: Stooooop! she wails from behind the fence, then covers her face with her hands.
Zh: “闭嘴！”她在围栏后面哀嚎起来，然后用手捂着脸。

En: You stop! It's like they're *night*. Locusts are like this *huge shadow*...
Zh: “你才闭嘴！它们就好像*夜晚*，蝗虫就如同*巨大的暗影*……”

En: The girl forces herself to watch again, the corners of her eyes twitching from discomfort.
Zh: 女孩强迫自己再看了一眼，她的眼角因为不适而抽搐着。

En: What are you, some kind of *artist* now?
Zh: “你是什么人，某种*艺术家*吗？”

En: City of Rage sounds like a cool place.
Zh: “怒之城听起来很酷。”

En: Cuno, the pig wants to *help* you... she moans. "That's how lame it is. Please just don't say you're --"
Zh: “坤诺，这头猪想要*帮*你……”她呻吟道。“未免也太土鳖了，千万别说你是——-”

En: An *artist*? He pushes his chest out. "Maybe I *am* an artist? You hear that everyone, I'm a fucking *artist* now."
Zh: “一个*艺术家*？”他挺起了胸膛。“说不准我*就是*一个艺术家呢？大家都听见了吗，我他妈是个*艺术家*了。”

En: Maybe I *am*, he says, looking you straight in the eye...
Zh: “说不准我*就是*呢，”他直视着你的眼睛说道……

En: Hold on, did I hear you right? You said 'I'.
Zh: “等等，我没听错吧？你说的是*我*。”

En: (Nod.) "Making art is a worthy calling. I'm something of an artist myself."
Zh: (点头。)“创造艺术是个非常有价值的职业，我本人也可以算得上是个艺术家了。”

En: That's great, Cuno. It's cool to make art.
Zh: “很不错嘛，坤诺。玩艺术很酷哦。”

En: Cuno made Cuno. Cuno says whatever the fuck he wants! There are no *rules* here, pig. He steps closer...
Zh: “坤诺创造了坤诺，坤诺想说什么就说什么！根本没有任何*规则*，猪猡。”他逼近了几步……

En: OH MY GOD, CUNO! He's gonna make you totally lame in, like, three seconds! Don't let him, Cuno!
Zh: “我的天哪，坤诺！他会在，大概三秒之内让你变成一个超级大土鳖！别让他得逞了，坤诺！”

En: Yo, fuck you, C. Cuno can be what Cuno wants to be. Cuno's his own man, Cuno's *free*! He tears at the buttons of his shirt, trying to rip them open. They don't give way.
Zh: “去你的吧，坤妮。坤诺会变成坤诺想要的模样，坤诺只属于自己，坤诺是*自由*的！”他扯着衬衫纽扣，妄图把它们撕开，可惜未能如愿。

En: Don't make yourself into a pig, Cuno. You'll have to take me away... A leaden silence fills the yard.
Zh: “别把自己变成一头猪啊，坤诺。你得把我带走……”院子里弥漫着沉闷的寂静。

En: In it, you hear snow melting, dripping from the eaves. Someone closing a window.
Zh: 在那里，你听到了积雪消融，从屋檐上滴落的声音。有人正在关窗户。

En: Oh c'mon, no one is coming to take you away.
Zh: “哦得了吧，没人会把你带走的。”

En: Without a word she disappears entirely behind the fence.
Zh: 她一句话也没有说，彻底消失在了围栏后面。

En: I have to ask -- what does the City of Locusts *mean*?
Zh: “我不得不问一句——蝗城是*什么意思*？”

En: I need you to stop taking locusts from the traps. The cryptozoologists are trying to find something very important. Those locusts are bait.
Zh: “我希望你别再从陷阱里捉蝗虫了。神秘动物学家们正在找一些非常重要的东西，那些蝗虫就是诱饵。”

En: For once, the boy is lost for words. He's turned completely red now, with splotches of white beginning to appear across his face.
Zh: 破天荒的，这个男孩无话可说了。他的脸完全涨红了，脸上开始冒出白色的斑点。

En: You got him. Now convince him to leave the cryptozoologists' traps alone.
Zh: 你抓到他了。现在劝说他不要再去破坏神秘动物学家的陷阱。

En: What's going to happen to the locusts? (Nod toward the shack.)
Zh: “那些蝗虫会怎么样呢？”（朝棚屋点点头。）

En: It don't mean anything. It's shit. Cuno just likes to focus. Cuno likes to concentrate on shit, build shit when he's zipping hard. Fuck... He turns his burning face up to the falling snow.
Zh: “什么意思也没有。这是屎。坤诺只是喜欢专注。坤诺喜欢专注在拉屎上，拉屎的时候屁股夹的很用力。妈的……”他转过滚烫的脸，看着飘落的雪花。

En: It don't mean anything. It's shit. Cuno just likes to focus. Cuno likes to concentrate on shit, build shit when he's zipping hard. Fuck... He turns his burning face up to the falling rain.
Zh: “什么意思也没有。这是屎。坤诺只是喜欢专注。坤诺喜欢专注在拉屎上，拉屎的时候屁股夹的很用力。妈的……”他转过滚烫的脸，看着飘落的雪花。

En: It don't mean anything. It's shit. Cuno just likes to focus. Cuno likes to concentrate on shit, build shit when he's zipping hard. Fuck... He turns his face up to the heavens.
Zh: “什么意思都没有。那就是一坨屎。坤诺只是很专注。坤诺喜欢专心搞些小东西，造个什么东西出来，在压力大的时候。该死……”他把脸转向天空。

En: I don't give a shit, I don't need the locusts anyway. Shit is all lame now. He turns toward the fence. "C was right."
Zh: “我才不在乎呢，反正我也不需要那些蝗虫，都已经变土鳖了。”他转向围栏。“坤妮说的对。”

En: The girl's face appears again above the fence, just long enough to make eye contact with Cuno.
Zh: 女孩的脸再次出现在围栏上方，刚好能和坤诺进行眼神交流。

En: Cuno's gonna let the fucking locusts die.
Zh: “坤诺打算看着那些该死的蝗虫死掉。”

En: Okay, now that that's settled, I'd better be off. (Conclude.)
Zh: “好吧，既然已经搞定了，我也该走了。”（总结。）

En: The fuck are they trying to catch anyway? he asks before you leave. "With the traps?"
Zh: “他们究竟要抓什么玩意？”他在你离开之前问了一句。“用那些陷阱？”

En: The Insulindian phasmid.
Zh: “伊苏林迪竹节虫。”

En: Huh... he mutters to himself.
Zh: “哼……”他喃喃自语。

En: He recognizes the name.
Zh: 他听说过这个名字。

En: Pig, he says finally, lowering his gaze to meet yours, "you really shouldn't have fucked with Cuno's city. Now it's all fucking lame."
Zh: “猪猡，”他垂下眼睛迎上你的视线，最后说道。“你真的不应该乱动坤诺的城市，现在都变土鳖了。”

En: She doesn't know whether to be glad because Cuno's finally convinced of the lameness... or  *more* worried, because of his continued use of the first-person singular. Cuno is Cuno. Not *I*.
Zh: 她不知道是该高兴，因为坤诺终于听从了她的土鳖理论……或者*更像是*担心，因为他还在继续使用第一人称。坤诺就是坤诺。不是*我*。

En: Wait, you know what the Insulindian phasmid is?
Zh: “等等，你知道伊苏林迪竹节虫是什么吗？”

En: Bitches think Cuno doesn't *know* shit... he says angrily. "The fuck outta here, Cuno's tired of this shit."
Zh: “贱人们以为坤诺很*无知*呢……”他生气地说道。“滚出去，坤诺受够了。”

En: Later, Cuno.
Zh: “回见，坤诺。”

En: The fuck outta here... he says, not entirely convinced of himself. "Cuno's tired of this shit."
Zh: “滚出去……”他自己也不是很确信地说道。“坤诺受够了。”

En: That depends on the choices *you* make, young girl.
Zh: “这完全取决于*你的*选择，女孩。”

En: Use this momentary confusion to take *control* of the situation.
Zh: 利用这一时的混乱来*控制*局面。

En: No. Cuno doesn't give a fuck about bugs.
Zh: “没有，坤诺根本不关心虫子。”

En: Oh my god. The little one seems distraught. "I told you that shit is lame!"
Zh: “我的天哪。”那个小东西似乎很伤心。“我告诉过你那个混蛋超级土鳖了吧！”

En: Shut up, C!
Zh: “闭嘴，坤妮！”

En: Now they're gonna take you to lame-prison!
Zh: “现在他们要把你送进土鳖监狱了！”

En: She sounds like she's about to cry out of disappointment at Cuno's newfound lameness.
Zh: 听起来她好像要因为对坤诺新发现的土鳖过于失望而哭出来了。

En: Now hold on, no one is lame here... just tell me what happened?
Zh: “等一等，这里谁都不土鳖……告诉我究竟发生了什么？”

En: What's this about?
Zh: “这是怎么回事？”

En: You kids are in trouble.
Zh: “你们这些小孩有大麻烦了。”

En: Deny everything, Cuno! You need to lawyer up!
Zh: “什么都别承认，坤诺！你需要一个律师！”

En: Cuno's not gonna say anything without his lawyer present.
Zh: “没有律师在场的话，坤诺什么都不会说的。”

En: *Lame...* That rings some bells... Could this be connected to Night City -- a.k.a. the *City of Rage*?
Zh: *土鳖……*有点耳熟……这会不会与夜之城有关呢——又名为，*怒之城*？
