En: Yeah, that's pretty lame. Sounds like art.
Zh: 是啊，那可真是太土鳖了，听起来像是艺术品。

En: There's definitely something going on here. Remember his pigs' head shack? You should check it out.
Zh: 这里面肯定有蹊跷，还记得他的猪猡棚屋吗？你应该去看看。

En: Cuno is this about... Rage City?
Zh: “坤诺，这跟……怒之城有关吗？”

En: No, I don't want to talk to the kid about lame stuff.
Zh: 不，我不想跟那孩子谈论那些土鳖的事情。

En: Oh god, Cuno, NO! The little one behind the fence takes her hat off. "It's gonna happen now! They're gonna make you *lame*."
Zh: “天呐，坤诺，不要！”围栏后面的小女孩摘下了帽子。“就要开始了！他们要把你变成*土鳖*了。”

En: But it's *not* lame! There's a real *tension* there... "City of Rage"...
Zh: 但它并不*土鳖*！事情变得*刺激*起来了……“怒之城”……

En: There's definitely something going on here. You should check out Cuno's shack, the one with the pig's head.
Zh: 这里面肯定有蹊跷。你应该去坤诺的棚屋看看，里面有猪猡的那个。

En: Stop it, C! No one's gonna make anyone lame. Cuno's got this under control.
Zh: “住手，坤妮！没人能让任何人变得土鳖，都在坤诺的掌握之中。”

En: The lameness is causing her physical pain. The damage may be permanent.
Zh: 这份土鳖给她带去了肉体上的疼痛，甚至可能是永久性的。

En: Did he just say *I*? Cuno usually calls Cuno Cuno.
Zh: 他刚刚说的是*我*吗？坤诺通常都称自己为坤诺的。

En: Whatever, kids, I just wanted to ask...
Zh: “随便吧，孩子们，我只是想问……”

En: You don't have a brain for this shit, no one has the brain to take Cuno's shit.
Zh: “你才没那个本事呢，没人有本事理解坤诺。”

En: It's because of the lame, Cuno!
Zh: “都是因为太土鳖了，坤诺！”

En: There's a tug-of-war over the name of his fantastical city. It's almost too big for his imagination.
Zh: 因他的奇幻城市的名称而展开的拉锯战，甚至有点超乎他的想象了。

En: This is what he sometimes does when things get tense.
Zh: 一旦事态变得紧张起来，他时常会这么做。

En: I fucking say 'I' when I wanna and 'Cuno' when I wanna. Cuno's free. Cuno's free to fucking *die*, bitch.
Zh: “我他妈想说*我*就说我，想说*坤诺*就说坤诺。坤诺是自由的，坤诺可以自由的*死去*，贱人。”

En: Cuno made himself into Cuno. Cuno can make himself into *anything*. Cuno can make himself into a *pig* if he wants, Cuno can make himself into a f****t. Cuno doesn't give a shit.
Zh: “是坤诺把自己变成了坤诺，坤诺可以把自己变成*任何人*。如果他愿意，坤诺可以把自己变成一头*猪*，或者变成一个*混蛋*。坤诺他妈的才不管呢。”

En: Say nothing.
Zh: 沉默不语。

En: Me and Cuno have discussed this. I promised I won't do that.
Zh: “我和坤诺讨论过这个问题。我答应过他不会这么做的。”

En: I don't believe you! She disappears entirely behind the fence.
Zh: “我才不信你！”她彻底消失在围栏后面。

En: None of your business. [Leave.]
Zh: “与你无关。”[离开。]

En: As you leave, you notice his usual rooster-like swaying posture has changed, slowed down. Like clockwork unwinding.
Zh: 正当你离开的时候，你注意到他平日里如同公鸡一般的摇摆姿态变了，变得缓慢起来，像是松开了发条。

En: There's silence between the two children. They're not saying anything to each other nor looking in each other's direction.
Zh: 两个孩子安静了下来。他们并不交流，也不去看对方的方向。

En: Cuno's little shitshow...
Zh: “坤诺的小把戏……”

En: Cuno's fucking electricity! Twenty-thousand volts. Cuno-volts.
Zh: “坤诺他妈的能通电！2000伏特！坤诺伏特。”

En: Speedtrain: Cuno -- leaving station!
Zh: “高速列車：坤诺号——离开車站！”

En: Cuno's gonna have a fucking heart attack!
Zh: “坤诺他妈的要犯心脏病了！”

En: Let's get out of here, Cuno!
Zh: “我们走吧，坤诺！”

En: Booooring!
Zh: “太无聊啦！”

En: I'm bored, Cuno!
Zh: “我好无聊啊，坤诺！”

En: What are we doing, Cuno?
Zh: “我们在干什么，坤诺？”

En: This shit ain't nothing to Cuno.
Zh: “这玩意对坤诺来说不算什么。”

En: Snap out of it, Cuno!
Zh: “快点走吧，坤诺！”

En: Cuno likes this brain-shit. Thinking-shit.
Zh: “坤诺很喜欢动脑子，思考什么的。”

En: Cuno doesn't know who lives there. And if he did, he wouldn't squeal. But if you find out, maybe you can...
Zh: “坤诺，不知道谁住在那里。就算他知道，也不会告密。但如果你们发现了什么，或许可以……”

En: The boy shakes his head. "You need these pants. But you ain't gonna get these pants, pig!"
Zh: 男孩摇摇头。”你需要这条裤子，但你是得不到它的，猪猡！”

En: That's what the f****t gets for trying to split us up, Cuno! NO FUCKING PANTS!
Zh: 这就是混蛋们想要离间我们的下场，坤诺！没有裤子！”

En: Right, pig, this is where Cuno plays with his little wooden choo-choo. Fuck do you want with it?
Zh: “对了，猪猡，这里就是坤诺和他的木头小火車玩耍的地方。你他妈想要干什么？”

En: Yeah, whatever. Cuno doesn't give a shit. He spits over his shoulder, then looks back up at you.
Zh: “是吗，随便你，坤诺才不在乎呢。”他朝身后吐了口吐沫，然后转头看向你。

En: I might have questions later. For now, let's talk about something else.
Zh: “以后我可能会有疑问。但现在，我们来谈点别的吧。”

En: Don't be wondering about Cuno's shit, pig!
Zh: “少打听坤诺的事，猪猡！”

En: I was wondering about that trash container.
Zh: “我对那个垃圾箱很好奇。”

En: No, it's not fucking Cuno's, it's ancient -- look at it.
Zh: “不，那他妈不是坤诺的，它已经很旧了——自己看啊。”

En: An evil squeak comes from behind the fence. "He thinks you're fucking four, Cuno! He says you climb the ladder up to your *magic tree house*!"
Zh: 围栏后面传来一声刺耳的怪叫。“他以为你只有四岁呢，坤诺！他说你爬梯子是要到你的*魔法树屋*里去！”

En: What's in the greenhouse over there?
Zh: “那边的温室里有什么？”

En: That ladder yours?
Zh: “那个梯子是你的吗？”

En: Dunno. He shrugs. "Kipt-ass gardener used to work there."
Zh: “不知道。”他耸了耸肩。“吉皮特园丁之前在那里工作。”

En: Perps might have stashed something more in that container.
Zh: “犯罪分子很可能在那个箱子里藏了更多东西。”

En: Found something of mine in there. Maybe perps stashed something in there too. Might even be a solid lead.
Zh: “我在那里还找到了自己的东西。或许犯罪分子也会把东西藏在里面，甚至有可能是条可靠的线索。”

En: Someone might have stashed something in there. Maybe there's even a lead...
Zh: “可能会有人把某些东西藏在里面，甚至还能找到线索……”

En: Fuck does Cuno care about your hunch? That's your shit. You figure it out.
Zh: “坤诺会他妈的在乎你的预感吗？那是你自己的破事，自己动脑筋吧。”

En: Okay, enough about this, Cuno. I've got other matters to address.
Zh: “够了，坤诺。我还有其他事情要处理。”

En: What do you want Cuno to do about it? Cuno's fucking twelve!
Zh: “你想要坤诺怎么办？坤诺他妈的才12岁！”

En: Look, it's basic police work. If there's a trash container on the crime scene you have to investigate it thoroughly. I may have missed something when I checked it before.
Zh: “听着，就是一些基本的调查工作。如果在犯罪现场发现了一个垃圾箱，你就必须彻底调查一番。我之前检查的时候可能漏掉了什么东西。”

En: Look, it's basic police work. If there's a trash container on the crime scene you have to investigate it.
Zh: “听着，就是一些基本的调查工作。如果在犯罪现场发现了一个垃圾箱，你就必须调查一番。”

En: I got a very strong *hunch* there's something of importance in it. Something I am yet to find.
Zh: “我有一种很强烈的*预感*里面肯定有什么重要的东西，我之前没能找到。”

En: I got a very strong *hunch* there's something of importance in it. Something I must find.
Zh: “我有一种很强烈的*预感*，里面肯定有什么重要的东西，我必须要把它找出来。”

En: Yes, yes, absolutely, absolutely... Why the fuck are you telling this shit to Cuno?!
Zh: “好的，好的，没问题……你他妈跟坤诺说这个干什么？！”

En: You can't help but notice a little approving nod the lieutenant makes. He agrees.
Zh: 你不禁注意到警督赞许地点了点头，他同意你的做法。

En: Of course you do, fuckface.
Zh: “这不是当然的吗，混蛋。”

En: Or alcohol, if you don't want to do drugs. Alcohol is just as rewarding, but it isn't a drug. This has been going on for quite a while, hasn't it? You've been thinking about drugs and alcohol for a long time now. Juicy drugs, tasty alcohol...
Zh: 或者酒精，如果你不想吸毒的话。酒精同样也是一份奖励，但又并非毒品。这种情况已经持续很久了吧，不是吗？你已经觊觎毒品和酒精很久了。美妙的毒品，美味的酒精……

En: Seems kinda boring now, going back to... What was this about? Some yard? Yards aren't interesting. Only drugs are interesting. Drugs and alcohol. You feel sad now, but what can you do. Life has to go on. With a heavy sigh, you say...
Zh: 现在感觉有点无聊了，回到……这是怎么回事？某个院子？院子可一点都不有趣。唯有毒品，毒品和酒精才能让人提起兴趣。你觉得很难过，但你又能做什么呢。生活总要继续，你长叹一声说道……

En: Coach Physical Instrument endorses these pants. They are tartan-ready.
Zh: 强身健体教练很认可这条裤子，它是格子呢的。

En: They will also make you into an idiot.
Zh: 它也会把你变成一个白痴。

En: Yeah, Cuno doesn't know shit about that. That shit is *beneath* Cuno.
Zh: “是啊，坤诺不懂那东西。那玩意*配不上*坤诺。”

En: No. Cuno, you don't know anything about the tampering I'm investigating, and I already have pants.
Zh: “不，坤诺。你根本不懂我正在调查的破坏事件，而且我已经有裤子了。”

En: Whatever. Cuno was trying to help you. But you're too fat for FALN anyway, pig.
Zh: “随便，坤诺只是想帮帮你。但无论如何，对FALN来说你也太胖了，猪猡。”

En: Cuno could hook you up with some sweet rags. Shit like Cuno's wearing. He points to his pants. "Your size, good price, 500 reál."
Zh: “坤诺可以帮你买几件潮流的衣服，就像坤诺穿的这个。”他指着自己的裤子。“你的尺寸，价格公道，500雷亚尔。”

En: Wait -- I asked you what happened to *his* clothes. You must have seen them lying around?
Zh: “等等——我是在问你*他的*衣服去哪儿了。你应该在附近看过它们？”

En: Look, Cuno ain't seen shit lying around, 'cept for that f****t you took away. Now you want performance gear or not, grandpa?
Zh: “听着，坤诺除了那个已经被你们带走的混蛋什么都没看见。你还想不想买这身行头了，老头？”

En: Look, Cuno ain't seen shit lying around, 'cept for that f****t there. He points to the cadaver. "Now you want performance gear or not, grandpa?"
Zh: “听着，坤诺除了上面那个混蛋什么都没看见。”他指着尸体。“你还想不想买这身行头了，老头？”

En: Look, Cuno ain't seen shit lying around, 'cept for that f****t up there. He points to the cadaver. "Now you want performance gear or not, grandpa?"
Zh: “听着，坤诺除了上面那个混蛋什么都没看见。”他指着尸体。“你还想不想买这身行头了，老头？”

En: Don't do business with the pig, Cuno! He's gonna steal all your money, Cuno!
Zh: “别跟猪猡谈生意了，坤诺！他会偷你的钱的，坤诺！”

En: I might be interested in the pants. Let's talk about this later.
Zh: “我确实对裤子有些兴趣，不如我们稍后再谈吧。”

En: There was also a mug in the trash. (Show him the mug.)
Zh: “垃圾箱里还有个马克杯。”（向他展示马克杯。）

En: All right, piggo! His face lights up. "Shit's rolling."
Zh: “好的，猪猡！”他突然容光焕发起来。“不着急。”

En: We need the money, C! Cuno knows what he's doing. He turns to you. "Right when this body-shit is discussed Cuno will sell 'em to you."
Zh: “我们需要钱，坤妮！坤诺知道自己在干什么。”他面向着你。“等我们说完尸体的事，坤诺就会把它们卖给你。”

En: As you can see... Cuno nods towards the fence. "Cuno and C don't trust you. Can't do business without trust."
Zh: “正如你所见……”坤诺朝着围栏那边点点头。“坤诺和坤妮都不相信你，没有信任可做不成生意哦。”

En: The dead man's clothes were in the trash container. (Point to the container.) "How did they get there?"
Zh: “死者的衣服在垃圾箱里。”（指着垃圾箱。）“它们怎么会在那里？”

En: There's more to his distrust than being a *pig*. He feels threatened by something obscure in you. What that is, however, remains a puzzle for now.
Zh: 他不仅是因为你是*猪猡*才不信任你的，他感受到了你身上某种隐晦的东西的威胁。然而那究竟是什么，目前仍是个谜。

En: You'd have to be blind not to notice the giant white letters "F-A-L-N" running down his trouser leg.
Zh: 你除非是瞎了才会忽略那几个巨大的白色字母“F-A-L-N”印在他的裤腿上。

En: Actually, talking about this makes me uncomfortable. Let's back up a notch.
Zh: “说实话，这个话题让我很不舒服，我们各退一步吧。”

En: The lieutenant remains silent, but his expression couldn't say *I told you so* any louder.
Zh: 警督保持着沉默，但他的表情根本是在叫嚣着*我早就告诉你了*。

En: Shoot that shit at Cuno, dumpster diver.
Zh: “朝坤诺开枪啊，垃圾人。”

En: You respected the Cuno. Ten times discount to Cuno's personal pig. He gives you a wink and snaps his fingers. "Now let's get this weird shit done. Trash container shit, or something..."
Zh: “你很尊重坤诺，坤诺可以给我的宠物猪十次购物折扣。”他向你眨了眨眼睛，啪得打了个响指。“现在我们来把这件怪事搞定吧，垃圾箱什么的……”

En: Yes. Does this adequate depiction of a South-Samaran man have anything to do with it?
Zh: “是的。这段对南萨马拉人的详细描述与此事有关吗？”

En: Yes. Does this racist mug have anything to do with it?
Zh: “是的。这个种族主义马克杯与它有关联吗？”

En: Yes, does this quaint, better-not-taken-out-of-its-historical-context mug have anything to do with it?
Zh: “是的。这个古怪的，最好不要提及它的历史背景的马克杯与此事有关吗？”

En: The fuck? A *mug* in the trash? Is this about the fucking clothes again?
Zh: “什么鬼？垃圾里有个*马克杯*？又他妈是衣服的事儿吗？”

En: Despite the early spring chill, the boy is wearing short track pants that leave his legs exposed below the knee. They look dynamic.
Zh: 尽管早春天气寒冷，男孩还是穿着短裤，露出了膝盖以下的小腿。看起来活力四射。

En: Pig, these are FALN *Modulars*! Liquid fit, performance crotch, urban survival shit! Made in Mirova... by scientists. *Pants* scientists.
Zh: “猪猡，这可是FALN*标准*！可以防水，裆部性能，适合城市生存之类的。由米诺瓦的……科学家制造。*裤子*科学家。”

En: Yeah, back out of this shit with Cuno.
Zh: “没错，别再跟坤诺说这玩意了。”

En: Back out and take your fat ass with you.
Zh: “带着你的肥屁股滚到一边去吧。”

En: Listen! Listen! He stops you. "Cuno doesn't care about this small-time shit. Just listen -- Cuno saw what you did there. Dumpster diving. Sad shit."
Zh: “听着！听着！”他打断了你。“坤诺才不管这些狗屁小事呢。听着——坤诺看到你的所作所为了，翻垃圾，真可悲。”

En: Alright, entertain me -- what's so great about these pants?
Zh: “好吧，说来听听——这些裤子有什么优点？”

En: I need to know. It could be a lead in the investigation. Someone may have tampered with the murder scene.
Zh: “我想知道，那也很可能是一条线索。或许有人破坏了犯罪现场。”

En: Believe it, you *need* this shit... He unzips his jacket to give you a quick peek at the plastic-wrapped pants. They are graphite-black and look brand new.
Zh: “相信我，你*需要*它……”他拉开夹克让你迅速瞄了一眼塑料包装里的裤子。黑乎乎的，看起来是全新的。

En: These could drastically improve your chances of survival in the urban wilderness.
Zh: 这将大大提升你在城市荒地生存的几率。

En: Right. About something else, then...
Zh: “好吧。还有几件事……”

En: Yeah, the Kingdom of Cuno, the fuck do you want with it?
Zh: “没错，坤诺的王国。你他妈想干什么？”

En: Cuno, there's a stack of eternite back there... (Point to the shack.)
Zh: “坤诺，后面有一堆亘石……”（指向棚屋。）

En: The ladder, ever climb it? (Point to the ladder on the tree.)
Zh: “那边的梯子，你爬过吗？”（指向树上的梯子。）

En: Look at that fucking shit? he screeches. "You tryin'a get Cuno killed?"
Zh: “你自己看看那东西？”他尖叫着。“你想害死坤诺吗？”

En: So you would say that the ladder is... unclimbable?
Zh: “你的意思是，梯子是……爬不上去的？”

En: Fuck does Cuno know? Cuno's not a fucking acrobat!
Zh: “坤诺怎么会知道，坤诺他妈的又不是杂技演员！”

En: It's a trap, Cuno! Don't climb it, Cuno!
Zh: “这是陷阱，坤诺！别爬上去，坤诺！”

En: Cuno knows the ladder is unclimbable.
Zh: 坤诺知道梯子是爬不上去的。

En: The lieutenant takes a quick note in his notebook.
Zh: 警督在笔记本上做了一个简短的记录。

En: Get the fuck out of here, pig! Cuno doesn't have a magic tree house!
Zh: “给我滚开，猪猡！坤诺才没有魔法树屋呢！”

En: Hold on, the gardener *used* to work there?
Zh: “等等，园丁*以前*在那里工作？”

En: Wait, what did you mean by *kipt*?
Zh: “等等，你说的*吉皮特*是什么意思？”

En: Yeah, that's what Cuno said. She couldn't handle the heat, so she took off. Cuno can take it. He fills his lungs with the rancid air. His eyes get a little watery. "Shit's *nothing* to Cuno."
Zh: “没错，坤诺是这么说的。她受不了高温，所以离开了，坤诺就受得了。”他的肺部充斥了腐臭的空气，眼睛也变得有些湿润。“坤诺*无所畏惧*。”

En: You mean the young woman by Whirling-in-Rags? That gardener?
Zh: “你是指褴褛飞旋的那位年轻女士？那个园丁吗？”

En: The gardener? She's actually not a gardener. Turns out she's a union fixer.
Zh: “园丁吗？其实她并不是园丁，而是工会的调解人。”

En: Look it up in the library. Cuno's not a fucking dictionary... He shakes his head. "Fuckin' small-brain. Cuno means the gardener, alright?"
Zh: “去图书馆查啊，坤诺又不是字典……”他摇了摇头。“真他妈的蠢。坤诺的意思是园丁，好不好？”

En: What was she doing in the greenhouse in March anyway? What kind of *gardening* is done in March?
Zh: 三月她去温室里干什么呢？三月能做什么*园艺工作*？

En: Fish is sometimes used to fertilize the soil a few weeks before planting something. Maybe she was preparing  the garden beds?
Zh: 有时会在播种前几周用鱼给土壤施肥，也许她是在打理花园的花坛？

En: Look, Cuno doesn't explain shit -- Cuno just *says* shit. He looks you in the eye and nods, as if agreeing with himself.
Zh: “听着，坤诺不会解释这些的——坤诺只会*说*出来。”他看着你的眼睛点头，好像很赞同自己的观点。

En: Yeah, her.
Zh: 没错，是她。

En: I should ask her about that. (Accept the task.)
Zh: 我得去问问她。（接受任务。）

En: Not important right now. (Refuse task.)
Zh: 现在不重要。（拒绝任务。）

En: Yes, it was probably fish. I'm not gonna waste more time asking about it. (Refuse task.)
Zh: 没错，可能就是鱼吧。我不会再浪费时间问这种问题了。（拒绝任务。）

En: The fuck are you staring at with your mouth open? Ask Cuno a question or get the fuck out of here.
Zh: “你他妈张着嘴看什么呢？不问坤诺问题，就给我滚出去。”

En: Yes, it seems suspicious. You don't like things being like that... suspicious.
Zh: 是的，的确很可疑。你不喜欢让事情变得如此……可疑。

En: The fuck does this have to do with the Cuno? Cuno doesn't give a shit who she is.
Zh: “这他妈跟坤诺有什么关系？坤诺才不管她是谁呢。”

En: You were expecting relaying this information to him to be more rewarding, right? Telling him you found out she isn't a gardener. You know what you should do, if you want to get rewarded? Drugs. Drugs are more rewarding than work.
Zh: 你以为把这则消息告诉他能收获更多回报，对吧？告诉他你发现她并不是园丁了。如果你想获得回报，知道应该怎么做吗？毒品。毒品比工作更有价值。

En: Cuno is actually a *little* interested.
Zh: 实际上坤诺兴趣*不大*。

En: That's just some shit roofing-gimps left behind. Lazy dinks.
Zh: “不过是几个建筑工留下来的破烂罢了，懒惰的呆子。”

En: He's hiding something.
Zh: 他有所隐瞒。

En: Are you hiding something?
Zh: “你隐瞒了什么吗？”

En: Shit 'some gimps' left behind. Sounds legitimate. Let's move on.
Zh: 建筑工留下来的破烂，听起来很合理。我们继续吧。

En: Of course, sire. Better not anger the Cuno with this silliness. We regret bringing it up. A thousand years of misfortune upon us for bringing it up!
Zh: 当然，大人。最好不要用这等愚蠢的行径激怒坤诺大人，我们就不应该提起此事，真是倒了八辈子血霉了。

En: Pig... if Cuno was hiding something, it would be hidden, he says with exaggerated confidence.
Zh: “猪猡……如果坤诺真的有所隐瞒，就绝对不会让你发现。”他自大地说道。

En: But it is not hidden, is it, sire? You picked up on it. You should examine the pile of roofing material again.
Zh: 但的确被我们发现了，不是吗大人？既然您已经注意到了，就应该再检查一下那堆屋顶建材。

En: Was there something here you were supposed to pick up on? As soon as it crosses your mind, the thought is gone...
Zh: 这里有什么你应当注意的东西吗？这个想法在你的脑中一闪而过，转瞬间便消失了……

En: There it is! That strange *feeling* again! As if... there was more than meets the eye about that pile of roofing material.
Zh: 就是这个！又是那种奇怪的*感觉*！就好像……那堆屋顶建材所隐藏的东西远比肉眼可见的要多。

En: You can't hide it, I see without vision.  With my inner eye.
Zh: “你是隐瞒不了的，我不用看就知道，用我心眼就行。”

En: So you say, but I saw *past the veil*.
Zh: “随你怎么说，但我*透过表象*看到了。”

En: Yes, yes... some shit gimps left behind. Were those gimps... (Suddenly raise your eyes.) "...left-handed?"
Zh: “是的，是的……几个建筑工留下来的。那些建筑工……”（突然抬起眼睛。）“……是左撇子吗？”

En: The fuck are you talking about? Cuno doesn't know what-handed gimps they were.
Zh: “你他妈说什么呢？坤诺怎么会知道他们是什么撇子。”

En: Tryin'a get you to talk gimp, Cuno. Don't talk!
Zh: “他想激你开口呢，坤诺，不要说话！”

En: Don't I have a single normal thing to say?
Zh: 难道我就没有一件正常的事可以说吗？

En: We are *way* beyond normal already. We are in the STAR CHAMBER.
Zh: 我们早已*远超*正常水平，到达星室法庭级别了。

En: Inner eye?! Fuck are you talking about?! He loses his cool for a moment and starts yelling. "Ask me a normal question, pig!"
Zh: “心眼？！你在说什么鬼？”他在瞬间失掉了冷静，大喊大叫起来。“问点正常的问题吧，猪猡！”

En: Kim, I think I'm *already* in the Star Chamber.
Zh: “金，我好像*已经*到星室法庭上了。”

En: Better not to bother the lieutenant with my Star Chamber. He wouldn't understand.
Zh: 还是别拿我的星室法庭去打扰警督了，他不会明白的。

En: Are you having a seizure in Cuno's yard now? He sounds agitated.
Zh: “你是在坤诺的院子里癫痫发作了吗？”他听起来很焦躁。

En: Huh... The lieutenant has his nose in his notebook. "I have no idea what you just said."
Zh: “哈……”警督埋头于他的笔记本中。“完全听不懂你在说什么。”

En: They're trying to make you feel stupid, Cuno!
Zh: “他们想让你觉得自己很蠢，坤诺！”

En: He loses his cool for a moment and starts yelling. "The fucking wellll... ?! The fuck are you talking about?! Ask me a normal question, pig!"
Zh: 他在瞬间失掉了冷静，大喊大叫起来。“你他妈……？！你他妈在说什么啊？！问点正常的问题吧，猪猡！”

En: You glance again at the roofing material in front of the shack -- yes, you should go back there.
Zh: 你又瞥了一眼棚屋前的屋顶建材——没错，你应该再回到棚屋那里去看看。

En: Yeah, Cuno sees where this is going. Cuno's got that fast-brain, he whispers excitedly. "You saying you pigs are after the mug fucker -- coz he's the clothes fucker..."
Zh: “是啊，坤诺知道事情的走向，坤诺的脑袋可灵光了，”他兴奋地低语。“你是说你们在追查马克杯混蛋——因为他是个干衣服的混蛋……”

En: Can't hear you, Cuno! Speak louder, Cuno!
Zh: “听不见你说话了，坤诺！大声点，坤诺！”

En: That's exactly what I'm saying, Cuno. Someone has tampered with the crime scene, cleaned some of it up.
Zh: “我正是这个意思，坤诺。有人破坏了犯罪现场，清理了一些痕迹。”

En: Not just that. I also think the hypothethical *mug fucker* lives in that apartment there. (Point to Gary's apartment.)
Zh: “不仅如此。我还认为那个传说中的马克杯混蛋就住在那里的公寓。”（指向盖瑞的公寓。）

En: The lieutenant turns to see where you are pointing. He looks interested.
Zh: 金转身看着你指的方向，感觉很有兴趣。

En: Shit, that's tense... He thinks for a moment. "Someone's going to the beatdown-basement, huh? Mug-guy gonna get tied to the radiator." He nods in approval.
Zh: “该死的，真刺激……”他思索了片刻。“有人要到那个破烂的地下室去了，对吧？马克杯男要被绑在散热器上了。”他赞许地点头。

En: Cuno doesn't know who put that shit in there. And if he did, he wouldn't squeal. But if you find out, maybe you can...
Zh: “坤诺，不知道是谁把这些东西放进去的。就算他知道，也不会告密。但如果你们发现了什么，或许可以……”

En: Stop turning into a pig, Cuno! They're trying to get you hooked on the snitching! She lets out a hiss, even meaner than before. "Get away from my Cuno, f****ts!"
Zh: “别跟那群猪为伍了，坤诺！他们想让你告密呢！”她发出一阵嘘声，比以往更加刻薄。”离我的坤诺远点，混蛋！”

En: ...tell the Cuno who it was? He's curious. He likes putting 2 and 2 together here.
Zh: ……告诉坤诺那是谁？他很好奇，想要知道事情的真相。

En: Yeah! Cuno jumps back. "Get your bacon shit away! Cuno doesn't like to be seen with the popo. Get your shit done and out of Cuno's face!"
Zh: “好啊！”坤诺跳了回来。”把你的东西拿开！坤诺不喜欢被人看到和条子在一起。把你的事情办完，从坤诺面前消失！”

En: The kid may have something there. He's already come up with an interrogation technique too.
Zh: 这孩子可能有所隐瞒，而且他已经提炼出一种审讯技巧了。

En: *Kipt* is a pejorative term used to describe people of South Semenese or Areopagite descent. It used to be a common first name among the Areopagites of Iilmaraa -- not so much anymore.
Zh: *吉皮特*是个贬义词汇，用于形容南塞美尼或者艾瑞奥帕吉特血统的人。在伊尔玛的艾瑞奥帕吉特人中间，这曾经是个很常见的名字——现在没有那么多了。

En: How did you like it in there, piggo-boy? Cuno's got a lot of cool shit there, right?
Zh: “你觉得里面怎么样，猪崽子？坤诺有很多超级酷的东西，对吧？”

En: Well played. *No one* saw that coming.
Zh: 干得漂亮，*没人*能预见这一点。

En: ... and somewhere, someone is jerking off to it, just like Noid said. Tune in to snuff radio.
Zh: ……在某个地方，某人正在对着它打飞机，就像诺伊德说的。收听鼻烟电台。

En: You found Cuno's secret door to Cuno's secret shack?! It was closed for five thousand years. How the fuck did you get in?
Zh: “你找到坤诺秘密棚屋的暗门了？！它已经尘封五千年了，你他妈怎么进去的？”

En: I pushed the panels aside, Cuno.
Zh: “我把嵌板推开了，坤诺。”

En: I *phase-shifted* through the roofing material.
Zh: “我通过屋顶建材*移形换影*了。”

En: Before we go on with that let's talk about how you said it was just some roofing material some gimps left behind. That was a *lie*.
Zh: “在我们继续之前，先来谈谈你口中的那堆只是几个建筑工留下来的屋顶建材吧。那是在*说谎*吧。”

En: Pig, that's the past. You and Cuno are *now*. Let's talk about how you opened the secret door, fucking at Cuno's kingdom.
Zh: “猪猡，那都是过去了。你跟坤诺应该关注*现在*。现在我们来谈谈你是如何打开暗门，在坤诺的王国里搞破坏的吧。”

En: Yeah? Did you fuck in there?
Zh: “是吗？你在里面搞破坏了吗？”

En: And then what? You fuck in there? You fuck in Cuno's kingdom?
Zh: “然后呢？你在里面搞破坏了？你他妈的在坤诺的王国里搞破坏？”

En: Shit... get the fuck out of here! You can't do that.
Zh: “该死……你给我滚出去！你没权利这么做。”

En: He's tryin'a fuck at you again, Cuno!
Zh: “他又在跟你对着干了，坤诺！”

En: He can't do that, Cuno! He's tryin'a fuck at you again!
Zh: “他不能这么做，坤诺！他又在跟你对着干了！”

En: Pigs can't displace, can't do that teleport shit... He says to himself, then turns to you.
Zh: “猪没办法移形，也不能传送什么的……”他自言自语道，又转向了你。

En: Demo-tape? Like some kind of a musician?
Zh: “试听带？类似音乐家那种的？”

En: Yeah, Cuno plays on snuff radio. Fucks pigs. Live. Fucks their heads off. He ominously points to the shack. "Cuno's a cop killer."
Zh: “没错，坤诺会播鼻烟电台。杀猪。现场版，把它们的脑袋砍下来。”他诡异地指了指棚屋。“坤诺是个警察杀手。”

En: Cool pig-head. I liked it. I got one too, this one. (Point to your head.) "It's shit."
Zh: “很酷的猪猡。我很喜欢，我也有一个，这里。”（指着你的脑袋。）“很烂。”

En: Uh... He looks confused. "What is this shit... Fuckin' on yourself? This is weird-level shit, Cuno doesn't go there."
Zh: “呃…….”他看起来很困惑。“什么鬼……你在开玩笑吗？！这真是太变态了，坤诺接受不了。”

En: Forget it, I'm not saying those things...
Zh: 算了，当我没说过那些话……

En: Too brutal for you, huh? Cuno fuck your tongue off?
Zh: “对你来说太残忍了，是吧？坤诺把你的舌头割掉了吗？”

En: What?
Zh: “什么？”

En: Fuck your shit back to normal. What is this?
Zh: “你他妈正常一点，这是想干什么？”

En: (Whisper.) "Yes. I think I'm going insane, Cuno."
Zh: （低语。）“是的，我想我就要疯了，坤诺。”

En: No, I just want to get back to the shack.
Zh: “不，我只想回到棚屋里去。”

En: F'course you want back in there. Everyone wants back in there.
Zh: “你他妈当然想回去，每个人都想回去。”

En: Uh... He looks you in the eye. "Why you fuckin' on yourself in front of Cuno? Talk Kingdom to Cuno or fuck off."
Zh: “呃…….”他看着你的眼睛。“为什么你要在坤诺面前发疯？要么跟坤诺说王国的事，要么滚蛋。”

En: It's a vitamin, pig. Don't you know anything? He looks at you like you just pointed at the sun and asked what it was.
Zh: “这是维他命，猪猡。你什么都不知道嘛？”他看你的眼神，就好像你指着太阳问那是什么一样。

En: Yeah, it's the *Mag*! You fucking *need* that shit to stay on top of your game. Cuno goes through like a tube a day, rips Mag like a motherfucker. And you could use a *barrel*.
Zh: “没错，就是*镁*！坤诺*需要*这玩意维持最好的状态，坤诺每天都要来一管，像个狗杂种一样。像你这样的得用*一桶*吧。”

En: It's magnesium, right?
Zh: “是镁，对吧？”

En: Okay, whatever.
Zh: “好吧，随便你。”

En: Okay? Whatever?! You fucking *need* that shit to stay on top of your game. Cuno goes through like a tube a day. And you look like you could use a *barrel*.
Zh: “好吧？随便我？你*需要*这玩意维持最好的状态。坤诺每天都要来一管，像你这样的得用*一桶*吧。”

En: Don't teach him, Cuno! He's gonna use it against you, Cuno!
Zh: “别教他，坤诺！他会以此来对付你的，坤诺！”

En: You could use some.
Zh: 你需要来点。

En: I know all about magnesium. I rock it all the time.
Zh: “我对镁可太了解了，我一直都在嗑呢。”

En: C'mon, it's just magnesium, don't mystify it.
Zh: “拜托，只是镁而已，别那么神秘兮兮的。”

En: Fuck you, pig! Don't do Mag! You're gonna OD and you're gonna fucking die!
Zh: “去死吧，猪猡！不要嗑镁了！你会嗑过量，他妈的然后就死翘翘了！”

En: He's saying you climbed up there. He probably saw you do it.
Zh: 他说你爬上去了，很可能是看到你这么做了。

En: That explains the callouses on your hands. You scaled the side of the building, entertaining the local kids.
Zh: 这就能解释你手上的老茧了。你沿着大楼的侧面向上爬，逗乐了当地的孩子。

En: Yep, that *conclusively* explains how the coat got up there.
Zh: 没错，这*最终*说明了那件大衣是怎么到上面去的。

En: I tried that. It didn't go so well.
Zh: “我试过了，但结果不尽如人意。”

En: Cuno knows. Cuno and C saw you shit yourself. It's okay, pig. Not everyone can face the fear -- Cuno style.
Zh: “坤诺知道。坤诺和坤妮看到你吓尿的样子了。没事的，猪猡。并不是所有人都能直面恐惧——像坤诺一样。”

En: Almost landed on your fat ass there!
Zh: “差点就要摔个屁墩了！”

En: They're mistaken. The jump was executed to perfection.
Zh: 他们错了，那次飞跃几近完美。

En: Cuno can't wait to see you shit your fat pants!
Zh: “坤诺等不及要看你吓尿裤子了。”

En: Moose piss is probably alcohol.
Zh: 驼鹿尿很可能指的是酒精。

En: Cuno, let's talk about your shack.
Zh: “坤诺，说说你的棚屋吧。”

En: The fuck do you want with it?
Zh: “你他妈想怎样？”

En: Cuno, I found your shack. (Point to the shack.)
Zh: “坤诺，我找到你的棚屋了。”（指向棚屋。）

En: Uh... Cuno's eyes light up. "Yeah! Watch your ass in Cuno's town or Cuno's gonna fuck your head off."
Zh: “呃……”坤诺的眼睛亮了起来。“好啊！在坤诺的地盘小心点，否则坤诺就把你的头拧下来。”

En: Were you trying to send me a message of some sort?
Zh: “你是想要告诉我什么吗？”

En: He is incredibly pleased with himself right now.
Zh: 他现在对自己非常满意。

En: What's with the tube of Magnesolam, Cuno?
Zh: “镁奥兰是怎么回事，坤诺？”

En: You're not getting this, pig! It *completely* takes away the hangover. It's like you didn't do *anything*! Like you stayed home playing with your choo-choo. He looks at you, eyes bulging.
Zh: 他看着你，眼睛鼓了起来：“你不会明白的，猪猡！它能*彻底*消除宿醉，就好像什么都*没有发生*一样！就好像你没喝酒，只是待在家里玩了一晚上你的小火車！”

En: Uh... Cuno's eyes light up. "Yeah! To the both of you. *Watch your ass in Cuno's town or Cuno's gonna fuck your head off*."
Zh: “呃……”坤诺的眼睛亮了起来。“好啊！你们俩挺好了，*在坤诺的地盘小心点，否则坤诺就把你们的头拧下来*。”

En: Good call pigmeister. Don't come and talk to Cuno about his Kingdom.
Zh: “好主意啊猪猡统领，别再找坤诺说他的王国的事了。”

En: I've heard enough of this.
Zh: “我已经听腻了。”

En: That's where Cuno gets his daily hit of electric, Cuno's *shazam*. Cuno rides the fucking lightning in there, pig.
Zh: “这就是坤诺每天充电的地方，坤诺的*沙赞*。坤诺在那里嗑闪电丸呢，猪猡。”

En: I found a plate covered with powder residue -- know anything about it?
Zh: “我找到了一个满是火药残留的盘子——你知道什么吗？”

En: Oh that? He picks a bit of dirt from his fingernail. "Cuno decapitates pigs. That's just a Cuno demo-tape."
Zh: “那个啊？”他从指甲里抠出一点灰尘。“坤诺把猪的脑袋砍下来了，那只是坤诺在练练手而已。”

En: Bet you'd like to ride the lightning too, wouldn't you? You feel tired and old, but you could have that sparkle in your eyes...
Zh: 我敢说你也想嗑闪电丸，不是吗？你感受到自身的衰老和疲惫，但你的眼睛也可以闪烁着那股光芒……

En: What was with the pighead?
Zh: “那个猪头是怎么回事？”

En: Is that my coat up there? I'm pretty sure it's mine. (Point to your coat waving in the wind.)
Zh: “那不是我的外套吗？我很肯定那是我的。”（指着你那件在风中飘动的外套。）

En: Did you know you could get into the harbour from the roof?
Zh: “你知道你可以从屋顶进入港口吗？”

En: Could I get into the harbour from the roof?
Zh: “我能从屋顶进入港口吗？”

En: Is it? Cuno squints at it. "You got pretty fucked. Cuno's surprised you've still got your head after all that."
Zh: “是吗？”坤诺瞥了一眼。“你看上去糟透了，坤诺很惊讶你还能保持头脑清醒。”

En: 'Course Cuno knows. How do you think Cuno made all the docky boys his gimps?
Zh: “坤诺当然知道。不然你以为坤诺是怎么让那群笨小子都变成瘸子的？”

En: 'Course you fucking can. How do you think Cuno made all the docky boys his gimps? Just gotta fly, pig.
Zh: “当然可以了。不然你以为坤诺是怎么让那群笨小子都变成瘸子的？你得飞起来，猪猡。”

En: Yeah, Cuno saw you barely making it... shit was pathetic.
Zh: “是啊，坤诺看到你差点就成功了……真他妈悲哀。”

En: I know. I've jumped that.
Zh: “我知道，我跳过去了。”

En: Is that it? Easy.
Zh: “就这样吗？简单。”

En: I've got to jump to get in there? At my age? In my condition?!
Zh: “我只能跳过去吗？以我这个年纪？这种身体条件？！”

En: Not for you, pig! Cuno can't wait to see you get all scared and shit your pants.
Zh: “才不是给你跳的，猪猡！坤诺等不及要看你吓尿裤子了。”

En: Not everyone can fly like Cuno. You're old, you'll never make it. Cuno crosses his arms. "Moose piss has made you scared in the head."
Zh: “不是什么人都能跟坤诺一样飞的。你太老了，根本跳不过去。”坤诺交叉着双臂。”驼鹿尿让你脑袋发昏了。”

En: That's all there is to it, then! Don't be a pansy, just *jump*!
Zh: 那就这样吧！别搞得一副小基佬的样子，直接*跳*吧！

En: Thanks, kid.
Zh: “谢了，孩子。”

En: After all what?
Zh: “毕竟什么？”

En: Don't sweat it, drunk-pig. Cuno taps his nose twice in conspiracy. "Cuno will keep your nasty secrets. Cuno's not snitchin'."
Zh: “别担心，醉猪。”坤诺神秘兮兮地拍了两下鼻子。“坤诺会替你保秘的，坤诺可不是告密鬼。”

En: Whatever, piggy.
Zh: “随便了，猪猡。”

En: Sam Bo is an acronym for Samaran boxing. Graceful martial arts stuff. "Sam Bo style" implies stealth, cleverness, and cool. Just letting you know.
Zh: 萨拳是萨马拉拳击的简称，一项优雅的武术运动。“萨拳式”意味着隐秘、聪明和冷静，顺便说一下。

En: He's GOT to at least know a source, look at him! You need to figure this out somehow.
Zh: 他至少知道一个线人，看看他！你得想办法解决这个问题。

En: She must repeat it. Use every chance to confirm that version of reality.
Zh: 她必须重复。利用每一次机会确认真实的版本。

En: She tries to bind their fates together. She needs him. Bad.
Zh: 她把彼此的命运绑在了一起。她需要他。非常需要。

En: The lieutenant flashes you a sharp look, but doesn't say anything.
Zh: 警督尖锐地看了你一眼，但是什么也没说。

En: Fuck outta here... Cuno made that shit up to *demean* you pigs, but... He looks around. "Is that why your hooker-friend isn't here? Too ashamed to face the Cunn?"
Zh: “少他妈哔哔了……坤诺编了这些故事就是为了*羞辱*你们条子，但是……”他四下看了看。“这就是你那个妓女朋友不在这里的原因？太羞愧了，不敢面对坤诺？”

En: He doesn't wait for your reply, but keeps going: "Look, Cuno's not judging. Cuno gets it. Tactical approach and shit. Hooker-style, covert ops, combat trauma shit. Whatever it takes, right?"
Zh: 他没有等待你的回复，继续说道：“你看，坤诺不是想评判什么。坤诺懂的。战术方针什么的狗屁。妓女的风格，秘密行动，战争创伤。不计一切代价，对吗？”

En: Only his tightly closed lips betray the effort keeping silent takes him.
Zh: 只是他紧闭的双唇背叛了他保持沉默的努力。

En: Should we ever face a totally unrealistic scenario like this, you would make a much more convincing hooker, *officer*.
Zh: 如果还要面对类似这种完全不切实际的情景，你会成为一个更让人信服的妓女，*警官*。

En: The next time you make statements like this I suggest you first change into something a bit less *promiscuous* than those sleazy robes, officer.
Zh: 下次你做出这类陈述的时候，我建议你先换件不那么*杂乱*的衣服，不要那些庸俗的长袍，警官。

En: Fuck outta here... Cuno made that shit up to *demean* you. He looks at the lieutenant, then the roaring dragon on your robes. Scratching the back of his head he says:
Zh: “少他妈哔哔了……坤诺编了这些故事就是为了*羞辱*你。”他看着警督，然后看了看你长袍上那头咆哮的巨龙。他摸了摸后脑勺，开口说道：

En: Been waitin' for you to fucking man up. He nods at the building behind him. "In there is Cuno's violent dad. On steroids. Cuno's dad does steroids *and* speed. If you can take him, you can have half the speed."
Zh: “就等着你去把他揍一顿了。”他朝身后的大楼点点头。“坤诺类固醇上瘾的暴力老爸就在那里，坤诺的爸爸在用类固醇和*思必得*。如果你能拿下他，思必得就分你一半。”

En: Cuno gets it from his dad. Cuno and his dad are major suppliers! His eyes bulge; their veins reach out like tree branches. "That's where Cuno gets his lightning on."
Zh: “坤诺从爸爸那里搞来的。坤诺和他的爸爸是主要供应商！”他双眼凸出；里面的血丝如同树枝一般伸展开来。“坤诺就是从那里嗑上闪电丸的。”

En: Fucking right, pig. Cuno's filling bath tubs with that shit. Cuno's a kingpin.
Zh: “太他妈对了，猪猡。坤诺在浴缸里装满了那玩意，坤诺可是个大人物呢。”

En: Did Cuno not tell you? Cuno doesn't do that entrapment shit. King Pin Cuno ain't going to the pork pen. Get the fuck out of here!
Zh: “坤诺没有告诉你吗？坤诺才不会下套呢。坤诺大人绝不会去猪圈的。赶快滚！”

En: He's not worried about prison. He just wants to antagonize you.
Zh: 他才不是担心坐牢，不过是想要跟你对着干罢了。

En: Belying the act, he's actually telling the truth. Or at least 0.00001% of it. He has a *little* speed. He's just not giving it to you.
Zh: 他在掩饰自己的行为，说明他说的的确是实话，或者至少其中的0.00001%是实话。他确实有*一些*思必得，不过是不想给你罢了。

En: You need to befriend him first.
Zh: 你得先跟他做朋友。

En: Problem is, Cuno and his dad had a little falling out. Now junkies clawing at Cuno's door. Streets going mad. Cuno's gotta throw his dirty popo-man at it.
Zh: “问题是，坤诺和他的爸爸有点意见不合。现在毒鬼们在坤诺家门口乱作一团，整条街混乱得要死。坤诺都想派他的黑条子手下去处理。”

En: (Nod.) "Okay, okay..."
Zh: （点头。）“好吧好吧……”

En: Mhmh, this is very interesting, but I'll have to get back to you.
Zh: “嗯，确实很有趣，不过我还是之后再来找你。”

En: Dirty popo-man is you. He nods at the building behind him. "In there is Cuno's violent dad. On steroids. Cuno's dad does steroids *and* speed. If you can take him, you can have half the speed."
Zh: “你就是个肮脏的条子。”他朝身后的大楼点点头。“坤诺的老爸很暴力，还对类固醇和*思必得*上瘾。如果你能搞定他，思必得就分你一半。”

En: Who is your dad, Cuno?
Zh: “你爸爸是谁，坤诺？”

En: How much material are we talking about?
Zh: “你说的这些货，有多少？”

En: I've made up my mind, Cuno. And this is what's going to happen... (Conclude.)
Zh: “我已经决定了，坤诺。接下来我打算这样做……”（总结。）

En: Cuno's dad is a fucking monster, he says proudly. "He's the most violent man in Revachol. He doesn't give a shit about a single thing. He drinks too."
Zh: “坤诺的爸爸就是一头怪兽，”他骄傲地说道。“他可是全瑞瓦肖最暴力的人，什么都不怕。而且还喝酒。”

En: Like half. He says very confidently.
Zh: “差不多一半吧。”他非常自信地说道。

En: Half of what?
Zh: “一半什么？”

En: A baggie... but like in this vial.
Zh: “一小包……但是像这种小瓶子。”

En: That's half a *gram*, sir.
Zh: 那是半*克*，先生。

En: Half a gram?
Zh: “半克？”

En: Yeah. The confidence is unwavering. "Half a G. Want it or not?"
Zh: “是啊。”那股自信非常坚定。”半克，你要不要？”

En: But that's not very much material at all.
Zh: “但这根本没多少啊。”

En: Fuck you talkin' about. Half a G?! This shit is *giant*, grade A shit. So clean you can barely see it!
Zh: “你他妈说什么呢？半克！*巨多*了好吗，A级货。纯净到你几乎看不见它！”

En: You can barely see it because there's barely any.
Zh: 你几乎看不见它，是因为几乎就没多少。

En: Looks like we're looking at a close-quarters fight in some run-down drug den. Bongs falling, hookers screaming. You should use the environment against him.
Zh: 看来我们要在一个破旧的毒气室里来一场肉搏了。嘭嘭声响，妓女们的尖叫，你应该因地制宜来对付他。

En: You know how you'd be best off here? With a gun. I'd be the star of the show if you only had a working gun.
Zh: 你知道如何才能取胜吗？用枪。如果你能有一把趁手的枪，我就会成为本场决斗的焦点。

En: You can't afford to take a hit from this guy. I mean, anabolic steroids... *and* speed. You're best off dodging blows, wearing him out until he has a heart attack.
Zh: 你承受不起这家伙的一击的，我是指，合成类固醇……*以及*思必得。你最好防范着他的攻击，拖到他心脏病发作为止。

En: Are you sure you can take the most violent man in Revachol? In your condition?
Zh: 你确定能打败全瑞瓦肖最暴力的人吗？就你现在的状态？

En: You know how you'd be best off here? With a gun. Best have it in your hand when you go in there.
Zh: 你知道如何才能取胜吗？用枪。你进去的时候最好拿着它。

En: Don't expect to talk this one down. There are some situations your mouth can't get you out of.
Zh: 别指望能说服这家伙了。某些情况下，你的口舌是不管用的。

En: You won't sweet-talk your way around this man. Good thing this psycho drug-boss is strictly optional.
Zh: 你是不可能用甜言蜜语哄骗到这个男人的，幸好这个变态毒枭完全是可以回避的。

En: Okay, Cuno's listening?
Zh: “好吧，坤诺听着呢。”

En: I'm going in there, all guns blazing... to get that speed. Because I need it.
Zh: “接下来我准备进去，嘭嘭开火……拿到那些思必得。因为我需要它们。”

En: I'm going in there, but not for the speed. I'm going after the most violent man in Revachol.
Zh: “我决定进去了，但不是为了思必得，我是为了去抓那个瑞瓦肖最暴力的男人。”

En: I'm going in there for justice. I'm a narc, Cuno. I'm going to confiscate that crap.
Zh: “我是为了伸张正义才进去的，我是缉毒警察，坤诺。我要去收缴那些垃圾。”

En: I'm going in there for justice. I'm a narc, Cuno. I'm going to confiscate that crap. (Lie -- you need speed.)
Zh: “我是为了伸张正义才进去的，我是缉毒警察，坤诺。我要去收缴那些垃圾。”（说谎——你需要思必得。）

En: I'm not going in there.
Zh: “我并不打算进去。”

En: Cuno sees you're too pussy to face Cuno's dad. It's okay. Come back when your balls are big-time.
Zh: “坤诺认为你是个不敢直面坤诺爸爸的懦夫。没有关系，等你的胆子长肥了再过来吧。”

En: Alright, pig... you can plug him, but you can't stop him. It'll only buy you time.
Zh: “行吧，猪猡……你可以堵着他，但阻止不了他。只能拖延一点时间罢了。”

En: What the hell are you signing us up for here?
Zh: “你在给我们揽什么活呢？”

En: I'm a bad addict-cop. And I'm going to get my fix.
Zh: “我是个有毒瘾的黑警，我要去解决一点自己的小问题。”

En: C'mon, Kim... (Whisper.) "Obviously I'm not gonna take it. We need to get drugs away from a minor."
Zh: “拜托，金……”（低语。）“我肯定不会拿的。我们得让未成年人远离毒品才行。”

En: Sure, whatever. If you survive, make sure to bring that shit back to Cuno. Cuno's almost out. You wouldn't like the Cuno when he's out.
Zh: “行吧，随便你。如果你侥幸逃生，一定要把东西带给坤诺。坤诺快要断货了。你不会想认识断货时的坤诺的。”

En: Sure. He winks at you. "Confiscate it. For Cuno. And you can have half."
Zh: “当然。”他冲你眨着眼睛。“收缴它们吧，带给坤诺，我就分你一半。”

En: So half of a half is a quarter, right? We're probably talking about a quarter gram here.
Zh: 一半的一半就是四分之一，对吧？我们很可能指的是四分之一克。

En: Another sane decision, detective.
Zh: “又一个明智的决定，警探。”

En: Just get in the apartment building. Cuno knows you already fucked your way in. Cuno knows everything. He aggressively points at his eyes.
Zh: “快去那栋楼里吧。坤诺知道你已经混进去了。坤诺什么都知道。”他挑衅地地指着自己的眼睛。

En: Cuno's violent dad's got Cuno's key, so you need to fuck your way in there. Go to the pier-side. Bang on the door till the cleaning gimp lets you in. That's how Cuno does it.
Zh: “坤诺的暴力老爸拿了坤诺的钥匙，所以你得自己混进去了。到码头那边去，使劲敲门，直到那个清洁工放你进去。坤诺就是这么干的。”

En: Then you go to Room #12 and kick down the door. Police-violence-style. That's what Cuno does. And then it's action time: You're locked in the room with violent fuck head.
Zh: “直接去12号房间，警察执法踹门。坤诺就是这么干的，然后好戏就开场了：你跟暴力狂锁在了一个房间。”

En: That's it. He concludes. "Next time Cuno sees you, you better have his shit."
Zh: “就是这样。”他总结到。“坤诺下次见到你的时候，你最好已经拿到他的货了。”

En: Go to Room #12, first floor, and kick down the door. Police-violence-style. Cuno-style. And then it's action time: You're locked in the room with violent fuck head.
Zh: “直接去12号房间，第一层，把门踹开。警察的暴力风格。坤诺的风格。然后好戏就开场了：你跟暴力狂锁在了一个房间。”

En: I'm going to kill Cuno's dad.
Zh: “我要杀了坤诺的父亲。”

En: Okay then, he concedes.
Zh: “那好吧，”他退让了。

En: Did you know I don't like bad addict cops? He stares at you over his glasses. "Almost no one in the RCM does."
Zh: “你知道我不喜欢有毒瘾的黑警吗？”他透过眼镜盯着你。“RCM几乎没有人会喜欢。”

En: Cool. He stares at you over his glasses. "No, no -- really. Rock and roll."
Zh: “很酷。”他透过眼镜盯着你。“不，不——真的。很摇滚。”

En: The lieutenant doesn't actually look like a rock and roll enthusiast.
Zh: 警督看上去并不像一个摇滚爱好者。

En: All right, so you got Cuno's kilo. He rubs his hands together. "Here is how we do it. First, you give Cuno Cuno's kilo. Then Cuno gives you half back."
Zh: “很好，你们拿到了坤诺的千克。”他搓了搓手。“我们开始吧。首先，你把坤诺的千克交给坤诺，然后坤诺再分一半给你。”

En: By kilo you mean gram, right?
Zh: “你口中的千克，其实是克对吧？”

En: Fuck right Cuno's dad was sleeping like a bum, he snaps back. "Cuno told you -- Cuno's dad doesn't give a shit about *anything*. Fucking breaking-and-entering shit -- that's nothing to Cuno's dad."
Zh: “坤诺的爸爸当然睡得像个流浪汉，”他很快恢复了过来。“坤诺告诉过你——坤诺的爸爸*什么*都不在乎，什么非法侵入——坤诺的爸爸完全不放在眼里。”

En: All right. Fair is fair. (Give Cuno the vial.)
Zh: “好吧，很公平。”（把小瓶交给坤诺。）

En: I did right not to give you the drugs. Let's conclude this. (End the conversation.)
Zh: “我不把毒品给你才是为你好，到此为止吧。”（结束对话。）

En: I'm keeping it. You don't need more drugs -- you're twelve. (Pretend you still have his speed.)
Zh: “我来保管。你不需要毒品了——你才12岁。”（假装你还拿着他的思必得。）

En: I'm keeping it. You don't need more drugs -- you're twelve. (Don't give it to Cuno.)
Zh: “我要留着它。你不需要更多毒品了——你才12岁。”（不给坤诺。）

En: Fuck are you talking to Cuno about that kiddy shit?
Zh: “你他妈是把坤诺当成小孩子吗？”

En: That's how we split it -- it's the *best* way. Street way.
Zh: “我们就是这么分的——这是*最好*的方法，街头规矩。”

En: Fuckin' tryin'a talk about Cuno's dad then can't handle it. Typical f****t shit. His face is redder than usual and so are his earlobes.
Zh: “对坤诺的爸爸说三道四，结果只是放嘴炮而已。真是个大傻逼。”他的脸颊，还有耳垂都比平日里红很多。

En: Aren't you going ask how I got past your dad?
Zh: “你不问问我是怎么饶过你父亲的吗？”

En: Say nothing. (Change the subject.)
Zh: 什么也不说。（换个话题。）

En: Find a job. Pay them yourself. Your dad can't handle things anymore.
Zh: “去找份工作，自己付钱吧，你的父亲已经无能为力了。”

En: All right, now we talkin'. Same shit as before. You give Cuno Cuno's kilo -- Cuno gives you half a kilo back.
Zh: “很好，总算说到正事了。还是老样子，你给坤诺千克——坤诺再给你半千克。”

En: Whatever scary thing he might have been -- now he is nothing.
Zh: “不论他以前有多么可怕——现在他什么都不是了。”

En: Stop acting tough, kid. You don't have to be scared of him anymore.
Zh: “别再故作强硬了，孩子。你不必再害怕他了。”

En: Fuck right I am. He punches the air again: "Get your nun ass out of here before Cuno fucks it dead." Another punch. "F****t. You think coz you brought Cuno one gram of speed you're friends now?"
Zh: “我他妈当然会。”他又挥起了拳头：“趁坤诺还没把你打死之前快他妈的滚。”又是一拳。“混蛋。你以为给坤诺带了一克思必得你就算是朋友了吗？”

En: 'Cuno window'? C'mon kid. Just stop.
Zh: “‘坤诺之窗’？拜托孩子，停下吧。”

En: Chances are you *are* going to turn into that.
Zh: “很有可能你*也会*变成那样。”

En: I'm keeping it. And I'm doing it all myself. (Pretend you still have his speed.)
Zh: “我来保管。而且我要自己一个人嗑。”（假装你还拿着他的思必得。）

En: I'm keeping it. And I'm doing it all myself. (Don't give it to Cuno.)
Zh: “我要留下它。而且全部自己享用。”（不给坤诺。）

En: Cuno knows what Cuno means.
Zh: “坤诺知道坤诺是什么意思。”

En: Cuno means gram.
Zh: 坤诺的意思是克。

En: This is about you and Cuno. You mismanaged this shit. Now everything is *fucked* between us -- again. How are you gonna make this up to the Cuno, huh?
Zh: “这是你和坤诺的事。你把它搞砸了。现在我们之间的一切都*搞砸*了——又一次。你打算怎么补偿坤诺，嗯？”

En: Whooh that's heavy... He waves the minuscule bottle around, then slips it into his coat pocket.
Zh: “哇哦，可真够重的……”他挥舞着那个小瓶子，然后把它塞进了上衣口袋。

En: Word on the street is you sent your little friend in dressed as a hooker. Distracted him. That's some sick shit. Tell your little slanty-eyed friend -- respect from the Cuno.
Zh: “有消息说你让你的小伙伴打扮成妓女，让他分心了。真是够变态的，告诉你的小四眼儿朋友——坤诺向他致敬。”

En: There is a touch of grief in there.
Zh: 这里有一丝悲伤。

En: Word on the street is you sent your little friend in dressed as a *hooker*. Distraction-style. That's some sick shit. He nods approvingly to the lieutenant.
Zh: “有消息说你让你的小伙伴打扮成*妓女*，让他分心了。真是够变态的。”他朝金赞许地点了点头。

En: Cuno's gonna go out like that too. Gonna be just like Cuno's violent dad. Speed shit, crime shit, fucking on the bed -- go out West Revachol-style.
Zh: “坤诺也打算这么出去，就像坤诺的暴力老爸一样。思必得，犯罪，上床——瑞瓦肖西部风格。”

En: Fuck are you talking, *sad*? The kid breathes in and out like a boxer. "Cuno's got hard shit." He punches the air. "Death shit. Nothing shit."
Zh: “你他妈说什么呢，*难过*？”那孩子像个拳击手一样喘着粗气。“坤诺可强硬了。”他朝空中挥舞着拳头。“死亡什么的。全他妈是狗屁。”

En: Cuno wants to hear all about it, but first we split the kilo. He leans in. "Then we shoot the shit."
Zh: “坤诺很想听，但首先我们来把千克分了吧。”他凑了过来，“然后再来说个够。”

En: There were tons of unpaid utility bills there.
Zh: “那里有大量尚未支付的物业账单。”

En: Not a single muscle moves on the lieutenant's face.
Zh: 那个男人脸上的肌肉没有一点动作。

En: Turn into... He pants from exhaustion. "Cuno ain't turning into shit! Cuno *is*! CUNO *IS* THAT SHIT."
Zh: “变成……”他竭力地停顿了一下。“坤诺才不会变成什么！坤诺*就是*！坤诺*就是*那样。”

En: Forget it.
Zh: 算了吧。

En: I already did it all, Cuno. Sorry.
Zh: “我已经全部用掉了，坤诺。对不起。”

En: All right... He taps the side of his head. "Cuno knew you'd try that sneaky pig shit on him."
Zh: “好吧…….”他拍了拍脑袋侧面。“坤诺就知道你会用那种卑鄙的手段对付他。”

En: All right, you fucking druggie... He taps the side of his head. "Cuno knew you'd try that sneaky pig shit on him."
Zh: “好吧，你这个该死的毒鬼……”他拍了拍脑袋侧面。“坤诺就知道你会用那种卑鄙的手段对付他。”

En: Yeah. I was wrong. He's hard core. A real killer.
Zh: “是啊，我错了。他是个硬汉，一个真正的杀手。”

En: Tell him, Cuno!
Zh: “告诉他，坤诺！”

En: Fuck right I am. He punches the air again. "Now get your nun ass out of here before Cuno fucks it dead." Another punch. "F****t. You think 'cause you brought Cuno one gram of speed you're friends now?"
Zh: “我他妈当然会。”他又挥起了拳头：“趁坤诺还没把你打死之前快他妈的滚。”又是一拳。“混蛋。你以为给坤诺带了一克思必得你就算是朋友了吗？”

En: Cuno's got brains. This shit doesn't surprise Cuno. He squints at you. "So Cuno's gonna give you one more chance. Know this, pig -- shit is *major*."
Zh: “坤诺很有头脑的。这破玩意根本吓不到坤诺。”他眯着眼睛看你。“那坤诺就再给你一次机会。知道吗，猪猡——那东西才是*重点*。”

En: That's no place to live in. You have to find somewhere else.
Zh: “那里不是住的地方。你必须另外找个住处。”

En: Major fucking choice, pig...
Zh: “重要选择，猪猡……”

En: Cuno won't take this shit lightly. The pieces are moving, pig. This is fucking domino shit.
Zh: “坤诺才不会对这种事掉以轻心。那些玩意在动，猪猡。这他妈是多米诺骨牌。”

En: Let me guess. Cuno's dad doesn't give a shit about them.
Zh: “让我猜一猜，坤诺的父亲根本不在意它们。”

En: It's hard to see how *not* giving the boy a bag of amphetamine would cause some catastrophic cascade response.
Zh: 很难想象*不*给这男孩一袋安非他命竟会引起这般灾难性的连锁反应。

En: You don't have to turn into that.
Zh: “你没必要变成那样。”

En: Hard to see, but easy to feel. Somehow this *will* change things.
Zh: 很难看见，却很容易*感受*。这*会*在某种程度上改变一些事情。

En: He shakes his head in regret. "Cuno believes in second chances -- Cuno doesn't believe in third chances."
Zh: 他遗憾地摇了摇头。”坤诺相信第二次机会——可坤诺不相信第三次机会。”

En: Not like he thinks, but you can feel it. Somehow this *will* change things.
Zh: 不像他想的那样，但你能感受到。这*会*在某种程度上改变一些事情。

En: You can guess.
Zh: 你可以猜啊。

En: If he doesn't stop soon, he's going to collapse from exhaustion. He's red all over.
Zh: 如果他不赶快停下，会彻底累垮的。他全身都红了。

En: He did not win. There is a crack in there now -- and it's spreading across the face of his certainty.
Zh: 他并没有胜利。那里出现了一条裂缝——并开始在他坚定的表面蔓延开来。

En: Fuck right there were. Fuckin' three years or some shit.
Zh: “他妈的当然了，差不多三年吧。”

En: The fuck outta here, pig! You better have a baggie on you the next time Cuno sees you. You can't *advance* with the Cuno when you tryin'a play him like that.
Zh: “你他妈给我滚，猪猡！下次坤诺看见你的时候，你最好有一包货。再像这样耍坤诺，你就没办法跟他继续*发展*了。”

En: Cuno won... You *won*, Cuno! The relief is palpable. The little hat jumps up and down behind the fence.
Zh: “坤诺赢了……你*赢了*，坤诺！”明显松了口气。那顶小帽子在围栏后面上蹿下跳。

En: Speed fiend tryin'a play the Cuno.
Zh: “毒鬼还想耍坤诺。”

En: That's right. Fucking nothing.
Zh: “没错，什么都不是。”

En: Out comes another, similar vial -- from the sock above his running shoe. "Here you go -- *more* than half in there. Cuno's fuckin' honourable like that."
Zh: 接着又掏出一个相似的小瓶，从他球鞋上的袜子里。——“拿去吧——还有*大半*呢。库诺就是如此正直。”

En: That's a lame name, Cuno.
Zh: “这名字真的土爆了，坤诺。”

En: Cuno window?
Zh: 坤诺之窗？

En: There is no movement on the lieutenant's face as he stares intently at the trash container.
Zh: 当警督目不转睛地盯着垃圾箱时，他的脸上毫无波澜。

En: 'Turn into...' He pants from exhaustion. "Cuno ain't turning into shit! Cuno *is*! CUNO *IS* THAT SHIT."
Zh: “变成……”他竭力地停顿了一下。“坤诺才不会变成什么！坤诺*就是*！坤诺*就是*那样。”

En: Now tell me, how the fuck are you still alive, pig?
Zh: “现在告诉我，你他妈怎么还活着，猪猡？”

En: Get your fucking nun ass out of here before Cuno fucks it dead. He punches the air again. "F****t. You think 'cause you brought Cuno one gram of speed you're friends now?"
Zh: 趁坤诺还没把你打死之前快他妈的滚。又是一拳。“混蛋。你以为给坤诺带了一克思必得你就算是朋友了吗？”

En: But he does *not* approve.
Zh: 但他*并不*赞同。

En: He punches the air again. "Get your fucking nun ass out of here before Cuno fucks it dead." Another punch. "F****t. You think 'cause you took Cuno's speed, Cuno's gonna sob like a f*g?"
Zh: “我他妈当然会。”他又挥起了拳头：“趁坤诺还没把你打死之前快他妈的滚。”又是一拳。“混蛋。你以为拿走了坤诺的思必得，坤诺就会哭哭啼啼了吗？”

En: Stop saying all this *sad* shit, Cuno. The whisper comes smaller than usual.
Zh: “别再说这些*悲哀*的屁话了，坤诺。”低语声比平日里还要小。

En: I'm not ready to make this decision.
Zh: “我还没准备好做这个决定。”

En: The fuck are you talkin' about? Gettin' Cuno all worked up for nothing...
Zh: “你他妈的说什么？让坤诺的努力都白费了…….”

En: Relax C. We got plenty of kilo -- kilo underground, in the tree, this ain't about that. He turns to you.
Zh: “放轻松，坤妮。我们还有很多千克——埋在地下，藏在树上，这并不重要。”他转向你。

En: Don't change your name into that, Cuno!
Zh: “别把你的名字改成那个，坤诺！”

En: Fuck that shit. Cuno's gonna move underground. Le Royaume shit, ancient shit. Cuno's gonna live in a fucking catacomb.
Zh: “去他妈的，坤诺会转移到地下。就像王国，像古人一样。坤诺要住在地下墓穴里。”

En: I like it. Kuuno de Ruyter.
Zh: “我很喜欢。库诺·德鲁伊特。”

En: It's not hard to see at all. You hand out drugs to kids -- the lieutenant's faith in your judgement will diminish significantly.
Zh: 根本不难看出，你在给孩子们分发毒品——警督对你的判断力的信心将大大降低。

En: It's quite imaginable. You start handing drugs out to kids -- the lieutenant's faith in your judgement will diminish significantly.
Zh: 很有可能，你开始向孩子们分发毒品了——警督对你的判断力的信心将大大降低。

En: Keep your ass together, Cuno...
Zh: “振作一点，坤诺……”

En: That didn't change shit, pig. That only made things worse. He spits on the ground. "Cuno knows you only took 'em to get fucked up yourself. Pigs always be pretendin' about shit like that."
Zh: “那根本改变不了什么，猪猡。只会让一切变得更糟。”他朝地上唾了一口。“坤诺知道你拿着它不过是想自己用罢了，猪猡们总是喜欢这么装模作样。”

En: That didn't change shit, pig. That only made things worse. Fucking social worker shit... It doesn't *work* pig.
Zh: “那根本改变不了什么，猪猡。只会让一切变得更糟。该死的社工……根本*没用*，猪猡。”

En: What, if any, is the downside of *not* giving the drugs to Cuno?
Zh: 如果有的话，*不*把毒品交给坤诺会有什么坏处吗？

En: Cuno's gonna go out like that too. Gonna be just like Cuno's violent dad. Fuck on speed, do crime shit -- go out fast, Revachol West-style.
Zh: “坤诺也打算这么出去，就像坤诺的暴力老爸一样。思必得，犯罪——飙車，瑞瓦肖西部风格。”

En: Cuno's gonna have one too. Gonna be just like Cuno's dad. Speed shit, crime shit, fucking on the bed -- Cuno's gonna go out like Cuno's dad. Revachol West-style.
Zh: “坤诺也会有的，就像坤诺的爸爸一样。思必得，犯罪，上床——坤诺也会像坤诺的爸爸一样出门，瑞瓦肖西部风格。”

En: None that you can see.
Zh: 你反正没看出来。

En: Tik-tik-tik-tik. The boy flicks an imaginary domino piece with his index finger. "Decision time. What's it gonna be? You gonna fuck the Cuno?"
Zh: “嘀-嗒-嘀-嗒。”男孩用食指弹了弹想象中的多米诺骨牌。“决策时间。怎么回事？你想跟坤诺对着干吗？”

En: A small lump forming in his throat.
Zh: 他的喉咙里鼓起了个小肿块。

En: No. You *can* see it. This young man has junior officer material in him. In another life, where he trusts you.
Zh: 不，你*能*看出来。这个年轻人有成为下级军官的潜质，在一个他对你很信任的平行世界中。

En: Yeah, that's right. He swells with pride. "Cuno's dad doesn't give a shit about that electricity and light shit. Just wants to pound on people and drink."
Zh: “是啊，没错。”他得意洋洋地说。“坤诺的爸爸才不在乎电和光呢，他满脑子都是打人喝酒。”

En: In truth, Cuno doesn't really believe there's anything you can do to make up for this. The damage is irreparable.
Zh: 实际上，坤诺并不认为你能做出什么补偿，这份损失已经无法弥补了。

En: Should've sent you in when he was there pushing 'roids in his ass. Thievin', double-crossin' liar-pig. Cuno got sentimental. That shit won't happen again.
Zh: “就应该趁他用类固醇的时候把你送进去的，你这个小偷，骗子，大猪猡。坤诺有点感情用事了，以后再也不会那样了。”

En: This is staying with me. (Keep pretending as if you have his speed.)
Zh: “这个就交给我了。”（继续假装他的思必得在你手里。）

En: This is staying with me. (Don't give Cuno the vial.)
Zh: “这个由我来保管。”（不把小瓶给坤诺。）

En: Okay, but just be smart about this... (Give Cuno the vial.)
Zh: “好吧，但你得小心点用……”（把小瓶给坤诺。）

En: There is genuine disappointment below the act, sire.
Zh: 这出戏背后掩藏着真正的失望，大人。

En: Alright, alright... He throws his hands up in the air. "You *fucked* the Cuno! Everybody, Cuno got fucked by his pocket pig -- just when we getting our business on, the pig throws it all away!"
Zh: “好吧，好吧……”他举起双手。“你*耍*了坤诺！所有人听好了，坤诺被他的宠物猪耍了——我们正准备谈正事呢，猪猡就把一切都搞砸了！”

En: All right, now we're talking. Whooh that's heavy... He waves the minuscule bottle around, then slips it into his coat pocket.
Zh: “很好，现在可以说正事了。哇哦，这可真重……”他挥舞着那个小瓶子，然后把它塞进了上衣口袋。

En: You can't fuck with Cuno!
Zh: “不准你耍坤诺！”

En: Fuck outta here, Cuno knows it's fucking lame. That's why Cuno changed it. Cuno can change his name into anything. Gonna change my name into f****t.
Zh: “滚蛋，坤诺当然知道它很土鳖。所以坤诺才要改变，坤诺可以把自己的名字改成任何东西，坤诺要把名字改成混蛋！”

En: I told you he can't be trusted! I told you, I told you... the little rat repeats it six or seven times. "I told you he'd steal the shit!"
Zh: “我告诉过你不能相信他！我早就说过，早就说过……”那只小老鼠重复了六七遍。“我早就说过他会偷的！”

En: Yeah -- you do some Sam Bo shit, sneak in? Was the binoclard hooker thing real?
Zh: “是啊——你搞了一些鬼名堂，溜进去了？四眼妓女的事是真的吗？”

En: Yeah -- you do some Sam Bo shit, sneak in? He looks at the lieutenant. "Is the hooker thing real?"
Zh: “是啊——你像萨拳那样溜进去了吗？”他看向警督。“妓女的传闻是真的吗？”

En: This is about you and Cuno. You mismanaged this shit. Now everything is *fucked* between us. How are you gonna make this up to the Cuno, huh?
Zh: “这是你和坤诺的事。你把它搞砸了。现在我们之间的一切都*搞砸*了——又一次。你打算怎么补偿坤诺，嗯？”

En: Cuno, I met your dad.
Zh: “坤诺，我碰见你的父亲了。”

En: Yeah, how are you still standing, pig? You sneak past him?
Zh: “是吗，那你怎么还能直立行走，猪猡？你从他身边溜过去了？”

En: That's right, it's a shit hole. Cuno's gonna move underground. Le Royaume shit, ancient shit. Cuno's gonna live in a fucking catacomb.
Zh: “说得对，那就是个烂地方。坤诺会转移到地下。就像王国，像古人一样。坤诺要住在地下墓穴里。”

En: Yeah, pig. This shit is done. He spits on the ground. Yellowish, foaming spit. "Now get the fuck outta Cuno's face, Cuno needs to drop the bomb."
Zh: “是啊，猪猡，一切都结束了。”他朝地上唾了一口黄色的浓痰。“马上给我滚开，坤诺得宣布这个不幸的消息了。”

En: You got lucky, pig. Cuno knew this. He points to himself. "Cuno's fucking violent *fiend* dad's been drinking hard lately. Cuno knew you have a way in. Narrow window. Cuno window."
Zh: “你走运了，猪猡。坤诺知道这个。”他指着自己。“坤诺那该死的暴力*毒鬼*老爸最近喝了很多酒。坤诺*知道*你有办法进去。那扇小窗户。坤诺之窗。”

En: Yeah -- how the fuck are you still *alive*, pig?
Zh: “是吗——那你他妈怎么还*活着*，猪猡？”

En: I did right not to give you the drugs. Let's conclude this. (End the conversation.)
Zh: “我不把毒品给你才是为你好，到此为止吧。”（结束对话。）

En: Cuno knows it's fucking lame. That's why Cuno changed it.
Zh: “坤诺知道这他妈的土爆了，所以坤诺才要换掉它。”

En: Nothing.
Zh: “没什么。”

En: He's tryin'a fuck you again!
Zh: “他又想耍你了！”

En: Stop trying to give Cuno your pity shit. He squints -- a pained expression. "Cuno knows what that shit is. Cuno's dad's gonna be a fucking vegetable. Stroke shit, stomach fucked up, and..."
Zh: “少他妈可怜坤诺了。”他眯起眼睛——-露出一个痛苦的表情。“坤诺很清楚这他妈是怎么回事。坤诺的爸爸会变成一个植物人。中风，肠穿肚烂，还有……”

En: Cuno, your dad is a half-dead alcoholic. He was sleeping under some clothes.
Zh: “坤诺，你的父亲就是个半死不活的酒鬼。他正躺在几件衣服下面睡觉呢。”

En: It was what you said. Kim dressed up as a hooker, full drag. Distracted him.
Zh: “就是你说的那回事。金扮成妓女的样子，全副武装。让他分心了。”

En: It was dark in there. We sneaked in and got out.
Zh: “里面很黑，我们偷偷溜进去，然后又溜出来了。”

En: I killed your dad, Cuno.
Zh: “我杀了你的父亲，坤诺。”

En: What?! His eyes become large and round.
Zh: “什么？！”他的眼睛瞪得又大又圆。

En: Cuno's not fuckin' trying to be tough! He pushes on bravely. "This shit is real. Cuno's fucking violent dad's gonna be a vegetable -- Cuno knows that shit. Stroke shit, stomach fucked up, and..."
Zh: “坤诺他妈的没有故作强硬！”他勇敢的向前走了一步。“这他妈是真的。坤诺那该死的暴力老爸会变成一个植物人——坤诺知道那些破事。中风，肠穿肚烂，还有……”

En: Fuck outta here... Cuno made that shit up to *demean* you. His eyes move between you and the lieutenant.
Zh: “少他妈哔哔了……坤诺编了这些故事就是为了*羞辱*你。”他的眼睛在你和警督之间游荡。

En: Yeah, Cuno's dad is fucking *nothing*! He pushes on bravely. "Fucking coma shit. Stroke shit. Cuno's dad is so fucking violent he's had a stroke many times. Shit..."
Zh: “是啊，坤诺的爸爸他妈的*什么也不是*！”他勇敢地向前走了几步。“该死的昏迷。中风。坤诺的爸爸就他妈是个暴力狂，他都中风好几次了。妈的……”

En: What is this shit? He's fucked up on 'roids to drink more, you can't kill him. Cuno's dad says he'll die by his *own* hand. Die suicide-style.
Zh: “这他妈算什么？他用了类固醇之后会喝更多的酒，你杀不死他的。坤诺的爸爸说过他会死在*自己*手上，自杀而死。”

En: Yeah? He turns even redder. "So fucking what?"
Zh: “是吗？”他变得更红了。”所以呢？”

En: Fuck you tryin'a do... get the Cuno to stop? Cuno's just getting it on! His tone wavers.
Zh: “你他妈的……想让坤诺大人停下来？坤诺才刚刚开始呢！”他的语调颤抖起来。

En: There was a textbook with your name on it in the apartment.
Zh: “公寓里有本课本，上面写着你的名字。”

En: Okay. Let's conclude this business. (End the conversation.)
Zh: “好吧，我们就到此为止吧。”（结束对话。）

En: Look, pigs. Cuno gets it. You don't wanna talk about it. Close-quarters combat shit, Cuno doesn't wanna talk about it either...
Zh: “听着，猪猡。坤诺明白，你们不想谈这个。近身格斗，坤诺也不想谈这个……”

En: Yeah, in a tomb, Cuno! The little one seems overjoyed at the prospect.
Zh: “没错，在坟墓里，坤诺！”这个小家伙似乎对那副场景非常期待。

En: His posture changes, the swaying rooster motion stops for a second. Then he gets it going again. Reorienting himself.
Zh: 他的姿势变了，摇摆的大公鸡停了那么几秒。然后他又开始了。又换了个方向。

En: You got lucky. Cuno's dad was out getting more drink. Cuno knew that. That's why he sent you... Cuno cares about his pig. Doesn't want his pig to get *hurt*. He nods empathetically.
Zh: “算你走运，坤诺的爸爸出门买酒了。坤诺很清楚，所以才派你过去……坤诺很关心他的猪猡，并不想让他的猪猡*受伤*。”他感动地点点头。

En: You got lucky pig. Cuno's dad was out getting more drink. Cuno knew you'd have a window there. Now that Cuno thinks about it -- it was a mistake.
Zh: “算你走运，猪猡。坤诺的爸爸出门买酒了。坤诺知道你发现了一扇窗户。现在坤诺想起来——这是个错误。”

En: It says *Kuuno* not Cuno. Kuuno de Ruyter.
Zh: “上面写着*库诺*，而不是坤诺。库诺·德鲁伊特。”

En: In his mind, his father isn't vulnerable the way other mortals are.
Zh: 在他看来，他的父亲并不像其他凡人那样容易受到伤害。

En: Change of topic then.
Zh: “那换个话题吧。”

En: Combat trauma shit, he adds after a few seconds of sombre silence.
Zh: “战斗创伤什么的，”沉默几秒钟后，他又说道。

En: Cuno's got that shit under control.
Zh: “一切都在坤诺的掌握之中。”

En: That room was so small. To be stuck in there with him... not an easy fight for a kid.
Zh: 那个房间特别小。跟他一起困在里面……对于一个孩子来说，可不是什么轻松的战斗。

En: Don't take for fucking ever, Cuno's got wheels turning everywhere.
Zh: “别想拖延时间，到处都是坤诺的眼线。”

En: I looked around in there. It's not the easy life you've got going on in that apartment.
Zh: “我在里面看了看。你在那间公寓里过的并不容易。”

En: The fuck do you know about Cuno's life? Cuno's got plans. Get the fuck out of here.
Zh: “你他妈知道什么坤诺的生活？坤诺早有打算。快他妈给我滚。”

En: Yeah, we got plans.
Zh: “没错，我们早有打算！”

En: Six metres underground, below piping from before the war -- the collapsed remains of the Martinaise storm drain system. There are two stolen flashlights with piles of batteries next to them, beside two bedrolls. In the dark, an opening into the lower tunnels...
Zh: 六米黄土之下，战前的管道下面——是马丁内斯坍塌的排水系统残骸。两个偷来的手电筒，旁边有一堆电池，还有两个铺盖。黑暗之中，有一个通向下方隧道的入口……

En: It doesn't work, Cuno! Only our shit works.
Zh: “没用的，坤诺！只有我们的东西才有用！”

En: You're yanking my chain, aren't you kid?
Zh: “你在戏弄我，是不是，孩子？”

En: Can I have some? Just a little?
Zh: “能给我一点吗？就一点？”

En: Don't be yankin' your shit in front of the Cuno. Cuno's always serious. Always rollin'. Big kilo, but you ain't gettin' any. Get the fuck off!
Zh: “别在坤诺面前耍什么鬼把戏，坤诺可是很严肃，很认真的。坤诺那里多得是，可你什么都拿不到。赶快滚！”

En: Fuck no, pig. Cuno ain't dealing to the popo. Not doing the pork pen for your sad speed habit! You don't *know* Cuno.
Zh: “当然不行，猪猡。坤诺不跟条子做交易，也不会因为你到猪圈里去！你根本不*了解*坤诺。”

En: FUCK THAT. Confront him.
Zh: 管它的，直面他。

En: Ease off, C! He turns to you. "Thanks, pig -- we're cool now. You punching yourself in the face worked out real good for everyone."
Zh: “放松，坤妮！”他面向你。“谢啦，猪猡——我们算是两清了，你自打嘴巴真的对所有人都好。”

En: Stay the fuck away from Cuno! You smell like bum shit! He backs away from you, wrinkling his nose. "Cuno's not a bum. Cuno doesn't touch that shit."
Zh: “你他妈离坤诺远一点！你闻起来就像个流浪汉！”他倒退了几步，皱起鼻子。“坤诺可不是流浪汉，坤诺不碰那玩意。”

En: You fucking with Cuno? The boy is looking at the A6 logo on the key chain like he can't believe his eyes.
Zh: “你在挑衅坤诺吗？”男孩看着钥匙链上的A6标志，简直不敢相信自己的眼睛。

En: That's right. Just fuck off.
Zh: “就是这样，滚蛋吧。”

En: Really? Shit... let Cuno sample it then, pig. He almost starts grabbing for it, but then rebounds and runs his hand through his hair.
Zh: “真的？该死的……让坤诺试试吧，猪猡。”他几乎要伸手来抓了，随即又把手缩回去，梳理起了自己的头发。

En: Fucker! Cuno ain't buying that entrapment shit. Takin' kilo from the pigs... what, you think Cuno's green shit?
Zh: “笨蛋！坤诺才不会相信这种鬼话。从猪猡那里拿货……怎么，觉得坤诺很好骗吗？”

En: You think Cuno's shit is green? the little whatever-it-is behind the fence shrieks.
Zh: “你觉得坤诺很好骗吗？”围栏后面的小东西尖叫着。

En: You need to rethink your tribute to Cuno. Cuno's not taking the cage just because you fucked yourself in the face!
Zh: “你必须重新考虑一下坤诺的贡品。坤诺是不会因为你自打嘴巴就收下笼子的。”

En: It may not look like it now, but you may have vital information.
Zh: “或许现在看不出来，但你很有可能掌握了重要情报。”

En: Ame-fucking-what, pig?
Zh: “你他妈在说什么赔不赔的，猪猡？”

En: Look... (Play along.) "I want to make this right with Cuno. Make amends."
Zh: “听着……”（配合。）“我想跟坤诺和好，向他赔罪。”

En: I don't know what got into me... Giving keys to a 20-ton motor-lorry to a child -- give 'em back!
Zh: “我不知道自己是怎么了……才会把一辆20吨重的货車钥匙交给一个孩子——还给我！”

En: Believe it. I am the miracle worker. The bedazzle-man. Around me, dreams come true.
Zh: “相信吧，我就是传说中能创造奇迹的，炫光人。有我在身边，梦想就能成真。”

En: Too late, pig! Thanks. I... fucking thanks! For a moment he seems at a loss for words.
Zh: “太迟了，猪猡！谢了。我……谢了！”一时间他似乎也无言以对了。

En: The wide grin above his clenched jaw, the heavy breathing, the dilated pupils... It all speaks of one thing -- this was a really good idea!
Zh: 他紧咬牙关的裂开嘴笑着，急促的呼吸，放大的瞳孔……都只说明了一件事——这真是一个好主意！

En: You're a cool dude. Let's just bury the hatchet, okay?
Zh: “没事了，朋友。我们握手言和，好吗？”

En: Don't trust the f****t oinker, Cuno!
Zh: “别相信那头该死的猪，坤诺！”

En: Amends, Cuno. I was wrong to try to hit you. I'm sorry.
Zh: “赔罪，坤诺。很抱歉我想要打你，对不起。”

En: Punch yourself in the face again! The other one won't even let you talk to Cuno.
Zh: “那就给自己一拳！”另一个人甚至不让你与坤诺交谈。

En: Got you a little set of wheels, Cuno. (Throw him the keys to the abandoned truck.)
Zh: “我给你弄了一辆車，坤诺。”（把那辆废弃货車的钥匙扔给他。）

En: Perhaps I could interest you in some speed? (Show him the stuff.)
Zh: “或许你对这些思必得有兴趣？”（向他展示你的存货。）

En: Here's a drink, kid. It's alcohol. This should make us friends. (Extend the bottle of liquor.)
Zh: “来一杯吧，孩子。这是酒，能让我们成为朋友的东西。”（掏出那瓶酒。）

En: Yeah? How are you going to make it up to Cuno, pigshit?
Zh: “是吗？你准备怎么跟坤诺和好呢，猪猡？”

En: Oh, so that's what this is about. You need a snitch-bitch. You need Cuno -- he pauses for clarity " -- to be your sweaty little snitch bitch."
Zh: “哦，原来是这么回事。你要找个告密鬼。你要坤诺——”他顿了顿。“——向你泄密。”

En: Yeah, I don't have the time for this. [Leave.]
Zh: “好吧，我不想浪费时间。”[离开。]

En: KILL YOURSELF!!! Cuno, make him kill himself!
Zh: “自杀吧！！！坤诺，让他自杀！”

En: Reminisce with Cuno: first you try to fiddle this -- then you punch yourself in the face? What was up with that?
Zh: “跟坤诺回忆一下吧：你先是一番搅局——然后又来自打嘴巴？究竟是怎么回事？”

En: Yeah, Cuno! The sycophantic pipo-wearing pup behind the fence agrees. "What *was* that?"
Zh: “是啊，坤诺！”那只站在围栏后面阿谀奉承的小幼崽赞同着。“是*怎么*回事？”

En: What are you doing? The lieutenant's dark eyes peer into yours over his spectacles.
Zh: “你在干什么？”警督深色的眼眸透过镜片窥视着你的眼睛。

En: I need to make truce with Cuno, offer him something.
Zh: “我要和坤诺停战，向他赔罪。”

En: No, you really, really don't. That is a twelve year old boy. His opinion of you doesn't matter.
Zh: “不，你真的，真的不需要。那是一个十二岁的男孩，他对你的看法根本无关紧要。”

En: You're right, Kim, you're right, of course. [Leave.]
Zh: “你说得对，金，你说得对，一向如此。”[离开。]

En: I'm still going to mark it down as something I need to do...
Zh: “我还是要把它列为一件待办事项……”

En: But... but... *why*? He looks truly puzzled. "You're turning this into a huge thing."
Zh: “但……但是……*为什么*？”他看上去真的很困惑。“你让这件事愈演愈烈了。”

En: In punching, someone always ends up being someone's bitch. Don't you know anything about male power structures, Kim?
Zh: “战场上永远是胜者为王，败者为寇。你对男性权力结构一点都不了解吗，金？”

En: Say nothing. [Leave.]
Zh: 沉默不语。[离开。]

En: You're totally unraveling, officer.
Zh: “你完全崩溃了，警官。”

En: Please be careful with it. And don't actually drive it anywhere, okay?
Zh: “请务必小心，也别把車开到任何地方去，好吗？”

En: You belittled yourself before the Cuno. Her voice is calm, she doesn't dignify you with a look. "Now you must seek his forgiveness."
Zh: “你在坤诺面前贬低了自己。”她的声音很平静，甚至没有多看你一眼。“现在你必须要求得他的宽恕。”

En: How are you gonna make Cuno forget that shit, huh?
Zh: “那你要坤诺如何忘记那件破事呢，嗯？”

En: He's tryin'a forget it Cuno. Don't let him forget it just like that.
Zh: “他想忘掉，坤诺。千万别让他就那么忘了。”

En: You better come up with a way to make Cuno forget you tried to fucking hit him, piggo.
Zh: “你最好想个办法让坤诺忘记你曾经试图打过他，猪仔。”

En: You don't fucking matter, book-gimp!
Zh: “你他妈才不重要，书呆子。”

En: The lieutenant's eyes inspect your face for a while, then his posture relaxes. "Okay, let's go."
Zh: 警督的眼睛盯着你的脸看了一会儿，然后他的姿势放松了下来。“好吧，出发。”

En: It's just very hard for me to let things go. I know it doesn't matter, but I need to make this right.
Zh: “只是对我来说很难真正放手。我知道这无关紧要，但我得把事情做好。”

En: Uh... okay... The lieutenant looks worried. "If you absolutely *need* to." He shakes his head. "But right now let's move out."
Zh: “呃……好吧……”警督看上去很担忧。“如果你*一定*要这么做的话。”他摇摇头。“但现在我们得走了。”

En: Uh... okay... The lieutenant looks worried. "I *might* understand if you told me, but, sure... let's not waste any more time here." He turns to leave.
Zh: “呃……好吧……”警督看上去很担忧。“如果你告诉我，我*也许*能理解，但，好吧……别再这浪费时间了。”他转身离开了。

En: Don't worry, lieutenant -- I got this. Now, let's go. [Leave.]
Zh: “别担心，警督——一切有我。现在，出发吧。”[离开。]

En: All will be well as soon as I get this 'being Cuno's bitch' situation off my back. (Don't wait for the lieutenant to answer.) "Let's get to work, Kim!" [Leave.]
Zh: “一旦我摆脱*坤诺的手下败将*的窘境，一切都会好起来的。”（不等警督的回答。）“去工作吧，金！”[离开。]

En: I don't have anything... What can I offer you, Cuno?
Zh: “我什么都没有……我能为你做些什么吗，坤诺？”

En: The lieutenant does not approve of this. At all.
Zh: 警督不同意这样做，完全反对。

En: Please don't waste time on nonsense.
Zh: “请不要把时间浪费在无聊的事情上。”

En: You can pay tribute to Cuno with drugs. Or cigarettes... or some wheels. Cuno could use some wheels. Motorized carriage shit.
Zh: “你可以向坤诺献上毒品，或者香烟作为贡品……車子也行。坤诺也能用的上車子，机动車之类的玩意。”

En: You can pay tribute to Cuno with drugs or cigarettes... He pauses. "Gets Cuno to like you again... Some giant-ass wheels would be nice too."
Zh: “你可以向坤诺献上毒品或者香烟作为贡品……”他顿了顿。“让坤诺再次喜欢上你……一辆大車子也不错。”

En: With a quick motion the lieutenant stops your hand before your palm opens. "Are you crazy?"
Zh: 警督迅速地在你的手掌张开之前拦住了你的手。”你疯了吗？”

En: Class-A fucker... Cuno shakes his head. "Blind fucks are always ruining it for everybody."
Zh: “真是一流的混蛋……”坤诺摇摇头。“睁眼瞎总是让人不爽。”

En: Kim is never going to be okay with you handing something like this off to a minor. This plan is either off the table or you need to do it when he's not around.
Zh: 金绝对不会同意你把这种东西交给一个未成年人的。这个计划要么不提，要么就趁他不在的时候施行。

En: Put that away. Right now. He stops you.
Zh: “把它拿走，快点。”他阻止了你。

En: Let's rip some tar, Cuno. (Hold out the pack of cigarettes.)
Zh: “来享受一下焦油吧，坤诺。”（掏出一包香烟。）

En: Put it away. The lieutenant crosses his arms. "The information here isn't worth it."
Zh: “把东西收起来。”警督双臂环抱。“这种情报根本不值得。”

En: Okay, porkson... He snatches it from your hand. "Tar keeps Cuno sharp, helps Cuno think. Cuno likes that brain-boost shit."
Zh: “好吧，猪猡……”他从你的手中夺走了它。“焦油能让坤诺保持敏锐，能帮助坤诺思考。坤诺很喜欢能刺激大脑的玩意。”

En: We're cool now. But don't be pulling this shit on Cuno, or Cuno's gonna have to beat the shit out of you, *again*.
Zh: “我们两清了。但别再跟坤诺耍花招，否则坤诺*又要*把你打得屁滚尿流了。”

En: Cuno's Cuno, pig! The boy points to his chest with both thumbs.
Zh: “坤诺就是坤诺，猪猡！”男孩用两根拇指指着自己的胸膛。

En: Got it -- I had another question.
Zh: “了解——我还有一个问题。”

En: So you refer to yourself in the third person?
Zh: “所以你一直用第三人称来称呼自己吗？”

En: Cuno doesn't do that *smart* shit. He seems offended. "Don't throw that book shit at Cuno. Cuno knows you're lying."
Zh: “坤诺才不会耍那种*小聪明*。”他似乎被冒犯到了。“别跟坤诺咬文嚼字了，坤诺知道你在说谎。”

En: Okay, porkson... He snatches it from your hand. "Tar keeps Cuno sharp, helps Cuno think. Cuno likes that brain-boost shit."
Zh: “好吧，猪猡……”他从你的手中夺走了它。“焦油能让坤诺保持敏锐，能帮助坤诺思考。坤诺很喜欢能刺激大脑的玩意。”

En: See, Kim? Cuno is a big boy.
Zh: “看到了吗，金？坤诺已经是个大孩子了。”

En: We may need his help. Who knows what he knows?
Zh: “我们可能需要他的帮助，谁知道他都知道些什么呢？”

En: Back off, fuck-eyes. Cuno is a man. He puffs up his chest. "Cuno can smoke if he wants."
Zh: “滚远点儿，四眼仔。坤诺已经是个大人了。”他挺起了胸膛。“坤诺想抽烟就抽烟。”

En: You're right, I shouldn't give smokes to a kid.
Zh: “你说得对，我不应该给孩子吸烟。”

En: *MAN!* The screech from the red-haired goblin is nearly deafening.
Zh: “*大人！*”红发哥布林的尖叫声几乎震耳欲聋。

En: Okay, *man*. Cuno is a man and men smoke. You want this? (Shake the pack of cigarettes at the boy.)
Zh: “好吧，*大人*。坤诺是个大人了，大人就可以吸烟。你要这个吗？”（朝着男孩摇晃那包香烟。）

En: I'm not indulging that.
Zh: “我并没有沉溺其中。”

En: Fuck you too, piggo! Fuck you and your four eyed friend! He shakes his head, disappointed. "Thought you wanted to make this right with Cuno..."
Zh: “去死吧你，猪猡！你跟你那个四眼仔朋友都去死吧！”他失望地摇着脑袋。“还以为你是来跟坤诺和解的……”

En: No -- what we *need* is to get back to work. He doesn't know anything.
Zh: “不——我们*需要*做的应该是回去工作。他什么都不知道。”

En: This *is* work. So how about it, Cuno? This can be yours. (Shake the pack of cigarettes at the boy.)
Zh: “这*就是*工作。你怎么说，坤诺？这个可以给你哦。”（朝男孩摇晃那包香烟。）

En: The lieutenant doesn't like this. It may be less destructive to your working relationship to just come back alone later.
Zh: 警督并不喜欢这种做法。不如过会儿再回来，还能降低对于职场关系的伤害。

En: Cuno's Cuno! The boy points to his chest with both thumbs. "You already know that, slow-shit."
Zh: “坤诺就是坤诺！”男孩用两根拇指指着自己的胸膛。“你不是已经知道了，笨蛋。”

En: Right. How could I forget?
Zh: “是啊，我怎么会忘记呢？”

En: Got it -- had another question.
Zh: “明白——我还有一个问题。”

En: Cuno, stop being nice to the pig! The screech pierces through the yard. "Step away from Cuno, fat-ass creep!"
Zh: “坤诺，别再对那头猪那么好了！”尖叫声穿透了这个院子。“离坤诺远点，死变态！”

En: Cuno thinks you have brain damage or some shit. He twirls a finger next to his head. "Cuno cares."
Zh: “坤诺感觉你的脑袋有问题。”他的一根手指在脑袋边打转。“坤诺很关心啊。”

En: Ease off, C. Don't be telling Cuno what Cuno can do! He turns back to you. "What else you want, pigman?"
Zh: “放轻松，坤妮。不要告诉坤诺应该怎么做！”他又转向了你。“你还想干什么，猪猡？”

En: Cuno? Sounds like something you'd call a rabid dog...
Zh: “坤诺？听上去像只疯狗的名字……”

En: Cuno? Is that some kind of gang name?
Zh: “坤诺？是某个帮派的名号吗？”

En: It's always *Cuno*, never *I*. Clearly the kid's using the third-person perspective as a shield.
Zh: 永远是*坤诺*，而不是*我*。显然这孩子用第三人称视角当做自己的挡箭牌。

En: Cuno... Primal. Violent.
Zh: 坤诺……很狂野，很暴力。

En: The fuck are you calling a *third person*?! Cuno's the fucking FIRST person.
Zh: “你他妈说什么*第三人*？！坤诺他妈的是第一人。”

En: Watch out, Cuno, he's trying to fiddle you. He's gonna put his HANDS on you! The *thing* behind the fence starts squealing, shrill and violent like a fire alarm.
Zh: “小心点，坤诺，他在扰乱视听呢。他要把手放到你身上了！”围栏后面的*东西*开始尖叫，刺耳又猛烈的仿佛火警铃声一样。

En: Help! Pigs got Cuno! Help! RAPE! The sound gets louder as the child shouts at the windows overlooking the yard.
Zh: “救命啊！坤诺被猪猡抓住了！救命！强奸！”

En: Help! The boy joins in. "He's got the Cuno!!! HELP!!!"
Zh: “救命啊！”那男孩也加入了进来。“他抓住坤诺了！！！救命啊！！！”

En: I'm not doing anything! See?
Zh: “我什么都没做啊！看到了吗？”

En: Just answer the questions.
Zh: “回答我。”

En: I'm just going to leave. (Conclude the conversation.)
Zh: “我正打算离开呢。”（结束谈话。）

En: Help! He's digging his dick out!!!
Zh: “救命啊！他要把老二掏出来了！！！”

En: He looks slightly confused but proud he came up with that retort -- but right as he's getting distracted, you hear a malevolent hiss from behind the fence...
Zh: 他看起来有些茫然，却又很自豪自己想出了这句话来回敬你——正当他分神的时候，你听到围栏后面传来一阵恶意的嘘声……

En: Interesting... you refer to yourself in the third person to distance yourself from the situation?
Zh: “有意思……你用第三人称称呼自己，就是为了把自己抽离这种情况吗？”

En: Yeah, Cuno's in a fucking gang. In a bang gang. Cuno bangs for Madre, bangs for the Mazda, bangs for Revachol...
Zh: “是啊，坤诺就是在混帮派，黑帮哦。坤诺跟着马德雷混，跟着马兹达混，跟着瑞瓦肖混……”

En: Yeah! His eyes light up. "Think about it. Think about that rabid Cuno shit."
Zh: “没错！”他的眼睛亮了起来。“想想吧，想想看坤诺的疯狂战绩吧。”

En: He seems glad someone understood what he was going for -- but right as he's getting distracted, you hear a malevolent hiss from behind the fence...
Zh: 他似乎很高兴能有人明白他的想法——正当他分神的时候，你听到围栏后面传来一阵恶意的嘘声……

En: The boy knows he has an addictive personality. Admirable insight for his age.
Zh: 那男孩知道自己的性格容易上瘾。就年龄而言，他的洞察力很令人钦佩。

En: He lays the names out there with pride and precision, like cards on a table. Right when he's getting distracted, there's a malevolent hiss behind the fence...
Zh: 他自豪又响亮地报上了姓名，就像在桌子上亮底牌一样。正当他分神的时候，围栏后面传来一阵恶意的嘘声……

En: Trying to get Cuno hooked on the book...
Zh: “想让坤诺沉迷看书……”

En: Yeah, get out of here before the Cuno beats *the shit* out of you.
Zh: “是啊，在坤诺把你打得*屁滚尿流*之前，有多远滚多远。”

En: Yeah, that's right... drag your fat ass out of here, fat boy. Before Cuno fucks you!
Zh: “是啊，说的没错……有多远滚多远吧，肥猪。别让坤诺亲自动手！”

En: Baaang! Got fucked by the Cuno. You hear him say as you walk away. "We alright. You wanna get fucked again, come back."
Zh: “滚！坤诺的手下败将。”你离开时听到他这么说。“我们扯平了。还想挨揍的话，欢迎再来。”

En: Don't listen. Just go.
Zh: 别理他，走吧。

En: Listen.
Zh: 听从。

En: Just go. [Leave.]
Zh: 走吧。[离开。]

En: Calm down. Anyone watching can see you're doing nothing. Just keep it professional.
Zh: 冷静。大家都能看到你什么也没做，专业一点。

En: Everyone can hear. You need to get the hell out of here before...
Zh: 大家都会听到的，你得赶紧离开这里……

En: Everybody! PLEASE!!! He's digging his dick out!!!
Zh: “大家！救命啊！！！他要把老二掏出来了！！！”

En: Escalate, Cuno! His dick is out, you're afraid!
Zh: “完了，坤诺！他已经掏出来了，你太害怕了！”

En: PIGS ARE HURTING CUNO! SOMEBODY *PLEASE!!!* It's full blast now; the wind carries the message far and wide across Martinaise.
Zh: “猪猡在伤害坤诺！快来人*救命*啊！！！”他拼尽了全力；风带着他的口信走遍了马丁内斯。

En: Windows are being opened. On Rue Saint-Cispare, people are turning their heads. An elderly woman puts down her grocery bags in front of the Frittte store and listens. Somewhere behind her, the gates of the industrial harbour are raised.
Zh: 窗户被打开了，圣希斯帕路上的人们都转过头来。一位老妇人把她的购物袋放在弗利多商店门前听着，在她身后的某个地方，工业港的大门悄然打开。

En: On the catwalk above the shipping containers, a broad-shouldered man jerks his head up. "That Cuno? Cop's getting killed out there." The tattooed Mesque next to him smiles. "That's Cuno alright!"
Zh: 集装箱上方的甲板上，一个肩膀宽阔的男人猛地抬起了头。“那是坤诺？有个警察被杀了。”一旁纹身的梅斯克人笑了。“是坤诺没错！”

En: You didn't shut him down. Your fat fist didn't meet its target. Instead, it pulled you down with it.
Zh: 你没能让他闭嘴，你的胖拳头也没能击中目标，反而让自己栽倒了。

En: Thump! The blow connects surprisingly well, leaving your knuckles tingling.
Zh: 砰！这一击可谓是正中靶心，你的指关节有些刺痛。

En: Shut him down.
Zh: 让他闭嘴。

En: Just a Light Tap.
Zh: 轻轻一击。

En: Encouraged by Drama.
Zh: 被故弄玄虚鼓舞。

En: Made Cuno Look Like a Snitch.
Zh: 让坤诺看上去像个告密者。

En: Are you high right now?
Zh: “你是嗑药了吗？”

En: What is this sick charade?
Zh: “这是什么鬼把戏？”

En: Don't punch him -- it's a bad idea. (Back off.)
Zh: 别打他——这是个坏主意。（退后。）

En: Who put you up to this?
Zh: “是谁让你这么做的？”

En: No one, he whispers suddenly. "Cuno's doing this because he *likes* it, pig."
Zh: “没有人，”他突然低声说道。“坤诺这么做是因为他就*喜欢*这样，猪猡。”

En: Someone from the harbour put you to this, right? I can feel it.
Zh: “是港口里的人让你这么做的，是不是？我能感觉到。”

En: Someone put you up to this.
Zh: “是有人唆使你这么做的。”

En: You put him up to this yourself -- when you decided to talk to him in the first place.
Zh: “是你让他这么做的——就在你最初决定跟他谈话的时候。”

En: You did this to yourself, when you antagonized the Cuno. He looks around, then yells: "POLICE VIOLENCE! RAPE!!!"
Zh: “你跟坤诺对着干，这就叫自作自受。”他环顾四周，然后大喊：“警察打人了！强暴！！！”

En: NOOOO!!! the boy screams, his freckled face contorted in hideous, uncontainable laughter. "Get off Cuno, you sick fat fuck!"
Zh: “不！！！”男孩尖叫。他长满雀斑的脸扭曲着，发出了可怕的、难以抑制的笑声。“放开坤诺，你这头恶心的肥猪！”

En: This is where Cuno establishes dominance. Over you.
Zh: 这就是坤诺碾压你的瞬间。

En: Just walk away. [Leave.]
Zh: 走吧。[离开。]

En: HELP! The pig's gagging him. Cuno can't speak!
Zh: “救命啊！猪猡把他的嘴捂住了。坤诺说不了话了！”

En: The nearly psychopathic way they can slip in and out of the act implies you're not the first victim.
Zh: 他们这种近乎发神经似的反复横跳意味着你并不是第一个受害者了。

En: Listen to your f****t friend. Cuno hawks a loogie on the ground. The phlegm is yellowish and bubbling somehow.
Zh: “听你傻逼朋友的吧。”坤诺往地上唾了一口，淡黄色、不知为何还冒着泡的浓痰。

En: Kim, did someone from your station put you up to this?
Zh: “金，是你警局里的人让你这么做的吗？”

En: Kim, did *you* do this?
Zh: “金，是*你*干的吗？”

En: Did Garte put you up to this?
Zh: “是加尔特让你这么做的吗？”

En: It was the harbour, wasn't it? They're trying to compromise me. I can hear them laughing now...
Zh: “是港口里的人，不是吗？他们一直想伤害我，我现在都能听到他们的笑声了……”

En: Okay, no one put you up to this.
Zh: “好吧，没人让你这么做。”

En: You're fucking losing it, you fat fuck!
Zh: “你失控了，该死的混蛋！”

En: Help, people! His face is contorted with hideous laughter. "The RCM is trying to fuck Cuno in the ass!"
Zh: “救命啊，大家！”他的脸因为可怕的笑声而扭曲着。“RCM要干坤诺的屁股了！”

En: Cuno owns the fatass, he whispers, then looks around and yells from the top of his lungs: "Help, the RCM is trying to *FUCK* Cuno!"
Zh: “那头死肥猪是坤诺的，“他低声说，然后环顾四周，声嘶力竭的喊道：“救命，RCM想*强奸*坤诺！”

En: Yeah, we're all in this together! The little one hisses with glee. "The *banaanipoika* is losing it."
Zh: “没错，我们都是一伙的！”小家伙高兴地发出了嘘声。“*基佬*失控了。”

En: The lieutenant doesn't even shrug.
Zh: 金甚至没有一丝惊讶。

En: HELP! Tears of laughter are running down his flushed face. "The RCM is trying to fuck us!"
Zh: “救命啊！”他涨红的脸上流淌着欢乐的泪水。“RCM想强奸我们！”

En: Help, the RCM is trying to fuck Cuno in the ass! Tears of joy mix with sweat smelling of laundry detergent on his face.
Zh: “救命啊，RCM想搞坤诺的屁股！”喜悦的泪水还夹杂着他脸上洗衣粉的汗湿味。

En: Help, misters! HELP! He prances around, eyes bulging out of their sockets, rolling hard, yelling at the windows...
Zh: “救命啊，先生！救命！”他昂首阔步，眼珠子从眼窝中凸出来，使劲转动着，对着窗户大喊大叫……

En: Rolling *super* hard.
Zh: *超级*使劲地转动。

En: He's having the time of his life. Total ecstasy. Fuck the pig.
Zh: 他正享受着人生的高光时刻，陷入了狂喜之中，戏耍了猪猡。

En: He's flashing Cuno, he's showing his genitals! If you don't help Cuno now it will be too late!
Zh: “他对坤诺露阴了，在展示他的生殖器！你们现在不来帮助坤诺，一切就太迟了！”

En: Change of plan, you can't let that happen! It will make things harder down the line, you may end up missing crucial information.
Zh: 计划有变，你不能再这样下去了！这会让事情变得更困难，你很可能会错过重要的线索。

En: Here's an idea... *Don't* think about shutting this twelve year old down. Stop asking him questions. Just walk away and cool off.
Zh: 有一个办法……*不要*考虑让这个十二岁的孩子闭嘴，别再问他任何问题。直接走开，让事态冷却下来。

En: Look at his shit-eating grin... He knows there's nothing you can do to him. He's bullying you and you are helpless. Kill him. Kill him now. He won't see death coming.
Zh: 看看他那吃屎一样的笑容……他知道你不能对他怎样。他在霸凌你，你却无能为力。杀了他。现在就杀了他。他不会预想到死亡即将降临。

En: Nip it in the bud, before it gets completely out of hand. Right on his cheek. Just a light tap... to scare him a little. Don't kill him.
Zh: 在事态完全失控之前，将其扼杀在萌芽状态。对着他的脸颊，只要轻轻一击……只是吓吓他，不要杀他。

En: Nip it in the bud, before it gets completely out of hand. Right on his cheek. Just a light tap... to scare him a little. It won't kill him.
Zh: 在事态完全失控之前，将其扼杀在萌芽状态。对着他的脸颊，只要轻轻一击……只是吓吓他，不会要了他的命的。

En: Scare him? How did this happen? You can still get out of this, appeal to his reason!
Zh: 吓吓他？怎么会这样呢？你还是可以脱身的，唤回他的理智。

En: Be logical, kid. I haven't done anything to you.
Zh: “讲道理，孩子。我并没有对你怎么样。”

En: Fucking logical? He snorts. "HELP! The logical pig is fiddling Cuno!"
Zh: “去他妈的道理？”他嗤之以鼻。“救命啊！讲道理的猪猡在摆弄坤诺！”

En: How did we get here? How did this happen? This makes no sense... There may still be a way out, just appeal to his *reason*!
Zh: 我们怎么走到现在这一步了？怎么会这样？没道理啊……也许还是有办法的，只要唤回他的*理智*！

En: You can't let that happen. It will make things harder down the line, you may end up missing crucial information.
Zh: 你不能再这样下去了！这会让事情变得更困难，你很可能会错过重要的线索。

En: Okay, pig... He's no longer wearing his demonic grin. Something happened. The punch made him calmer.
Zh: “好吧，猪猡……”他收起了恶魔般的笑容。发生了什么，这一拳让他冷静了一些。

En: Officer, *you* need to calm down, says the lieutenant, breaking his silence. "Get a hold of yourself."
Zh: “警官，*你*需要冷静，”警督打破了沉默。“控制一下自己。”

En: I think we can have a normal conversation now. Am I right, Cuno?
Zh: “我想现在我们可以正常交流了。我说的对吗，坤诺？”

En: Shit... I don't know what got into me...
Zh: “该死……我不知道自己是怎么了……”

En: *You* made me do this. You did this to yourself.
Zh: “是*你*逼我的，你这是自作自受。”

En: Phe... whht... fuuh... The disoriented twelve year old is trying to get his bearings.
Zh: “呼……什么……妈的……”这个头晕目眩的12岁小孩正在试图弄清自己的方向。

En: *Taivaan tähden*, you killed Cuno!
Zh: “*看在神明的份上*，你杀了坤诺！”

En: Fucked your shoulder, fucked your knee, fucked your fat body up! the one behind the fence hisses like a lit fuse ready to go off from delight.
Zh: “干你的肩膀，干你的膝盖，还有你浑身上下的肥肉！”围栏后面的那个发出嘶嘶声的小东西，仿佛一根点燃的引线，随时会因为兴奋而爆炸。

En: You can almost hear the gears rattling -- a change in set decorations.
Zh: 您几乎可以听见齿轮转动的声音——布景改变了。

En: I told you not to tempt such forces. The annoyance in his voice is directed at you, not the gremlins.
Zh: “我告诉过你不要招惹这种势力。”他声音里的烦躁是针对你，而非那些小鬼的。

En: Cuno knows to respect that violent shit. You should see Cuno's dad -- Cuno's dad doesn't give a shit about *anything*, he declares with pride.
Zh: “坤诺知道要尊敬强者。你应该去见见坤诺的爸爸——坤诺的爸爸*什么*都不放在眼里，“他自豪地宣告着。

En: Say nothing, try to hold it together.
Zh: 沉默不语，尽量保持冷静。

En: Everything about her is saying *Wow -- what a man*. Her admiration is fuelled by camaraderie.
Zh: 她浑身上下都在喊*哇哦——真男人*。她的赞赏之情被这种同志之爱激发了。

En: Do you have any idea of the shit you just got yourself into, kid? (Get up.)
Zh: “你知道自己闯了什么祸吗，小鬼？”（起身。）

En: Okay, pig. Talk to Cuno. We're back in this shit. He brushes the dirt off his pants. "The fuck do you want?"
Zh: “好吧，猪猡，跟坤诺说说。我们又回到这个话题了。”他掸去裤子上的灰尘。“你他妈想干什么？”

En: Cuno can't believe this shit! It's like he's now realized he has super-powers. "Can *no one* stop the Cuno?!"
Zh: “坤诺真是不敢相信！”就好像他突然意识到自己有超能力似的。“难道*没有人*能阻止坤诺了吗？”

En: Cuno's just gonna beat the shit out of you again. He is clearly still in awe of himself right now.
Zh: “坤诺又要把你揍得屁滚尿流了。”显然他现在仍处于对自己的敬畏当中。

En: Cunoesse is staring at Cuno with pride-filled eyes, almost forgetting your presence.
Zh: 坤妮斯用骄傲的眼神盯着坤诺，几乎忘记了你的存在。

En: Cuno beat the shit out of popo! The kid is laughing so hard, tears are running down his freckled cheeks. "Beat your fucking knee off."
Zh: “坤诺把条子痛揍了一顿！”这孩子笑得太过厉害，满是雀斑的脸上淌着眼泪。“把你的膝盖打断。”

En: Yeah, laugh it up. Let's just get back to it. (Get up.)
Zh: “好吧，尽管笑吧。我们快点回到正题。”（起身。）

En: Okay! Everybody calm down.
Zh: “行了，大家都冷静一下。”

En: You lost control, says the lieutenant, breaking his silence. "You need to get yourself together."
Zh: “你失去理智了，”警督打破了沉默。“你得控制一下自己。”

En: No, officer -- you did this, says the lieutenant, breaking his silence. "Get yourself together."
Zh: “不，警官——是你的问题，”警督打破了沉默。“控制一下。”

En: Officer, this is very far from normal police conduct, says the lieutenant, breaking his silence. "Get yourself together."
Zh: “警官，这与警察的正常执法相去甚远，”警督打破了沉默。“控制一下。”

En: Cuno *feels* it; this was no light tap.
Zh: 坤诺*感觉*到了；这一下打的可不轻。

En: Who's doing a *sick charade* now?
Zh: “现在是谁在*搞鬼*了？”

En: You are, officer, says the lieutenant, breaking his silence. "Get yourself together."
Zh: “是你，警官。”警督打破了沉默。“控制一下。”

En: For heaven's sake, he thinks, this has gone too far. Don't make this any worse than it is -- just get back to questioning the kid.
Zh: 看在老天爷的份上，他想，这真是太过分了。不要把事情弄得更糟了——还是继续询问那个孩子吧。

En: The lieutenant doesn't appreciate your *sick charades* on his crime scene. His opinion of you has lessened.
Zh: 警督并不喜欢你在他的犯罪现场*搞鬼*，他对你的评价降低了。
